en.tldr: This work studies the critical behavior of the second correlation function of characteristic polynomials for non-Hermitian random band matrices when bandwidth W is proportional to the threshold √N.
en.motivation: Previous work showed a transition in correlation function behavior near W∼√N: matching Ginibre ensemble for W≫√N and factorizing for 1≪W≪√N. This paper aims to characterize the critical regime W∝√N.
en.method: Extends techniques from arXiv:2510.04255 to analyze the critical regime where bandwidth W is proportional to the threshold √N.
en.result: Reveals asymptotic behavior of characteristic polynomial correlations in the critical regime W∝√N.
en.help_to_user: Provides mathematical framework for analyzing critical scaling behavior in non-Hermitian random matrix systems.

idea_spark.idea: Investigate critical behavior near similar thresholds in other random matrix models.
idea_spark.risk: Mathematical derivations heavily depend on specific matrix structures; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires new thinking about connections between critical phenomena in complex systems and random matrix theory.

papers.title: Scalable Outer Approximation of Minkowski Sums of Matrix Ellipsoids for Data-Driven Control
papers.summary: Matrix ellipsoids provide a standard framework for representing bounded uncertainties in data-driven control. Since noise models for sequential observations are naturally represented as the Minkowski sum of multiple matrix ellipsoids, applying existing robust control methods, which typically assume a single ellipsoidal set, requires a tight outer approximation. While techniques based on linear matrix inequalities (LMI) are applicable, their computational cost grows quadratically with the data length, limiting their scalability. This paper investigates the optimal outer approximation problem under two criteria: the sum of squared semi-axes and the volume. We propose an LMI-free approach by introducing a parameterized family of bounding matrix ellipsoids. Specifically, we derive an exact analytical solution for the first criterion and develop an efficient majorization-minimization (MM) algorithm for the second. The proposed MM algorithm employs a first-order approximation of the log-determinant function to provide closed-form update rules, ensuring monotonic convergence to the set of stationary points. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our method offers significantly higher computational efficiency and scalability than standard interior-point solvers.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的矩阵椭球Minkowski和的外逼近方法，用于数据驱动控制中的不确定性表示。
ai.motivation: 数据驱动控制中，序列观测的噪声模型通常表示为多个矩阵椭球的Minkowski和，而现有鲁棒控制方法通常假设单个椭球集，因此需要紧致的外逼近。基于线性矩阵不等式的方法计算成本随数据长度二次增长，可扩展性受限。
ai.method: 引入参数化的边界矩阵椭球族，针对平方半轴和准则给出精确解析解，针对体积准则提出高效的主优化-最小化算法，利用对数行列式函数的一阶近似得到闭式更新规则。
ai.result: 数值实验表明，该方法比标准内点法求解器具有显著更高的计算效率和可扩展性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理数据驱动控制中多椭球不确定性提供了高效、可扩展的外逼近工具，避免了传统LMI方法的计算瓶颈。

idea_spark.idea: 将多椭球Minkowski和的外逼近转化为参数化椭球族的优化问题，避免直接求解高维LMI。
idea_spark.risk: 对高维或非椭球不确定性集的逼近效果需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将几何逼近问题转化为可分离结构的优化，利用一阶近似降低计算复杂度。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a scalable outer approximation method for Minkowski sums of matrix ellipsoids, used for uncertainty representation in data-driven control.
en.motivation: Noise models for sequential observations in data-driven control are naturally represented as Minkowski sums of multiple matrix ellipsoids, while existing robust control methods typically assume a single ellipsoidal set, requiring a tight outer approximation. LMI-based techniques suffer from quadratic computational cost growth with data length, limiting scalability.
en.method: Introduces a parameterized family of bounding matrix ellipsoids. Derives an exact analytical solution for the sum-of-squared-semi-axes criterion and develops an efficient Majorization-Minimization algorithm for the volume criterion, using a first-order approximation of the log-determinant function to obtain closed-form update rules.
en.result: Numerical experiments demonstrate significantly higher computational efficiency and scalability compared to standard interior-point solvers.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and scalable tool for outer approximation of multi-ellipsoid uncertainties in data-driven control, avoiding computational bottlenecks of traditional LMI methods.

idea_spark.idea: Transform outer approximation of Minkowski sums into an optimization over parameterized ellipsoid families, avoiding direct high-dimensional LMI solving.
idea_spark.risk: Approximation performance for high-dimensional or non-ellipsoidal uncertainty sets requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires converting geometric approximation problems into optimizations with separable structures, using first-order approximations to reduce computational complexity.

papers.title: Load Block Modeling in Distribution Systems: Network Reconfiguration for Load Restoration
papers.summary: The distribution system restoration (DSR) problem has received considerable attention over the last decade or more. Solutions to the DSR problem identify the best set or sequence of actions to perform on a distribution circuit to restore service after a disruption. The problem is challenging from a computational perspective, with engineering constraints specific to distribution systems, such as radial operations, that are difficult to effectively model. In this paper, we revisit the model for how specific loads are shed, energized and restored--and develop a formulation that more accurately models the requirements of load shedding, load energizing and restoration in distribution systems.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种更精确的配电网负荷建模方法，用于优化故障后服务恢复的决策序列。
ai.motivation: 配电网恢复问题计算复杂，且存在辐射状运行等工程约束，传统模型难以准确描述负荷投切与恢复的实际要求。
ai.method: 重新审视负荷切除、带电与恢复的建模方式，构建更精确描述配电网负荷投切与恢复需求的数学公式。
ai.result: 开发了一种能更准确建模配电网负荷切除、带电及恢复要求的优化模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为配电网故障后恢复决策提供了更精确的建模工具，有助于提升恢复方案的可行性与效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将负荷恢复过程分解为切除、带电、恢复三个阶段进行精细化建模。
idea_spark.risk: 模型复杂度可能增加计算负担，需在精度与求解效率间权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对电力系统其他操作（如微网并离网）进行分阶段精细化建模的思路。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a more accurate load modeling method for distribution systems to optimize decision sequences for post-fault service restoration.
en.motivation: The distribution system restoration problem is computationally challenging with engineering constraints like radial operations, and traditional models struggle to accurately capture the actual requirements of load switching and restoration.
en.method: Revisits the modeling of load shedding, energizing, and restoration, and develops a formulation that more accurately represents the requirements for load management in distribution systems.
en.result: Developed an optimization model that more accurately captures the requirements for load shedding, energizing, and restoration in distribution networks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more accurate modeling tool for post-fault restoration decisions in distribution networks, improving the feasibility and efficiency of recovery plans.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose the load restoration process into three stages (shedding, energizing, restoration) for refined modeling.
idea_spark.risk: Increased model complexity may raise computational burden, requiring trade-offs between accuracy and solution efficiency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires staged refined modeling approaches for other power system operations, such as microgrid islanding and reconnection.

papers.title: Empirical Asymptotic Runtime Analysis of Linear Programming Algorithms
papers.summary: This paper takes an empirical look at asymptotic runtime growth rates for the most widely used algorithms for solving linear programming (LP) problems across a set of six optimization application areas that are known to produce large and difficult LP models. On the algorithm side, we consider the simplex method, interior-point methods, and PDHG. On the model side, we use a large language model (LLM) to create families of instances in different application areas, allowing us to study model types and sizes that are simultaneously synthetic and realistic. The results indicate that simple regression models typically predict observed runtimes quite well within a model class, and that asymptotic behavior can vary significantly between the different algorithms. This may have a significant impact on which algorithms will be most effective for solving large LP models in the future.

ai.tldr: 本文通过实证方法，比较了求解线性规划问题的三种主流算法（单纯形法、内点法、PDHG）在不同应用领域生成的大规模模型上的渐近运行时增长率。
ai.motivation: 不同线性规划算法在大规模问题上的实际渐近性能尚不明确，这影响了未来大规模LP模型求解的算法选择。
ai.method: 使用大型语言模型在六个优化应用领域生成既合成又现实的LP模型家族，对三种算法进行运行时测量，并用简单回归模型拟合观察到的运行时间。
ai.result: 简单回归模型通常能很好地预测同一模型类别内的运行时间，且不同算法的渐近行为存在显著差异。
ai.help_to_user: 为大规模线性规划问题的算法选择提供了实证依据，揭示了算法渐近性能的差异性。

idea_spark.idea: 将LLM驱动的实例生成与实证渐近分析结合，创建可控且现实的算法性能评估框架。
idea_spark.risk: LLM生成的实例可能无法完全覆盖真实世界的所有复杂性；回归模型可能过于简化，忽略了运行时波动或硬件效应。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对更多算法（如原始-对偶方法变体）或更复杂模型（如整数规划松弛）进行类似的实证渐近分析，并探索将运行时预测模型集成到求解器选择器中。

en.tldr: This paper empirically compares the asymptotic runtime growth rates of three mainstream algorithms (simplex, interior-point methods, PDHG) for solving linear programming problems on large-scale models generated across various application domains.
en.motivation: The actual asymptotic performance of different LP algorithms on large-scale problems is unclear, impacting future algorithm selection for solving large LP models.
en.method: Uses a large language model to generate families of synthetic yet realistic LP instances across six optimization application areas, measures runtime for three algorithms, and fits observed runtimes with simple regression models.
en.result: Simple regression models typically predict observed runtimes well within a model class, and asymptotic behavior varies significantly between algorithms.
en.help_to_user: Provides empirical evidence for algorithm selection in large-scale linear programming, highlighting differences in asymptotic performance.

idea_spark.idea: Combine LLM-driven instance generation with empirical asymptotic analysis to create a controllable yet realistic framework for algorithm performance evaluation.
idea_spark.risk: LLM-generated instances may not fully capture all complexities of real-world problems; regression models may oversimplify, ignoring runtime fluctuations or hardware effects.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires similar empirical asymptotic analysis for more algorithms (e.g., primal-dual variants) or more complex models (e.g., integer programming relaxations), and exploring integration of runtime prediction models into solver selectors.

papers.title: Asymptotic stability of Landau solutions to the MHD system and energy decay
papers.summary: We consider the three-dimensional incompressible MHD system. Any weak solution satisfying a strong energy inequality is $L^2$-asymptotically stable around a Landau solution. Under an additional integrability assumption on the initial perturbation, we also obtain an explicit algebraic decay rate for the $L^2$-norm of the velocity and magnetic perturbations.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了三维不可压缩磁流体动力学系统中，满足强能量不等式的弱解在Landau解附近是L^2渐近稳定的，并在初始扰动满足额外可积性条件下，给出了速度和磁场扰动L^2范数的显式代数衰减率。
ai.motivation: 研究磁流体动力学系统解的长期行为，特别是围绕Landau解的稳定性及扰动能量的衰减特性。
ai.method: 基于满足强能量不等式的弱解框架，分析初始扰动的可积性条件，推导渐近稳定性及衰减率。
ai.result: 证明了弱解在Landau解附近的L^2渐近稳定性，并获得了扰动速度和磁场的L^2范数代数衰减率。
ai.help_to_user: 为磁流体动力学系统的稳定性分析提供了严格的数学框架和衰减估计工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将Landau解的稳定性结论推广至更一般的背景流或更弱的解空间。
idea_spark.risk: 额外可积性假设可能限制结果的适用范围，实际物理初始条件未必满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法或可应用于研究湍流中的相干结构稳定性或等离子体约束问题。

en.tldr: This paper proves L²-asymptotic stability of weak solutions satisfying a strong energy inequality around Landau solutions for the 3D incompressible MHD system, and establishes an explicit algebraic decay rate for the L²-norm of velocity and magnetic perturbations under an additional integrability assumption on the initial perturbation.
en.motivation: To investigate the long-time behavior of solutions to the magnetohydrodynamics system, particularly the stability around Landau solutions and the decay properties of perturbation energy.
en.method: Employing the framework of weak solutions satisfying a strong energy inequality, analyzing integrability conditions on the initial perturbation, and deriving asymptotic stability and decay rates.
en.result: Proved L²-asymptotic stability of weak solutions near Landau solutions and obtained an algebraic decay rate for the L²-norm of velocity and magnetic perturbations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework and decay estimation tools for stability analysis in magnetohydrodynamics systems.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the stability results for Landau solutions to more general background flows or weaker solution spaces.
idea_spark.risk: The additional integrability assumption may limit the applicability of the results, as physical initial conditions might not satisfy it.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach could potentially be applied to study stability of coherent structures in turbulence or plasma confinement problems.

papers.title: Remarks on Lifespan and Continuation Criteria of Two Dimensional Incompressible Fluid Models
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the lifespan and continuation criteria of several two-dimensional incompressible fluid models. Motivated by a novel energy-vorticity formulation, combining linear transport estimate and a bootstrap argument, we are able to show several longtime existence results of two dimensional fluid models in close-to-Euler regime. A byproduct of our approach is a new conditional BKM type result for the inhomogeneous Euler equation.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了几种二维不可压缩流体模型的寿命和延拓准则。通过一种新颖的能量-涡量公式，结合线性输运估计和自举论证，证明了在接近欧拉体系下二维流体模型的长时间存在性。
ai.motivation: 研究二维不可压缩流体模型的长时间行为，特别是其解的存在时间和延拓条件，对于理解流体动力学的数学性质至关重要。
ai.method: 采用一种新的能量-涡量公式，结合线性输运估计和自举论证，在接近欧拉体系的条件下进行分析。
ai.result: 证明了二维流体模型在接近欧拉体系下的长时间存在性，并得到了非齐次欧拉方程的一个新的条件性BKM型结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为二维不可压缩流体模型的长时间行为分析提供了新的数学工具和结果，有助于理解该类模型的解的性质。

idea_spark.idea: 将能量-涡量公式与线性输运估计结合，构建新的分析框架。
idea_spark.risk: 方法可能依赖于特定的接近欧拉体系条件，限制了其一般性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将类似的分析框架扩展到更广泛的流体模型或更高维情况。

en.tldr: This paper studies the lifespan and continuation criteria of several two-dimensional incompressible fluid models. Using a novel energy-vorticity formulation combined with linear transport estimates and a bootstrap argument, longtime existence results are proved in the close-to-Euler regime.
en.motivation: Investigating the longtime behavior of two-dimensional incompressible fluid models, particularly the existence time and continuation conditions of their solutions, is crucial for understanding the mathematical properties of fluid dynamics.
en.method: A novel energy-vorticity formulation is employed, combined with linear transport estimates and a bootstrap argument, analyzed under close-to-Euler conditions.
en.result: Longtime existence of two-dimensional fluid models in the close-to-Euler regime is proved, and a new conditional BKM-type result for the inhomogeneous Euler equation is obtained as a byproduct.
en.help_to_user: Provides new mathematical tools and results for analyzing the longtime behavior of two-dimensional incompressible fluid models, aiding in understanding solution properties of such models.

idea_spark.idea: Combine energy-vorticity formulation with linear transport estimates to construct a new analytical framework.
idea_spark.risk: The method may rely on specific close-to-Euler conditions, limiting its generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires extending similar analytical frameworks to broader fluid models or higher-dimensional cases.

papers.title: Embedding formulae for diffraction problems on square lattices
papers.summary: We develop embedding formulae for all possible diffraction problems with Dirichlet scatterers on square lattices using the Wiener--Hopf perspective. The embedding formula expresses solutions for arbitrary plane-wave incidence in terms of a finite set of auxiliary problems, eliminating the need to re-solve boundary value problems for each incidence angle. First we derive explicit embedding formulae for canonical geometries including the half-plane, finite strip, and right-angled wedge. We then generalize the method through an operator-based approach, obtaining embedding formula for arbitrary configurations of obstacles on lattices. This general embedding formula is a key difference from the continuous setting where this is currently not possible. To validate the theory, we perform numerical experiments, confirming agreement with the results derived using the embedding formula. The results highlight the efficiency and generality of the Wiener--Hopf approach in discrete diffraction theory, with potential applications in inverse problems and other areas of physics and mathematics.

ai.tldr: 本文为方形晶格上的狄利克雷散射体衍射问题建立了嵌入公式，利用Wiener-Hopf方法，将任意平面波入射的解表示为有限个辅助问题的组合，无需为每个入射角重新求解边值问题。
ai.motivation: 在连续介质衍射理论中，尚未能获得任意构型的通用嵌入公式。本研究旨在为离散晶格上的衍射问题建立此类通用公式，以提升计算效率并扩展理论框架。
ai.method: 首先推导了半平面、有限条带和直角楔形等典型几何的显式嵌入公式。随后通过基于算子的方法进行推广，获得了晶格上任意障碍物构型的通用嵌入公式。最后通过数值实验验证理论。
ai.result: 成功推导了适用于方形晶格上任意狄利克雷散射体构型的通用嵌入公式。数值结果与公式预测一致，验证了Wiener-Hopf方法在离散衍射理论中的高效性和普适性。
ai.help_to_user: 该研究为离散衍射问题提供了系统化的求解框架，显著减少了重复计算需求，并为反问题等应用领域提供了理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 将连续介质中难以实现的通用嵌入公式，在离散晶格体系中通过代数结构实现，是利用离散系统特殊对称性简化复杂问题的范例。
idea_spark.risk: 方法严重依赖于方形晶格的平移对称性和狄利克雷边界条件，推广至非规则晶格或混合边界条件时可能需要重大理论修正。
idea_spark.inspiration: 离散体系有时比连续体系具有更规整的代数结构，这为建立更简洁的通用理论公式提供了独特机会，可启发在其他物理系统的离散建模中寻找类似简化途径。

en.tldr: This paper develops embedding formulae for diffraction problems with Dirichlet scatterers on square lattices using the Wiener-Hopf perspective. The formula expresses solutions for arbitrary plane-wave incidence in terms of a finite set of auxiliary problems, eliminating the need to re-solve boundary value problems for each incidence angle.
en.motivation: In continuous diffraction theory, a general embedding formula for arbitrary configurations is currently not possible. This work aims to establish such universal formulae for discrete lattice diffraction problems to improve computational efficiency and extend the theoretical framework.
en.method: First, explicit embedding formulae are derived for canonical geometries including the half-plane, finite strip, and right-angled wedge. Then the method is generalized through an operator-based approach to obtain embedding formulae for arbitrary obstacle configurations on lattices. Numerical experiments validate the theory.
en.result: A general embedding formula applicable to arbitrary configurations of Dirichlet scatterers on square lattices is successfully derived. Numerical results confirm agreement with the formula's predictions, demonstrating the efficiency and generality of the Wiener-Hopf approach in discrete diffraction theory.
en.help_to_user: This research provides a systematic solution framework for discrete diffraction problems, significantly reducing repetitive computation needs and offering a theoretical foundation for applications such as inverse problems.

idea_spark.idea: Achieving a general embedding formula—difficult in continuous media—in discrete lattice systems through algebraic structures exemplifies how discrete symmetries can simplify complex problems.
idea_spark.risk: The method heavily relies on the translational symmetry of square lattices and Dirichlet boundary conditions; extension to irregular lattices or mixed boundary conditions may require significant theoretical modifications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Discrete systems sometimes possess more regular algebraic structures than continuous ones, offering unique opportunities to establish concise universal formulae. This can inspire similar simplification pathways in discrete modeling of other physical systems.

papers.title: LLM4C2Rust: Large Language Models for Automated Memory-Safe Code Transpilation
papers.summary: Memory safety has long been a critical challenge in software engineering, particularly for legacy systems written in memory-unsafe languages such as C and C++. Rust, one of the youngest modern programming languages, offers built-in memory-safety guarantees that make it a strong candidate for secure systems development. Consequently, transpiling C/C++ code into memory-safe Rust code has become a growing area of research. However, manual transpilation is often time-consuming and error-prone. Additionally, rule-based automated approaches are not as flexible or cost-effective as methods enabled by state-of-the-art AI models, techniques, and methods, such as those that deploy Large Language Models (LLMs), for example, Generative Pretrained Transformers (GPT). In this paper, we propose a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)-assisted framework that integrates an LLM with a Small Language Model (SLM) to perform C/C++-to-Rust transpilation with a focus on enhancing memory safety. The framework deploys a segmentation strategy that processes C/C++ code in balanced blocks, guiding the LLM with retrieved context from Rust documentation and compiler error references. Our experiments using three OpenAI models (GPT-4o, GPT-4-Turbo, and o3-Mini) demonstrate that the RAG-enhanced pipeline generally improves both code correctness and security for C-to-Rust code transpilation. Several Coreutils programs achieve complete elimination of Raw Pointer Dereferences (RPDs) and Unsafe Type Casts (UTCs) in the final Rust output, indicating the potential of LLM-based transpilation for advancing automated software modernization and repair, as well as memory-safe code generation.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一个结合检索增强生成（RAG）与大小语言模型的框架，用于将C/C++代码自动转换为内存安全的Rust代码，通过分段处理和上下文检索提升正确性与安全性。
ai.motivation: 手动或基于规则的C/C++到Rust转译耗时且易错，需要更灵活、高效的自动化方法以确保内存安全。
ai.method: 采用RAG辅助框架，集成LLM与SLM，将C/C++代码分段处理，并检索Rust文档和编译器错误参考作为上下文引导模型生成。
ai.result: 实验使用GPT-4o等模型表明，RAG增强流程提升了代码正确性和安全性，部分Coreutils程序完全消除了原始指针解引用和不安全类型转换。
ai.help_to_user: 为自动化代码转译和内存安全代码生成提供了基于LLM的可行框架，可应用于软件现代化与修复。

idea_spark.idea: 将编译器错误反馈与文档检索结合，动态引导LLM生成更安全的代码。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于特定LLM的性能与检索质量，可能无法处理极端复杂的代码模式。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将静态分析工具（如编译器错误）与动态检索增强结合，构建更可靠的代码生成管道。

idea_spark.idea: 将编译器错误反馈与文档检索结合，动态引导LLM生成更安全的代码。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)-assisted framework integrating LLMs with SLMs for automated C/C++-to-Rust transpilation, enhancing memory safety through segmentation and context retrieval.
en.motivation: Manual or rule-based C/C++ to Rust transpilation is time-consuming and error-prone, requiring more flexible and efficient automated methods to ensure memory safety.
en.method: A RAG-assisted framework integrates LLMs with SLMs, processes C/C++ code in balanced segments, and retrieves context from Rust documentation and compiler error references to guide generation.
en.result: Experiments with GPT-4o etc. show the RAG-enhanced pipeline improves code correctness and security, with some Coreutils programs completely eliminating Raw Pointer Dereferences and Unsafe Type Casts.
en.help_to_user: Provides a feasible LLM-based framework for automated code transpilation and memory-safe code generation, applicable to software modernization and repair.

idea_spark.idea: Combine compiler error feedback with documentation retrieval to dynamically guide LLMs toward safer code generation.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on specific LLM performance and retrieval quality; may fail on extremely complex code patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining static analysis tools (e.g., compiler errors) with dynamic retrieval augmentation to build more reliable code generation pipelines.

papers.title: On Lions' density patch problem at a critical level of regularity
papers.summary: In this article, we study Lions' density patch problem in two space dimensions at critical regularity. We prove global existence, uniqueness, and stability for a fluid occupying a bounded Lipschitz region surrounded by vacuum and evolving according to the incompressible Navier--Stokes equations, with initial velocity in $\dot{B}^0_{2,1}(\mathbb{R}^2)$. Moreover, we show that the Lipschitz regularity of the patch is preserved, and that its long-time dynamics is a rigid motion leading to the emergence of an asymptotic domain.

papers.title: Enhancing Model Based Derivative Free Optimization using Direct Search
papers.summary: We consider single and multiobjective simulation-based optimization problems. Simulation-based optimization has traditionally used both model-based and search-based methods, often in isolation. Model-based methods include trust region approaches and Bayesian optimization, while search methods include genetic algorithms and Direct Search-type techniques. In this work, we propose a switching framework that leverages Direct Search methods to enhance the performance of any model-based optimizer. Our contributions are twofold. First, in the single-objective setting, we analyze and prove the asymptotic convergence of the proposed switching approach. Second, motivated by applications in machine learning, we consider both classification and regression problems, where the objectives span accuracy, computational time, algorithmic bias, and sparsity. The models range from complex neural networks and decision trees to simpler KNN-type baselines. For machine learning in particular, we also introduce a warm-starting mechanism using weights from previous hyperparameter or architectural configurations to exploit problem structure and accelerate training. Finally, beyond ML tasks, we evaluate the method on the standard CUTEr test problems and compare its performance against classical Bayesian and trust region solvers. We observe consistently strong numerical performance, suggesting promise for the proposed switching-based approach.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合直接搜索与模型优化的切换框架，提升仿真优化性能，证明单目标收敛性，并在机器学习与标准测试集上验证有效性。
ai.motivation: 传统仿真优化中模型方法与搜索方法常孤立使用，缺乏有效结合以提升性能。
ai.method: 设计切换框架，利用直接搜索增强任意模型优化器；引入基于历史权重的热启动机制加速机器学习训练。
ai.result: 理论证明单目标渐近收敛；在分类/回归任务及CUTEr测试集上相比经典贝叶斯与信赖域求解器表现稳健。
ai.help_to_user: 为仿真优化提供通用混合框架，特别适用于机器学习超参数与架构优化，可加速训练并提升解质量。

idea_spark.idea: 将直接搜索作为模型优化器的“探索补充”，在陷入局部时切换搜索模式。
idea_spark.risk: 切换条件设计不当可能导致频繁模式切换，增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发于传统优化方法互补性，类似“集成学习”思路用于优化算法组合。

zh.tldr: 提出一种结合直接搜索与模型优化的切换框架，提升仿真优化性能，证明单目标收敛性，并在机器学习与标准测试集上验证有效性。
zh.motivation: 传统仿真优化中模型方法与搜索方法常孤立使用，缺乏有效结合以提升性能。
zh.method: 设计切换框架，利用直接搜索增强任意模型优化器；引入基于历史权重的热启动机制加速机器学习训练。
zh.result: 理论证明单目标渐近收敛；在分类/回归任务及CUTEr测试集上相比经典贝叶斯与信赖域求解器表现稳健。
zh.help_to_user: 为仿真优化提供通用混合框架，特别适用于机器学习超参数与架构优化，可加速训练并提升解质量。

idea_spark.idea: 将直接搜索作为模型优化器的“探索补充”，在陷入局部时切换搜索模式。
idea_spark.risk: 切换条件设计不当可能导致频繁模式切换，增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发于传统优化方法互补性，类似“集成学习”思路用于优化算法组合。

en.tldr: Proposes a switching framework that leverages Direct Search to enhance model-based optimizers, proves asymptotic convergence for single-objective cases, and demonstrates strong performance on ML tasks and CUTEr benchmarks.
en.motivation: Traditional simulation-based optimization often uses model-based and search-based methods in isolation, lacking effective integration to improve performance.
en.method: Designs a switching framework using Direct Search to augment any model-based optimizer; introduces warm-starting with historical weights to accelerate ML training.
en.result: Theoretically proves asymptotic convergence for single-objective setting; shows consistent numerical performance against classical Bayesian and trust region solvers on classification/regression tasks and CUTEr problems.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general hybrid framework for simulation optimization, particularly useful for ML hyperparameter and architecture optimization, accelerating training and improving solution quality.

idea_spark.idea: Use Direct Search as an 'exploration supplement' to model-based optimizers, switching search modes when stuck locally.
idea_spark.risk: Poorly designed switching conditions may cause frequent mode changes, increasing computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by complementarity of traditional optimization methods, similar to 'ensemble learning' thinking applied to algorithm combinations.

papers.title: Lyapunov Unstable Motion Bifurcating from a Circular Vortex Filament
papers.summary: This paper investigates the dynamics of closed vortex filaments in $\R^3$ governed by the Localized Induction Equation. Recently, Aiki and Higaki (2026) established the nonlinear orbital stability of circular vortex filaments under asymmetric perturbations, while identifying Lyapunov instability due to the linear growth of translation modes. Motivated by this result, we prove the existence of a family of closed solutions, which we call axial screw motions, that bifurcate from a circular filament. These solutions remain uniformly close to the orbit of the circle, but drift secularly away from the reference motion because their translation speed along the symmetry axis differs from that of the circular filament. In particular, they provide explicit non-trivial perturbations that satisfy orbital-stability estimates while failing Lyapunov stability, thereby realizing the gap between orbital stability and Lyapunov stability near the circular filament.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了局部诱导方程下闭合涡丝的运动，证明了从圆形涡丝分岔出一族称为轴向螺旋运动的闭合解，它们满足轨道稳定性估计但不满足李雅普诺夫稳定性，从而实现了两种稳定性之间的差距。
ai.motivation: Aiki和Higaki（2026）最近证明了圆形涡丝在非对称扰动下的非线性轨道稳定性，同时识别出由于平移模式的线性增长导致的李雅普诺夫不稳定性。受此启发，本研究旨在探索从圆形涡丝分岔出的新解族。
ai.method: 使用局部诱导方程作为控制方程，分析闭合涡丝的动力学。通过理论证明，构造从圆形涡丝分岔出的轴向螺旋运动解族，并分析其平移速度与参考运动的差异。
ai.result: 证明了轴向螺旋运动解族的存在性。这些解在轨道上保持接近圆形，但由于沿对称轴的平移速度不同，会逐渐漂移远离参考运动，从而在满足轨道稳定性估计的同时，实现李雅普诺夫不稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解涡丝动力学中轨道稳定性与李雅普诺夫稳定性之间的差异提供了具体数学实例，深化了对流体中涡结构稳定性的认识。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他涡几何形状（如椭圆、螺旋）是否也存在类似的分岔行为和不稳定性模式。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果需要数值模拟或实验验证，且局部诱导方程可能忽略真实流体的某些物理效应。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可能启发对超导涡旋、量子涡旋或生物纤毛阵列中类似稳定性转换的研究。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the dynamics of closed vortex filaments under the Localized Induction Equation, proving the existence of a family of closed solutions called axial screw motions that bifurcate from a circular filament, satisfying orbital stability estimates but failing Lyapunov stability, thereby realizing the gap between the two stability notions.
en.motivation: Recently, Aiki and Higaki (2026) established the nonlinear orbital stability of circular vortex filaments under asymmetric perturbations while identifying Lyapunov instability due to linear growth of translation modes. Motivated by this, the study aims to explore new solution families bifurcating from the circular filament.
en.method: Using the Localized Induction Equation as the governing model, the dynamics of closed vortex filaments are analyzed. The existence of a family of axial screw motion solutions bifurcating from the circular filament is proven theoretically, with analysis of their translation speed differences from the reference motion.
en.result: The existence of the axial screw motion solution family is proven. These solutions remain orbitally close to the circle but drift secularly away due to different translation speeds along the symmetry axis, thereby satisfying orbital stability estimates while exhibiting Lyapunov instability.
en.help_to_user: Provides concrete mathematical examples illustrating the gap between orbital and Lyapunov stability in vortex filament dynamics, deepening understanding of vortex structure stability in fluids.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether similar bifurcation behaviors and instability patterns exist for other vortex geometries (e.g., elliptical, helical).
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results require validation via numerical simulation or experiment, and the Localized Induction Equation may neglect certain physical effects in real fluids.
idea_spark.inspiration: This approach may inspire studies of similar stability transitions in superconducting vortices, quantum vortices, or biological ciliary arrays.

papers.title: Complexity Guarantees for Zeroth-order Methods via Exponentially-shifted Gaussian Smoothing: Mitigating Dimension-dependence and Incorporating Decision-dependence
papers.summary: In this paper, we consider two distinct challenges in the resolution of nonsmooth stochastic optimization. Of these, the first pertains to the pronounced dependence of dimension in Gaussian smoothing-enabled zeroth-order schemes, impeding applications to large-scale settings. Second, no unified analysis {exists} for smoothing-enabled stochastic zeroth-order methods, allowing for capturing standard and decision-dependent stochastic optimization. To contend with the first challenge, we introduce a new exponentially-shifted Gaussian smoothing {\bf esGs} estimator whose moment bounds enjoy a linear dependence on dimension (rather than a quadratic dependence as in standard Gaussian smoothing estimators). Second, we show that such an estimator can be extended in two distinct ways to address decision-dependent regimes where the underlying densities are either available in closed form or not. Notably, the resulting gradient estimators continue to display a linear dependence in dimension. We then develop an {\bf esGs}-enabled stochastic zeroth-order method applicable to nonsmooth strongly convex, convex, and {non-}convex regimes. Importantly, our guarantees provide improved dimension-dependence in iteration complexities (by a factor of problem dimension $n$) while maintaing similar oracle complexities. In addition, we also provide novel high probability guarantees and almost sure sublinear rate guarantees in convex settings, while a new subsequential almost sure convergence guarantee is provided in nonconvex regimes. Preliminary numerics support our theoretical findings show that the proposed schemes display improved computational times and more refined empirical accuracies.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种指数偏移高斯平滑（esGs）估计器，用于解决零阶方法中的维度依赖问题，并扩展至决策依赖随机优化，在非光滑凸与非凸问题中提供改进的迭代复杂度与收敛保证。
ai.motivation: 高斯平滑零阶方案存在严重的维度依赖（二次依赖），阻碍其在大规模问题中的应用；同时缺乏统一分析框架处理标准与决策依赖的随机优化问题。
ai.method: 引入指数偏移高斯平滑（esGs）估计器，其矩界具有线性维度依赖（而非标准高斯平滑的二次依赖）；将该估计器扩展至决策依赖场景（密度函数可解析或不可得）；基于esGs开发适用于非光滑强凸、凸与非凸问题的随机零阶方法。
ai.result: esGs估计器在迭代复杂度中实现维度依赖改进（降低问题维度n倍），同时保持相近的Oracle复杂度；在凸设置中提供新的高概率保证与几乎必然次线性速率保证；在非凸设置中提供新的子序列几乎必然收敛保证；初步数值实验显示计算时间改善与更精细的实证精度。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理高维非光滑随机优化提供计算效率更高的零阶方法，特别适用于决策依赖或梯度信息不可得的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将esGs思想应用于黑盒函数优化或仿真优化问题，结合自适应平滑参数调整。
idea_spark.risk: 理论分析依赖于强凸或凸性假设，在高度非凸且非光滑问题中收敛行为仍需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对随机平滑估计器的矩界进行系统性改进，可能通过非高斯分布或混合平滑策略进一步降低方差。

en.tldr: This paper introduces an exponentially-shifted Gaussian smoothing (esGs) estimator to address dimension-dependence in zeroth-order methods, extends it to decision-dependent stochastic optimization, and provides improved iteration complexity and convergence guarantees for nonsmooth convex and nonconvex problems.
en.motivation: Gaussian smoothing-enabled zeroth-order schemes suffer from pronounced dimension dependence (quadratic), hindering large-scale applications; no unified analysis exists for smoothing-enabled stochastic zeroth-order methods covering both standard and decision-dependent stochastic optimization.
en.method: Propose an exponentially-shifted Gaussian smoothing (esGs) estimator with moment bounds exhibiting linear dimension dependence (vs. quadratic in standard Gaussian smoothing); extend the estimator to decision-dependent regimes (with or without closed-form densities); develop an esGs-enabled stochastic zeroth-order method for nonsmooth strongly convex, convex, and nonconvex settings.
en.result: The esGs estimator improves dimension dependence in iteration complexities (by a factor of problem dimension n) while maintaining similar oracle complexities; novel high-probability guarantees and almost sure sublinear rate guarantees in convex settings; new subsequential almost sure convergence guarantee in nonconvex regimes; preliminary numerics show improved computational times and refined empirical accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a computationally more efficient zeroth-order method for high-dimensional nonsmooth stochastic optimization, particularly useful in decision-dependent settings or when gradient information is unavailable.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the esGs idea to black-box function optimization or simulation-based optimization problems, combined with adaptive smoothing parameter tuning.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical analysis relies on strong convexity or convexity assumptions; convergence behavior in highly nonconvex and nonsmooth problems requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematic improvement of moment bounds for stochastic smoothing estimators, possibly via non-Gaussian distributions or hybrid smoothing strategies to further reduce variance.

papers.title: $C^{\infty}$ regularity of the Alt-Phillips Functional for negative powers
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the regularity of the free boundary for minimizers of the Alt-Phillips functional with negative exponent \[\mathcal{E}_γ(u)=\int_Ω\frac{1}{2}|\nabla u|^2+\frac{1}γu^{-γ}χ_{\{u>0\}}dx,\quadγ\in(0,2).\] We proved that the free boundaries are $C^{\infty}$ at regular points.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了Alt-Phillips泛函（负指数情形）极小元的自由边界在正则点处具有C∞光滑性。
ai.motivation: 研究带负指数奇异势能的Alt-Phillips泛函极小化问题中自由边界的正则性，这是自由边界理论中的经典问题。
ai.method: 通过分析泛函的变分结构，利用椭圆正则性理论和自由边界问题的几何方法，证明正则点处的光滑性。
ai.result: 证明了当γ∈(0,2)时，自由边界在正则点处是C∞光滑的。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理带奇异势能的自由边界问题提供了正则性证明框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将C∞正则性结论推广到更一般的势函数或更高维情形。
idea_spark.risk: 非正则点（如奇点）的处理可能更复杂，需要额外分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可能启发其他带奇异项椭圆方程的自由边界研究。

en.tldr: This paper proves that the free boundaries of minimizers of the Alt-Phillips functional with negative exponent are C∞ at regular points.
en.motivation: To investigate the regularity of free boundaries for minimizers of the Alt-Phillips functional with singular negative exponent potential, a classical problem in free boundary theory.
en.method: By analyzing the variational structure of the functional, employing elliptic regularity theory and geometric methods for free boundary problems to establish smoothness at regular points.
en.result: Proved that for γ∈(0,2), the free boundary is C∞ smooth at regular points.
en.help_to_user: Provides a regularity proof framework for free boundary problems with singular potentials.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the C∞ regularity conclusion to more general potential functions or higher dimensions.
idea_spark.risk: Treatment of non-regular points (e.g., singularities) may be more complex and require additional analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: This approach may inspire free boundary research for other elliptic equations with singular terms.

papers.title: Electric inertia and ideal magnetic reconnection in 2D
papers.summary: We consider inertial magneto-hydrodynamic systems in 2D. We show global existence and uniqueness of smooth solutions and global existence and uniqueness of weak solutions in Yudovich class. We prove magnetic reconnection without magnetic resistivity, for smooth solutions and for patch solutions. This is obtained by proving merger in corresponding systems of coupled active scalars.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了二维惯性磁流体动力学系统，证明了光滑解和弱解（Yudovich类）的全局存在唯一性，并在无磁阻情况下实现了磁重联。
ai.motivation: 探索无磁阻条件下二维磁流体系统的动力学行为，特别是磁重联现象的理论可能性。
ai.method: 通过分析对应的耦合主动标量系统，证明解的全局存在唯一性，并利用合并过程实现磁重联。
ai.result: 获得了光滑解和斑块解的全局存在唯一性，并证明了无磁阻磁重联的发生。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解理想磁流体中磁重联的数学机制提供了严格的理论框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将磁重联问题转化为标量系统的合并问题，绕过直接处理电阻项。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于特定的二维设定和Yudovich类假设，向三维或更一般初值的推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在无耗散或弱耗散系统中寻找拓扑变化的新数学表征方式。

en.tldr: This paper studies 2D inertial magnetohydrodynamic systems, proving global existence and uniqueness of smooth and weak (Yudovich class) solutions, and achieving magnetic reconnection without magnetic resistivity.
en.motivation: To investigate the dynamical behavior of 2D magnetohydrodynamic systems without magnetic resistivity, particularly the theoretical possibility of magnetic reconnection.
en.method: By analyzing corresponding systems of coupled active scalars, proving global existence and uniqueness of solutions, and utilizing merger processes to achieve reconnection.
en.result: Obtained global existence and uniqueness for smooth and patch solutions, and demonstrated the occurrence of magnetic reconnection without resistivity.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous theoretical framework for understanding the mathematical mechanism of magnetic reconnection in ideal magnetohydrodynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Reformulate the magnetic reconnection problem as a merger problem in scalar systems, bypassing direct treatment of resistivity terms.
idea_spark.risk: Conclusions rely on specific 2D settings and Yudovich class assumptions; generalization to 3D or more general initial data requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires new mathematical characterizations of topological changes in dissipationless or weakly dissipative systems.

papers.title: On scattering and profile decomposition for critical nonlinear waves outside weakly trapping obstacles
papers.summary: We prove scattering for the defocusing energy-critical non-linear wave equation with Dirichlet boundary conditions outside two strictly convex obstacles in dimension three. This is the first large data scattering result for such an equation in the presence of trapped trajectories. Our result is in fact more general and can be used as a black box in other geometries. More precisely, under the assumptions that the corresponding linear wave equation satisfies global Strichartz estimates, that the domain is weakly non-trapping and that trajectories do not reconcentrate, we show linear and nonlinear profile decompositions in infinite time. This implies scattering under the rigidity assumption that the only compact-flow solution is the trivial one.

ai.motivation: 研究存在俘获轨迹的几何区域中非线性波动方程的散射行为，此前缺乏大数据散射结果。
ai.method: 在满足全局Strichartz估计、区域弱非俘获且轨迹不重新集中的假设下，建立线性和非线性剖面分解，并在刚性假设下证明散射。
ai.result: 获得了两个严格凸障碍物外能量临界非线性波动方程的大数据散射，结果可推广至其他满足假设的几何结构。

en.tldr: Proved large data scattering for the defocusing energy-critical nonlinear wave equation with Dirichlet boundary conditions outside two strictly convex obstacles in three dimensions. This is the first scattering result for such equations in the presence of trapped trajectories.
en.motivation: To investigate scattering behavior for nonlinear wave equations in geometries with trapped trajectories, where large data scattering results were previously lacking.
en.method: Established linear and nonlinear profile decompositions under assumptions of global Strichartz estimates, weakly non-trapping domain, and no trajectory reconcentration. Proved scattering under the rigidity assumption that only trivial compact-flow solutions exist.
en.result: Obtained large data scattering outside two strictly convex obstacles, with results generalizable to other geometries satisfying the assumptions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general scattering proof framework for nonlinear wave equations in geometries with trapping obstacles.

idea_spark.idea: Combine weak non-trapping assumptions with Strichartz estimates to build a universal scattering theory framework for nonlinear wave equations.
idea_spark.risk: The approach heavily relies on geometric assumptions and may fail under strong trapping or complex boundary conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires investigation of scattering for different boundary conditions or nonlinearities in similar geometric settings.

papers.title: Adaptive Regularization within Trust Region Methods for Stochastic Nonconvex Optimization
papers.summary: We propose a stochastic nonconvex optimization algorithm that achieves almost sure $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-1.5})$ iteration complexity for problems with smooth objective functions and gradients only observable with noise. The mean-zero stochastic noise is decision-dependent and has unbounded support with subexponential tail, allowing our framework to cover a broad class of problems. The improved almost sure iteration complexity is achieved with a new variant of the adaptive sampling trust-region optimization (ASTRO) augmented with an adaptively regularized local model, which we term Reg-ASTRO. Adaptive sampling ensures that the estimation precision is aligned with a measure of stationarity, so that iterates closer to stationarity trigger higher accuracy requirement for sampling. A key analytical challenge arises because the trust-region radius and regularization are coupled and not determined prior to gradient estimation at each iteration. We further establish an almost sure $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-4.5})$ sample complexity for Reg-ASTRO, which improves to $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-3.5})$ under stronger regularity conditions and use of common random numbers, substantially outperforming first-order methods in theory and numerical experiments.

papers.title: RelativeFlow: Taming Medical Image Denoising Learning with Noisy Reference
papers.summary: Medical image denoising (MID) lacks absolutely clean images for supervision, leading to a noisy reference problem that fundamentally limits denoising performance. Existing simulated-supervised discriminative learning (SimSDL) and simulated-supervised generative learning (SimSGL) treat noisy references as clean targets, causing suboptimal convergence or reference-biased learning, while self-supervised learning (SSL) imposes restrictive noise assumptions that are seldom satisfied in realistic MID scenarios. We propose \textbf{RelativeFlow}, a flow matching framework that learns from heterogeneous noisy references and drives inputs from arbitrary quality levels toward a unified high-quality target. RelativeFlow reformulates flow matching by decomposing the absolute noise-to-clean mapping into relative noisier-to-noisy mappings, and realizes this formulation through two key components: 1) consistent transport (CoT), a displacement map that constrains relative flows to be components of and progressively compose a unified absolute flow, and 2) simulation-based velocity field (SVF), which constructs a learnable velocity field using modality-specific degradation operators to support different medical imaging modalities. Extensive experiments on Computed Tomography (CT) and Magnetic Resonance (MR) denoising demonstrate that RelativeFlow significantly outperforms existing methods, taming MID with noisy references.

ai.tldr: RelativeFlow 是一种流匹配框架，通过将绝对噪声到干净的映射分解为相对更噪声到噪声的映射，利用异构噪声参考学习，将任意质量的输入推向统一的高质量目标，显著优于现有医学图像去噪方法。
ai.motivation: 医学图像去噪缺乏绝对干净的监督图像，导致噪声参考问题，现有模拟监督判别学习、模拟监督生成学习和自监督学习方法存在收敛次优、参考偏差或噪声假设限制等问题。
ai.method: 提出 RelativeFlow 框架，包含两个关键组件：1) 一致传输，约束相对流作为统一绝对流的组成部分并逐步组合；2) 基于模拟的速度场，使用模态特定的退化算子构建可学习的速度场以支持不同医学成像模态。
ai.result: 在 CT 和 MR 去噪上的大量实验表明，RelativeFlow 显著优于现有方法，成功利用噪声参考进行医学图像去噪。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需绝对干净参考的医学图像去噪新框架，可处理现实中的噪声参考问题，提升去噪性能。

idea_spark.idea: 利用异构噪声参考，通过流匹配学习从任意质量到高质量目标的统一映射。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于模态特定的退化算子模拟，可能对未知或复杂退化模式泛化能力有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将流匹配与相对学习结合，解决其他医学图像处理中的监督信号缺失问题。

en.tldr: RelativeFlow is a flow matching framework that decomposes absolute noise-to-clean mapping into relative noisier-to-noisy mappings, learns from heterogeneous noisy references, and drives inputs from arbitrary quality levels toward a unified high-quality target, significantly outperforming existing medical image denoising methods.
en.motivation: Medical image denoising lacks absolutely clean images for supervision, leading to a noisy reference problem. Existing simulated-supervised discriminative learning, simulated-supervised generative learning, and self-supervised learning suffer from suboptimal convergence, reference bias, or restrictive noise assumptions.
en.method: Proposes the RelativeFlow framework with two key components: 1) consistent transport, which constrains relative flows to be components of and progressively compose a unified absolute flow; 2) simulation-based velocity field, which constructs a learnable velocity field using modality-specific degradation operators to support different medical imaging modalities.
en.result: Extensive experiments on CT and MR denoising demonstrate that RelativeFlow significantly outperforms existing methods, successfully taming medical image denoising with noisy references.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new framework for medical image denoising without requiring absolutely clean references, capable of handling real-world noisy reference problems and improving denoising performance.

idea_spark.idea: Utilize heterogeneous noisy references to learn a unified mapping from arbitrary quality to high-quality targets through flow matching.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on modality-specific degradation operator simulation, which may limit generalization to unknown or complex degradation patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining flow matching with relative learning to address supervision signal absence in other medical image processing tasks.

papers.title: CTSCAN: Evaluation Leakage in Chest CT Segmentation and a Reproducible Patient-Disjoint Benchmark
papers.summary: Reported chest CT segmentation performance can be strongly inflated when train and test partitions mix slices from the same study. We present CTSCAN, a reproducible multi-source chest CT benchmark and research stack designed to measure what survives under patient-disjoint evaluation. The current four-class artifact aggregates 89 cases from PleThora, MedSeg SIRM, and LongCIU, and we show that the original slice-PNG workflow induces near-complete case reuse across train, validation, and test. Using the playground environment, we run a multi-seed protocol sweep with the same FPN plus EfficientNet-B0 control configuration under slice-mixed and case-disjoint evaluation. Across 3 seeds and 12 epochs per seed, the slice-mixed protocol reaches 0.6665 foreground Dice and 0.5031 foreground IoU, whereas the case-disjoint protocol reaches 0.2066 Dice and 0.1181 IoU. Removing patient reuse therefore reduces foreground Dice by 0.4599 absolute (69.00% relative) and foreground IoU by 0.3850 absolute (76.52% relative). CTSCAN packages the corrected benchmark with deterministic split manifests, explicit weak-supervision controls, a scripted multi-seed protocol sweep, and reproducible figure generation, providing a reusable basis for patient-disjoint chest CT evaluation.

ai.tldr: CTSCAN是一个可复现的多源胸部CT分割基准，揭示了训练测试集混合同一患者切片会导致性能严重虚高，并提供了患者不重叠的评估方案。
ai.motivation: 现有胸部CT分割研究中，训练集和测试集常混合来自同一病例的切片，导致报告的性能指标被严重夸大，缺乏真实反映模型泛化能力的患者不重叠评估基准。
ai.method: 构建CTSCAN基准，整合来自三个公开数据集的89个病例。通过确定性划分清单确保患者不重叠。使用相同的FPN+EfficientNet-B0配置，在切片混合与病例不重叠两种评估协议下进行多轮种子实验对比。
ai.result: 切片混合协议达到0.6665前景Dice和0.5031前景IoU，而病例不重叠协议仅达到0.2066 Dice和0.1181 IoU。去除患者重用使前景Dice绝对下降0.4599（相对下降69.00%），前景IoU绝对下降0.3850（相对下降76.52%）。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一个标准化的患者不重叠评估框架，包含确定性数据划分、弱监督控制、多种子协议扫描和可复现图表生成工具，帮助研究者进行更可靠的模型性能评估。

idea_spark.idea: 为其他医学影像模态（如MRI、X光）构建类似的标准化患者不重叠基准，并开发自动检测数据划分泄露的工具。
idea_spark.risk: 现有大量研究结果可能因评估泄露而不可靠，重新评估这些工作将耗费大量资源，且部分原始数据可能无法获取以进行正确划分。
idea_spark.inspiration: 评估协议的设计对性能结果有决定性影响，在构建新基准时，应优先考虑临床相关的数据划分策略（如患者中心、机构中心），而不仅是随机划分。

en.tldr: CTSCAN is a reproducible multi-source chest CT segmentation benchmark that reveals severe performance inflation when train/test sets mix slices from the same patient, and provides a patient-disjoint evaluation framework.
en.motivation: Current chest CT segmentation studies often mix slices from the same case across train and test partitions, leading to heavily inflated reported performance and lacking a patient-disjoint benchmark that truly reflects model generalization.
en.method: Construct the CTSCAN benchmark by aggregating 89 cases from three public datasets. Ensure patient-disjoint splits via deterministic manifests. Compare slice-mixed versus case-disjoint evaluation protocols using the same FPN+EfficientNet-B0 configuration with multi-seed experimental sweeps.
en.result: The slice-mixed protocol achieves 0.6665 foreground Dice and 0.5031 foreground IoU, while the case-disjoint protocol only reaches 0.2066 Dice and 0.1181 IoU. Removing patient reuse reduces foreground Dice by 0.4599 absolute (69.00% relative) and foreground IoU by 0.3850 absolute (76.52% relative).
en.help_to_user: Provides a standardized patient-disjoint evaluation framework including deterministic data splits, explicit weak-supervision controls, scripted multi-seed protocol sweeps, and reproducible figure generation tools for more reliable model assessment.

idea_spark.idea: Build similar standardized patient-disjoint benchmarks for other medical imaging modalities (e.g., MRI, X-ray) and develop tools for automatic detection of data split leakage.
idea_spark.risk: Many existing study results may be unreliable due to evaluation leakage. Re-evaluating these works would require substantial resources, and some original data may not be available for proper splitting.
idea_spark.inspiration: Evaluation protocol design has a decisive impact on performance outcomes. When constructing new benchmarks, prioritize clinically relevant splitting strategies (e.g., patient-centric, institution-centric) rather than just random splits.

papers.title: Instability of the ray-monotone selector for $W_1$-optimal transport
papers.summary: For the distance cost $c(x,y)=|x-y|$, the set $O(μ,ν)$ of $W_1$-optimal plans is generally not a singleton. Under the classical absolute-continuity hypotheses in the Euclidean case, secondary variational selection by the quadratic energy $C_2$ yields the ray-monotone $W_1$-optimal plan. We provide a counterexample to an open problem posed by Santambrogio that concerns the stability of this selector under weak convergence of the marginals. More precisely, we construct a fixed absolutely continuous source $μ$ and absolutely continuous targets $ν_n\rightharpoonupν$ such that $γ^{\mathrm{sel}}(μ,ν_n)\rightharpoonupγ^{\mathrm{hom}}$, where $γ^{\mathrm{hom}}\in O(μ,ν)$ but $γ^{\mathrm{hom}}\neqγ^{\mathrm{sel}}(μ,ν)$. We also identify the narrow Kuratowski limit of the optimal-plan sets $O(μ,ν_n)$, derive the constrained $Γ$-limit for secondary energies of the form $\int Φ(|x-y|)\,dγ$ with $Φ\in C([0,2])$, and deduce a non-commutation result for the additive perturbation $c_\varepsilon(x,y)=|x-y|+\varepsilon|x-y|^2$.

ai.tldr: 针对一维距离成本的最优输运问题，本文构造了一个反例，证明了射线单调选择器在边缘测度弱收敛下不稳定。
ai.motivation: 在绝对连续假设下，通过二次能量进行二次变分选择可得到射线单调的W1最优输运方案。Santambrogio提出的一个开放问题是该选择器在边缘测度弱收敛下是否稳定。
ai.method: 构造一个固定的绝对连续源测度μ和一系列绝对连续目标测度νn弱收敛于ν，证明射线单调选择器γsel(μ,νn)弱收敛于某个γhom，但γhom不等于γsel(μ,ν)。
ai.result: 成功构造了反例，证明了选择器的不稳定性；同时推导了最优输运方案集的窄Kuratowski极限，得到了二次能量形式的约束Γ-极限，并推导了加性扰动下的非交换结果。
ai.help_to_user: 本文为最优输运理论中的选择器稳定性问题提供了关键反例，揭示了变分选择方法在极限情况下的失效机制。

idea_spark.idea: 研究不同正则化项（如p次幂能量）对选择器稳定性的影响，或探索在更一般的测度空间中的类似现象。
idea_spark.risk: 反例构造依赖于特定的一维设置，在更高维度或更一般的成本函数下结论可能不同。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对最优输运方案选择机制的系统研究，特别是在数值计算中如何保证离散逼近的稳定性。

en.tldr: For 1D optimal transport with distance cost, this paper constructs a counterexample demonstrating the instability of the ray-monotone selector under weak convergence of marginals.
en.motivation: Under absolute continuity hypotheses, secondary variational selection via quadratic energy yields the ray-monotone W1-optimal plan. An open problem posed by Santambrogio concerns the stability of this selector under weak convergence of marginals.
en.method: Construct a fixed absolutely continuous source measure μ and absolutely continuous target measures νn weakly converging to ν, proving that the ray-monotone selector γsel(μ,νn) weakly converges to some γhom, but γhom ≠ γsel(μ,ν).
en.result: Successfully constructed a counterexample proving selector instability; derived the narrow Kuratowski limit of optimal-plan sets, obtained the constrained Γ-limit for secondary energies, and deduced a non-commutation result for additive perturbations.
en.help_to_user: This paper provides a crucial counterexample to selector stability in optimal transport theory, revealing failure mechanisms of variational selection methods in limiting cases.

idea_spark.idea: Investigate how different regularization terms (e.g., p-power energies) affect selector stability, or explore similar phenomena in more general measure spaces.
idea_spark.risk: The counterexample construction relies on specific 1D settings; conclusions may differ in higher dimensions or with more general cost functions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematic study of selection mechanisms in optimal transport, particularly regarding stability guarantees for discrete approximations in numerical computations.

papers.title: Threshold Scattering for the Energy-Critical NLS with a Repulsive Inverse Square Potential
papers.summary: We study the threshold scattering problem for the energy-critical nonlinear Schrödinger equation with a repulsive inverse-square potential $\frac{a}{|x|^2} > 0$ in dimensions $d= 4, 5, 6$. On the energy level surface determined by the ground state of the energy-critical NLS without potential, we show that, despite the absence of a ground state in this setting, a strong form of rigidity persists below the kinetic threshold. Specifically, we prove that any solution on this energy surface with kinetic energy strictly below that of the ground state is global and scatters to zero. Our approach combines refined modulation analysis, a center-translated global Virial estimate, and a bootstrap argument to control the modulation parameters.

ai.tldr: 研究带排斥性反平方势能（a/|x|²>0）的能量临界非线性薛定谔方程在4、5、6维下的阈值散射问题。证明在无势能基态确定的能量曲面上，即使不存在基态，动能严格低于基态动能的解是全局存在且散射到零的。
ai.motivation: 带反平方势能的能量临界NLS的散射行为尚不明确，特别是在阈值能量附近。本文旨在探究在排斥势能下，即使系统缺乏基态，是否仍存在某种刚性散射结构。
ai.method: 结合精细的调制分析、中心平移的全局Virial估计和自举论证，以控制调制参数并证明解的全局存在性与散射性。
ai.result: 在无势能基态确定的能量曲面上，任何动能严格低于基态动能的解都是全局存在且散射到零的，表明在动能阈值以下存在强刚性。
ai.help_to_user: 为带奇异势能的能量临界非线性色散方程的阈值散射理论提供了严格数学框架，扩展了无势能情形下的经典结果。

idea_spark.idea: 在缺乏基态的能量曲面上，通过动能阈值作为判别条件，建立解的全局存在性与散射性。
idea_spark.risk: 方法严重依赖于势能的排斥性和空间维度的特定范围（4-6维），推广到其他维度或吸引势能可能需要全新工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索类似方法在带电磁势或非齐次非线性项的NLS中的应用，或研究阈值能量恰好等于基态动能时的动力学行为。

en.tldr: Studies threshold scattering for the energy-critical nonlinear Schrödinger equation with a repulsive inverse-square potential (a/|x|²>0) in dimensions 4, 5, 6. Proves that on the energy surface determined by the ground state of the potential-free case, any solution with kinetic energy strictly below that of the ground state is global and scatters to zero, despite the absence of a ground state in this setting.
en.motivation: The scattering behavior of energy-critical NLS with an inverse-square potential, especially near threshold energy, is not fully understood. This work investigates whether a rigid scattering structure persists even in the absence of a ground state under a repulsive potential.
en.method: Combines refined modulation analysis, a center-translated global Virial estimate, and a bootstrap argument to control modulation parameters and prove global existence and scattering.
en.result: On the energy surface determined by the potential-free ground state, any solution with kinetic energy strictly below that of the ground state is global and scatters to zero, demonstrating strong rigidity below the kinetic threshold.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for threshold scattering theory of energy-critical dispersive equations with singular potentials, extending classical results from the potential-free case.

idea_spark.idea: Using the kinetic energy threshold as a criterion to establish global existence and scattering on energy surfaces lacking a ground state.
idea_spark.risk: The approach heavily relies on the repulsive nature of the potential and the specific dimension range (4–6); extension to other dimensions or attractive potentials may require entirely new tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore applying similar methods to NLS with electromagnetic potentials or inhomogeneous nonlinearities, or study dynamics when the threshold energy equals the ground state kinetic energy.

papers.title: Aletheia: Gradient-Guided Layer Selection for Efficient LoRA Fine-Tuning Across Architectures
papers.summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become the dominant parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for large language models, yet standard practice applies LoRA adapters uniformly to all transformer layers regardless of their relevance to the downstream task. We introduce Aletheia, a gradient-guided layer selection method that identifies the most task-relevant layers via a lightweight gradient probe and applies LoRA adapters only to those layers with asymmetric rank allocation. Across 81 experiment rows covering 14 successful models from 8 architecture families (0.5B-72B parameters, including dense and Mixture-of-Experts architectures), with one additional documented failed Pythia/GPT-NeoX attempt in Campaign 2, Aletheia achieves a 15-28% training speedup (mean 23.1%, p < 0.001) with bounded extra forgetting and broadly matched downstream behavior on the evaluated MMLU, GSM8K, and HumanEval benchmark pack. Across the tested families and scales, Campaign 1 shows a 100% per-model speed win rate and Campaign 2 shows broadly preserved downstream behavior within a bounded-degradation framing. Together these results support a practical model-economics claim: intelligent layer selection can make LoRA fine-tuning materially more efficient without introducing major downstream damage on the evaluated set.

ai.tldr: Aletheia是一种基于梯度指导的层选择方法，通过轻量级梯度探测识别任务相关层，仅在这些层应用LoRA适配器并进行非对称秩分配，实现高效微调。
ai.motivation: 标准LoRA微调在所有Transformer层均匀应用适配器，忽略了不同层对下游任务的相关性差异，导致计算资源浪费。
ai.method: 使用轻量级梯度探测识别任务最相关层，仅在这些选定层应用LoRA适配器，并采用非对称秩分配策略。
ai.result: 在14个模型（0.5B-72B参数）的81个实验行中，平均获得23.1%的训练加速，下游任务性能在有限退化范围内基本保持。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种智能层选择方法，可在不显著损害下游性能的前提下，显著提升LoRA微调效率。

idea_spark.idea: 基于任务相关性的动态适配器分配策略
idea_spark.risk: 层选择可能对某些特定任务或架构产生未预见的性能影响
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发针对不同模型组件的重要性感知微调策略研究

en.tldr: Aletheia is a gradient-guided layer selection method that identifies task-relevant layers via lightweight gradient probing and applies LoRA adapters only to those layers with asymmetric rank allocation for efficient fine-tuning.
en.motivation: Standard LoRA fine-tuning applies adapters uniformly to all transformer layers regardless of their relevance to downstream tasks, leading to computational inefficiency.

idea_spark.risk: Layer selection may have unforeseen performance impacts on certain tasks or architectures
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires research on importance-aware fine-tuning strategies for different model components

papers.title: Self-Supervised Angular Deblurring in Photoacoustic Reconstruction via Noisier2Inverse
papers.summary: Photoacoustic tomography (PAT) is an emerging imaging modality that combines the complementary strengths of optical contrast and ultrasonic resolution. A central task is image reconstruction, where measured acoustic signals are used to recover the initial pressure distribution. For ideal point-like or line-like detectors, several efficient and fast reconstruction algorithms exist, including Fourier methods, filtered backprojection, and time reversal. However, when applied to data acquired with finite-size detectors, these methods yield systematically blurred images. Although sharper images can be obtained by compensating for finite-detector effects, supervised learning approaches typically require ground-truth images that may not be available in practice. We propose a self-supervised reconstruction method based on Noisier2Inverse that addresses finite-size detector effects without requiring ground-truth data. Our approach operates directly on noisy measurements and learns to recover high-quality PAT images in a ground-truth-free manner. Its key components are: (i) PAT-specific modeling that recasts the problem as angular deblurring; (ii) a Noisier2Inverse formulation in the polar domain that leverages the known angular point-spread function; and (iii) a novel, statistically grounded early-stopping rule. In experiments, the proposed method consistently outperforms alternative approaches that do not use supervised data and achieves performance close to supervised benchmarks, while remaining practical for real acquisitions with finite-size detectors.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于Noisier2Inverse的自监督角度去模糊方法，用于解决光声断层扫描中有限尺寸探测器导致的图像模糊问题，无需真实标签数据。
ai.motivation: 传统光声断层扫描重建算法应用于有限尺寸探测器数据时会产生系统性模糊，而监督学习方法需要难以获取的真实标签图像。
ai.method: 将问题建模为角度去模糊，在极坐标域应用Noisier2Inverse框架，利用已知角度点扩散函数，并引入基于统计的早停准则。
ai.result: 方法在无监督方法中表现最佳，性能接近监督基准，适用于实际有限尺寸探测器采集场景。
ai.help_to_user: 为光声成像提供了一种无需真实标签的自监督重建方案，有效缓解探测器尺寸效应导致的模糊。

idea_spark.idea: 在极坐标域利用已知系统模糊核进行自监督去模糊学习
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于准确的系统点扩散函数建模，在复杂噪声或模型失配情况下性能可能下降

en.tldr: Proposes a self-supervised angular deblurring method based on Noisier2Inverse for photoacoustic tomography, addressing finite-detector blur without ground-truth data.
en.motivation: Conventional PAT reconstruction algorithms yield systematic blur when applied to finite-size detector data, while supervised approaches require often unavailable ground-truth images.
en.method: Models the problem as angular deblurring, applies Noisier2Inverse in the polar domain leveraging the known angular point-spread function, and introduces a statistically grounded early-stopping rule.
en.result: Consistently outperforms alternative unsupervised approaches and achieves performance close to supervised benchmarks, remaining practical for real acquisitions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a ground-truth-free self-supervised reconstruction solution for PAT that effectively mitigates finite-detector blurring effects.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage known system blur kernel in polar domain for self-supervised deblurring learning
idea_spark.risk: Performance may degrade under complex noise or model mismatch, relying on accurate system PSF modeling
idea_spark.inspiration: Embedding imaging system physical priors (e.g., angular blur characteristics) into self-supervised frameworks could generalize to other modalities with known degradation models

papers.title: Local CFTs extremise $F$
papers.summary: Many CFTs can be extended to lines of nonlocal CFTs parametrised by the scaling dimension $Δ$ of the fundamental field appearing in the action. $Δ=\frac{d}{2}-ζ$ is set by the exponent of the kinetic term $(-\partial^2)^ζ$, which is nonlocal for noninteger $ζ$. If $Δ$ is tuned to $Δ_\mathrm{local}$, the scaling dimension of the fundamental field in the local CFT, arXiv:1703.05325 showed that we recover the conformal data of that CFT (plus a decoupled sector). One natural question is: how is the local point special on this line of nonlocal CFTs? We prove that these local CFTs lie at the extrema of the (universal part of the) sphere free energy $\tilde{F}(Δ)=\sin(\frac{πd}{2}) \log Z_{S^d}$ of the long-range CFTs: $d\tilde{F}/dΔ|_{Δ=Δ_\mathrm{local}}=0$; and for unitary CFTs they locally maximise it. The simple proof uses the fact that the derivative of $\tilde{F}$ with respect to $Δ$ receives contributions only from the nonlocal terms in the action. The nonlocal terms must be absent in the limit $Δ\to Δ_\mathrm{local}$, and hence the derivative is zero. Demonstrating maximisation then requires a proof of the generalised $F$-theorem in conformal perturbation theory to subleading order. We check our result with the O$(N)$ $φ^4$ and cubic CFTs in the $ε$ expansion and the large-$N$ limit. This result provides a minimal encoding of the scaling dimension of the fundamental field in many CFTs, and also explains the curious derivative structure of the large-$N$ expansion of $Δ_φ$ in the O$(N)$ model. Finally, this nonlocal $F$-extremisation can be viewed as a non-supersymmetric version of the known $c,F,a$-extremisation mechanisms.

ai.tldr: 本文证明，在非局域共形场论（CFT）的参数线上，局域CFT对应于点处球面自由能F̃的极值点，且在幺正CFT中为局部极大值。
ai.motivation: 许多CFT可扩展为以基本场标度维度Δ为参数的非局域CFT线。当Δ调整至局域CFT的基本场标度维度Δ_local时，可恢复该局域CFT的共形数据。一个自然的问题是：在这一非局域CFT线上，局域点有何特殊之处？
ai.method: 证明基于F̃对Δ的导数仅来自作用量中的非局域项。在Δ→Δ_local极限下，非局域项必须消失，因此导数为零。为证明极大值，需在共形微扰理论中证明广义F定理至次领头阶。
ai.result: 局域CFT位于非局域CFT球面自由能F̃(Δ)的极值点：dF̃/dΔ|_{Δ=Δ_local}=0；对于幺正CFT，它们局部极大化F̃。结果在O(N) φ⁴和立方CFT的ε展开及大N极限中得到验证。
ai.help_to_user: 该结果为许多CFT中基本场标度维度提供了最小编码，并解释了O(N)模型中Δ_φ大N展开的奇特导数结构。

idea_spark.idea: 利用自由能对非局域参数的导数结构来定位局域理论点。
idea_spark.risk: 证明依赖于广义F定理在次领头阶的成立，需严格验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 非局域F极值化可视为已知c,F,a极值化机制的非超对称版本。

en.tldr: This paper proves that on a line of nonlocal conformal field theories (CFTs), the local CFTs lie at extrema of the sphere free energy F̃, and for unitary CFTs they locally maximize it.
en.motivation: Many CFTs can be extended to lines of nonlocal CFTs parametrized by the scaling dimension Δ of the fundamental field. When Δ is tuned to Δ_local (the scaling dimension in the local CFT), the conformal data of that local CFT is recovered. A natural question is: how is the local point special on this line of nonlocal CFTs?

In the limit Δ→Δ_local, nonlocal terms must vanish, so the derivative is zero. Demonstrating maximization requires proving the generalized F-theorem in conformal perturbation theory to subleading order.

idea_spark.risk: The proof relies on the validity of the generalized F-theorem to subleading order, which requires rigorous verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: This nonlocal F-extremization can be viewed as a non-supersymmetric version of known c, F, a extremization mechanisms.

papers.title: On Continuous Data Assimilation for a class of 2D and 3D stochastic non-Newtonian fluids of differential type
papers.summary: Continuous data assimilation (CDA) techniques, most notably the nudging approach proposed by Azouani, Olson, and Titi (AOT), have been shown to be very successful in deterministic frameworks for achieving long-time synchronization between an approximate state and true state. In this note, we develop and study a CDA scheme for a class of stochastic non-Newtonian fluids, namely third-grade fluids, subject to either additive or multiplicative Gaussian stochastic forcing in both two- and three-dimensional settings. We establish sufficient criteria on the nudging gain and the observational mesh size that guarantee convergence of the assimilated state toward the underlying stochastic solution. Convergence is proved in the mean-square sense, and, in the case of additive noise, we further obtain almost sure (pathwise) convergence.

ai.tldr: 本文针对二维和三维随机非牛顿流体（三阶流体），在加性或乘性高斯随机强迫下，开发并研究了一种连续数据同化方案。
ai.motivation: 连续数据同化（CDA）技术，特别是AOT提出的nudging方法，在确定性框架中已证明能有效实现近似状态与真实状态的长期同步。本研究旨在将其扩展到随机非牛顿流体领域。
ai.method: 针对受加性或乘性高斯随机强迫的二维和三维三阶流体，建立了一个CDA方案。分析了nudging增益和观测网格尺寸的充分条件。
ai.result: 证明了同化状态向底层随机解收敛的充分条件。在均方意义下证明了收敛性，对于加性噪声情况，进一步获得了几乎必然（路径）收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机非牛顿流体模型的数据同化提供了理论框架和收敛性保证。

idea_spark.idea: 研究随机强迫下非牛顿流体数据同化的收敛条件，将收敛性分析从均方推广到路径层面。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于特定的流体模型（三阶流体）和噪声假设（高斯），推广到更一般的模型或噪声类型可能需要额外分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法或可启发其他复杂随机动力系统（如随机反应扩散方程、随机磁流体力学）的数据同化方案设计。

zh.tldr: 本文针对二维和三维随机非牛顿流体（三阶流体），在加性或乘性高斯随机强迫下，开发并研究了一种连续数据同化方案。
zh.motivation: 连续数据同化（CDA）技术，特别是AOT提出的nudging方法，在确定性框架中已证明能有效实现近似状态与真实状态的长期同步。本研究旨在将其扩展到随机非牛顿流体领域。
zh.method: 针对受加性或乘性高斯随机强迫的二维和三维三阶流体，建立了一个CDA方案。分析了nudging增益和观测网格尺寸的充分条件。
zh.result: 证明了同化状态向底层随机解收敛的充分条件。在均方意义下证明了收敛性，对于加性噪声情况，进一步获得了几乎必然（路径）收敛。
zh.help_to_user: 为随机非牛顿流体模型的数据同化提供了理论框架和收敛性保证。

idea_spark.idea: 研究随机强迫下非牛顿流体数据同化的收敛条件，将收敛性分析从均方推广到路径层面。

en.tldr: This work develops and studies a continuous data assimilation scheme for a class of 2D and 3D stochastic non-Newtonian fluids (third-grade fluids) subject to additive or multiplicative Gaussian stochastic forcing.
en.motivation: Continuous data assimilation techniques, notably the nudging approach, have been successful in deterministic frameworks for long-time synchronization. This study aims to extend them to stochastic non-Newtonian fluids.
en.method: A CDA scheme is established for 2D/3D third-grade fluids with additive/multiplicative Gaussian stochastic forcing. Sufficient criteria on the nudging gain and observational mesh size are analyzed.
en.result: Sufficient conditions guaranteeing convergence of the assimilated state toward the true stochastic solution are established. Convergence is proved in the mean-square sense, with almost sure (pathwise) convergence further obtained for additive noise.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and convergence guarantees for data assimilation in stochastic non-Newtonian fluid models.

idea_spark.idea: Investigating convergence conditions for data assimilation of non-Newtonian fluids under stochastic forcing, advancing convergence analysis from mean-square to pathwise.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on a specific fluid model (third-grade) and noise assumptions (Gaussian); generalization to broader models or noise types may require additional analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach may inspire data assimilation scheme design for other complex stochastic dynamical systems, such as stochastic reaction-diffusion equations or stochastic magnetohydrodynamics.

papers.title: A bi-level priority sorting framework for flexible AGV service scheduling in smart warehouses
papers.summary: This paper proposes a bi-level optimization framework to coordinate Automated Guided Vehicle (AGV) flexible operations in smart independent warehouses, addressing the critical challenge of balancing high-throughput order fulfillment with stringent cost control. The framework is designed to simultaneously optimize flexible customer service level, system cost, and operational efficiency. The first level dynamically adjusts real-time scheduling parameters, such as order commitment times and delay tolerance, based on predefined customer priority categories. The second level performs real-time routing optimization for each AGV by identifying the shortest feasible paths while avoiding conflicts. For complex multi-capacity package picking tasks, two heuristic rules, priority, deadline, with shortest path (PDSP) and delay cost with shortest path (DCSP), are applied to multi-capacity package picking tasks and further training is carried out using the reinforcement learning algorithm of A* guided deep Q-learning (AGDQN). Comprehensive simulation experiments, conducted across diverse warehouse layouts and order demand patterns, demonstrate that the proposed framework equipped with both heuristic rules consistently reduces average order delay and total system costs by over 50% during peak demand periods. This is achieved while maintaining a service level above 90% and maximizing AGV utilization. The method also exhibits superior flexibility and sustained efficiency under normal and fluctuating demand scenarios. Additional ablation studies confirm that the proposed priority sorting mechanism delivers robust performance advantages when tested with various other reinforcement learning baselines.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种双层优先级排序框架，用于智能仓库中自动导引车（AGV）的柔性服务调度，通过动态调整调度参数和实时路径优化，在高峰需求期间将平均订单延迟和总系统成本降低50%以上，同时保持90%以上的服务水平。
ai.motivation: 智能独立仓库需要在高吞吐量订单履行与严格成本控制之间取得平衡，现有AGV调度方法在复杂多容量拣选任务和动态需求下效率不足。
ai.method: 框架包含两层：第一层根据客户优先级动态调整实时调度参数（如订单承诺时间和延迟容忍度）；第二层为每辆AGV执行实时路径优化，寻找最短可行路径并避免冲突。针对多容量包裹拣选任务，应用PDSP和DCSP两种启发式规则，并使用A*引导深度Q学习（AGDQN）算法进行训练。
ai.result: 在不同仓库布局和订单需求模式下的仿真实验表明，该框架在高峰需求期间平均订单延迟和总系统成本降低超过50%，服务水平保持在90%以上，AGV利用率最大化，且在正常和波动需求场景下均表现出优异的灵活性和持续效率。
ai.help_to_user: 为仓库运营者提供了一种可协调AGV柔性操作、平衡服务水平和成本的优化框架，其启发式规则和强化学习方法可直接应用于实际调度系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将客户优先级转化为动态调度参数，使系统能在高负载时自动调整服务策略，而非固定规则。
idea_spark.risk: 实际部署需考虑传感器精度、通信延迟和AGV故障等现实约束，仿真中的性能提升可能在实际环境中打折扣。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发式规则与强化学习的结合模式可启发其他组合优化问题；A*引导的深度Q学习为路径规划与决策学习的融合提供了新思路。
