en.tldr: This paper proposes a bi-level priority sorting framework for flexible AGV service scheduling in smart warehouses, which reduces average order delay and total system costs by over 50% during peak demand while maintaining a service level above 90%, through dynamic scheduling parameter adjustment and real-time routing optimization.
en.motivation: Smart independent warehouses face the critical challenge of balancing high-throughput order fulfillment with stringent cost control, and existing AGV scheduling methods lack efficiency in complex multi-capacity picking tasks under dynamic demand.
en.method: The framework consists of two levels: the first dynamically adjusts real-time scheduling parameters (e.g., order commitment times and delay tolerance) based on predefined customer priority categories; the second performs real-time routing optimization for each AGV by identifying the shortest feasible paths while avoiding conflicts. For multi-capacity package picking tasks, two heuristic rules (PDSP and DCSP) are applied and further trained using the A*-guided deep Q-learning (AGDQN) algorithm.
en.result: Comprehensive simulation experiments across diverse warehouse layouts and order demand patterns show that the framework reduces average order delay and total system costs by over 50% during peak demand, maintains a service level above 90%, maximizes AGV utilization, and exhibits superior flexibility and sustained efficiency under normal and fluctuating demand scenarios.
en.help_to_user: Provides warehouse operators with an optimization framework that coordinates flexible AGV operations to balance service level and cost, with heuristic rules and reinforcement learning methods directly applicable to real-world scheduling systems.

idea_spark.idea: Translating customer priorities into dynamic scheduling parameters allows the system to automatically adjust service policies under high load, rather than relying on fixed rules.
idea_spark.risk: Real-world deployment must account for practical constraints like sensor accuracy, communication latency, and AGV failures, which may reduce the performance gains observed in simulation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The combination of heuristic rules and reinforcement learning can inspire other combinatorial optimization problems; A*-guided deep Q-learning offers a novel approach to integrating path planning with decision learning.

papers.title: Stability of Partitions Induced by Nearest-Center Assignment Under Perturbations
papers.summary: We study clustering through the partitions it induces on a finite labeled set $[n]=\{1,\dots,n\}$, and analyze how these partitions change under perturbations of a point configuration $X=(x_1,\dots,x_n)\in(\mathbb{R}^d)^n$. We equip the space of partitions $Π_n$ with a normalized pairwise disagreement metric $d(\cdot,\cdot)$, and define the stability radius $r(X,A)=\sup\{\varepsilon\ge0: A(X')=A(X)$ whenever $|X-X'\|\le\varepsilon\}$, where $\|X-X'\|=\max_i\|x_i-x'_i\|$. Our main results concern nearest-center assignment with fixed centers $\{c_1,\dots,c_k\}\subset\mathbb{R}^d$. For each point, we define the margin $γ_i=\min_{j\ne\ell_i}(\|x_i-c_j\|-\|x_i-c_{\ell_i}\|)$ and $γ_{\min}=\min_iγ_i$, where $\ell_i$ denotes the assigned center. We show that if $\varepsilon<γ_{\min}/2$, then no assignments change under perturbation and hence $A(X')=A(X)$. Conversely, any point that changes its assigned center must satisfy $γ_i\le2\varepsilon$, showing that instability is localized near decision boundaries. We construct configurations in which arbitrarily small perturbations $\|X-X'\|\le\varepsilon$ alter the induced partition, demonstrating that the margin condition is sufficient but not necessary for stability. We further extend the framework to a discrete-time setting, showing that if $\sum_t δ_t<r(X(0),A)$, then $A(X(t))=A(X(0))$, and we give a probabilistic bound on $\mathbb{E}[d(A(X),A(X'))]$ in terms of tail probabilities relative to $γ_i$. This framework identifies the margin as the key quantity governing both worst-case and average stability, and provides explicit conditions under which clustering-induced partitions remain invariant in a fixed-center Euclidean model.

ai.tldr: 研究在固定中心最近邻分配下，由聚类诱导的划分在点配置扰动下的稳定性，证明稳定性由最小边距决定。
ai.motivation: 聚类算法产生的划分在实际数据扰动下可能不稳定，需要量化其稳定性条件。
ai.method: 在划分空间定义归一化分歧度量，引入稳定性半径，分析固定中心最近邻分配在点扰动下的行为，建立边距与稳定性关系。
ai.result: 若扰动小于最小边距的一半，则划分不变；改变分配的点必满足其边距不超过两倍扰动。边距是控制最坏情况和平均稳定性的关键量。
ai.help_to_user: 为固定中心聚类提供了严格的稳定性判据，可用于评估聚类结果对数据噪声的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将稳定性分析扩展到自适应中心或非欧几里得度量空间。
idea_spark.risk: 固定中心假设在实际动态聚类中可能不成立，需考虑中心漂移的影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发设计具有稳定性保证的聚类算法，或开发基于边距的主动学习采样策略。

en.tldr: Studies the stability of partitions induced by nearest-center assignment under perturbations of point configurations, showing stability is governed by the minimum margin.
en.motivation: Clustering-induced partitions may be unstable under data perturbations; conditions for stability need to be quantified.
en.method: Defines a normalized disagreement metric on partition space, introduces stability radius, and analyzes behavior of fixed-center nearest-neighbor assignment under point perturbations, establishing relationship between margin and stability.
en.result: If perturbation is less than half the minimum margin, the partition remains unchanged; any point that changes assignment must have margin at most twice the perturbation. Margin is the key quantity controlling both worst-case and average stability.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous stability criteria for fixed-center clustering, useful for assessing robustness of clustering results to data noise.

idea_spark.idea: Extend stability analysis to adaptive centers or non-Euclidean metric spaces.
idea_spark.risk: The fixed-center assumption may not hold in practical dynamic clustering; center drift needs consideration.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires design of clustering algorithms with stability guarantees, or development of margin-based active learning sampling strategies.

papers.title: Gravitational-wave astronomy requires population-informed parameter estimation
papers.summary: Gravitational-wave events are interpreted in terms of Bayesian posteriors for their source properties inferred under unphysical reference priors. Though these parameter estimates are important intermediate data products for downstream analyses, across the catalog they provide generically biased sourced properties and are therefore unsuitable for direct astrophysical interpretation. Hierarchical parameter estimation is the solution, where joint analysis of the entire catalog of observations not only reduces statistical uncertainties but actually informs the correct prior. Population-informed source properties from there derived are naturally suited to astrophysical interpretation and catalog statistics, such as identification of exceptional events from previous and ongoing observing runs. Using the latest LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA data, we thus demonstrate that population inference is not optional to interpret gravitational-wave observations.

ai.tldr: 引力波事件的传统贝叶斯参数估计使用非物理参考先验，导致系统偏差。分层参数估计通过联合分析整个观测目录，校正先验并得出适合天体物理解释的群体知情源属性。
ai.motivation: 当前引力波事件参数估计使用非物理参考先验，导致跨目录的源属性普遍存在偏差，不适合直接用于天体物理解释。
ai.method: 采用分层参数估计方法，联合分析整个引力波观测目录，不仅减少统计不确定性，还校正先验分布。使用最新LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA数据进行演示。
ai.result: 群体推断得出的群体知情源属性自然适用于天体物理解释和目录统计，例如识别以往和正在进行观测中的特殊事件。
ai.help_to_user: 本文论证了群体推断对于解释引力波观测的必要性，为天体物理学家提供了更可靠的参数估计框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将传统单事件参数估计升级为群体联合推断，以物理一致的先验替代非物理参考先验。
idea_spark.risk: 计算复杂度可能显著增加，且依赖于观测目录的完备性和质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在多信使天文学中应用类似群体校正思路，改善不同观测数据间的参数一致性。

en.tldr: Traditional Bayesian parameter estimation for gravitational-wave events uses unphysical reference priors, leading to systematic biases. Hierarchical parameter estimation jointly analyzes the entire observation catalog to correct priors and derive population-informed source properties suitable for astrophysical interpretation.
en.motivation: Current parameter estimation for gravitational-wave events employs unphysical reference priors, resulting in generically biased source properties across the catalog that are unsuitable for direct astrophysical interpretation.
en.method: Adopts hierarchical parameter estimation to jointly analyze the entire gravitational-wave observation catalog, reducing statistical uncertainties and informing the correct prior. Demonstrates using the latest LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA data.
en.result: Population-informed source properties derived from this approach are naturally suited for astrophysical interpretation and catalog statistics, such as identifying exceptional events from previous and ongoing observing runs.
en.help_to_user: This paper demonstrates that population inference is essential for interpreting gravitational-wave observations, providing astrophysicists with a more reliable parameter estimation framework.

idea_spark.idea: Upgrade traditional single-event parameter estimation to joint population inference, replacing unphysical reference priors with physically consistent ones.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity may increase significantly, and the approach depends on the completeness and quality of the observation catalog.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires applying similar population-correction ideas in multi-messenger astronomy to improve parameter consistency across different observational data.

papers.title: QUACK! Making the (Rubber) Ducky Talk: A Systematic Study of Keystroke Dynamics for HID Injection Detection
papers.summary: Modern computing systems inherently trust human input devices, creating an exploitable attack surface for adversarial automation. USB Human Interface Device (HID) emulation attacks, such as those enabled by the USB Rubber Ducky, exploit this assumption to inject arbitrary keystroke sequences while bypassing traditional defenses. Existing countermeasures rely on simple heuristics based on typing speed or timing regularity, which can be easily evaded through basic randomization. Keystroke dynamics analysis offers a more robust alternative by modeling temporal typing behavior. However, prior work frames this problem as behavioral authentication, verifying whether input originates from a specific user rather than detecting automated injection. An alternative approach is continuous monitoring via keylogging integrated with intrusion detection systems, but this requires access to input content, raising significant privacy concerns.   In this paper, we provide the first systematic characterization of keystroke dynamics for human-vs-machine discrimination, independent of user identity. Guided by five research questions, we show that robust, privacy-preserving detection is achievable using lightweight models operating solely on timing features, eliminating the need for content access or user profiling. Our analysis reveals that attacker sophistication does not monotonically translate into improved evasion. Instead, robustness depends on exposure to structurally diverse generation strategies rather than increased model complexity. Finally, we quantify the trade-off between detection timeliness and reliability across varying keystroke sequence lengths, identifying practical operating points for early and effective attack interception.

ai.tldr: 本研究首次系统性地利用击键动力学特征，在不依赖用户身份或输入内容的情况下，实现了对USB HID模拟攻击（如Rubber Ducky）的轻量级、隐私保护的检测。
ai.motivation: 现有基于输入速度或规律性的启发式防御易被随机化绕过，而基于行为认证或内容监控的方法存在隐私泄露或依赖特定用户的问题。
ai.method: 通过五个研究问题引导，仅使用时序特征构建轻量级模型，分析不同击键序列长度下的检测效果，并评估攻击者策略多样性对模型鲁棒性的影响。
ai.result: 发现攻击复杂度与逃避能力非单调相关，模型鲁棒性取决于对结构多样生成策略的暴露而非模型复杂度，并量化了检测及时性与可靠性的权衡点。
ai.help_to_user: 为系统安全研究者提供了无需内容访问或用户画像的自动化输入检测方案，可集成于入侵检测系统实现早期攻击拦截。

idea_spark.idea: 将击键动力学特征与设备硬件指纹结合，提升攻击源辨识精度。
idea_spark.risk: 攻击者可能通过对抗性样本生成或模仿特定用户打字模式绕过检测。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在物联网设备或工业控制系统中，对自动化控制指令进行类似的行为异常检测。

zh.tldr: 本研究首次系统性地利用击键动力学特征，在不依赖用户身份或输入内容的情况下，实现了对USB HID模拟攻击（如Rubber Ducky）的轻量级、隐私保护的检测。
zh.motivation: 现有基于输入速度或规律性的启发式防御易被随机化绕过，而基于行为认证或内容监控的方法存在隐私泄露或依赖特定用户的问题。
zh.method: 通过五个研究问题引导，仅使用时序特征构建轻量级模型，分析不同击键序列长度下的检测效果，并评估攻击者策略多样性对模型鲁棒性的影响。
zh.result: 发现攻击复杂度与逃避能力非单调相关，模型鲁棒性取决于对结构多样生成策略的暴露而非模型复杂度，并量化了检测及时性与可靠性的权衡点。
zh.help_to_user: 为系统安全研究者提供了无需内容访问或用户画像的自动化输入检测方案，可集成于入侵检测系统实现早期攻击拦截。

idea_spark.idea: 将击键动力学特征与设备硬件指纹结合，提升攻击源辨识精度。
idea_spark.risk: 攻击者可能通过对抗性样本生成或模仿特定用户打字模式绕过检测。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在物联网设备或工业控制系统中，对自动化控制指令进行类似的行为异常检测。

en.tldr: This study provides the first systematic characterization of keystroke dynamics for human-vs-machine discrimination, achieving lightweight, privacy-preserving detection of USB HID emulation attacks (e.g., Rubber Ducky) without relying on user identity or input content.
en.motivation: Existing heuristic defenses based on typing speed or regularity are easily evaded via randomization, while behavioral authentication or content monitoring approaches raise privacy concerns or depend on specific user profiles.
en.method: Guided by five research questions, lightweight models using only timing features were constructed. Detection performance across varying keystroke sequence lengths was analyzed, and the impact of attacker strategy diversity on model robustness was evaluated.
en.result: Attacker sophistication does not monotonically improve evasion; model robustness depends on exposure to structurally diverse generation strategies rather than increased complexity. The trade-off between detection timeliness and reliability was quantified.
en.help_to_user: Provides a content-agnostic and user-agnostic automated input detection solution for cybersecurity researchers, enabling early attack interception when integrated with intrusion detection systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine keystroke dynamics with device hardware fingerprints to improve attack source identification.
idea_spark.risk: Attackers may bypass detection via adversarial sample generation or mimicking specific user typing patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires similar behavioral anomaly detection for automated control commands in IoT or industrial control systems.

papers.title: Converting non-Hermitian degeneracies of any order: Hierarchies of exceptional points and degeneracy manifolds
papers.summary: The emergence of various types of degeneracies plays a crucial role in optimizing and engineering different physical phenomena in non-Hermitian physics. In our work, we focus on the derogatory Exceptional Points (EPs), which are characterized by multiple Jordan blocks corresponding to the same eigenvalue. We demonstrate that, under certain infinitesimal perturbations, a derogatory EP can be converted into an EP of different structure without varying the total order of degeneracy. In particular, such conversion can increase the size of the largest Jordan block and, hence, the sensitivity of the eigenspectrum to parameter variation, which is an important feature for practical applications. Furthermore, by analyzing all possible conversions, we introduce hierarchies of degeneracies of the same order that appear when perturbing non-Hermitian systems. We systematically explore hierarchies in the absence of any symmetry and when pseudo-Hermitian symmetry is present. Our study facilitates engineering various degeneracies of non-Hermitian systems, paving the way to extending the implications of non-Hermitian physics.

ai.tldr: 本文研究非厄米系统中具有多个相同特征值约当块的 derogatory 异常点，证明在无穷小扰动下可将其转换为结构不同但总简并阶数不变的异常点，从而增大最大约当块尺寸并提升特征谱对参数变化的敏感性。通过分析所有可能的转换，建立了无对称性和伪厄米对称性下的简并层次结构。
ai.motivation: 非厄米物理中各类简并的出现对优化和调控物理现象至关重要，但 derogatory 异常点的转换机制及其对系统敏感性的影响尚不明确。
ai.method: 通过分析无穷小扰动下 derogatory 异常点的稳定性，研究其向不同结构异常点的转换可能性，并系统探索无对称性和伪厄米对称性情形下的简并层次。
ai.result: 证明了 derogatory 异常点可在保持总简并阶数不变下转换为不同结构的异常点，增大最大约当块尺寸，从而增强特征谱敏感性；建立了非厄米系统的简并层次结构。
ai.help_to_user: 为非厄米系统简并工程提供了理论框架，有助于设计具有特定敏感性的简并结构。

idea_spark.idea: 利用扰动诱导的简并结构转换，可设计对参数变化高度敏感的光学或声学传感器。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中扰动可能偏离理论假设的无穷小条件，转换效果可能受系统噪声或制备误差影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 简并层次结构可能对应新的拓扑分类，启发对非厄米系统拓扑相变的研究。

idea_spark.inspiration: 简并层次结构可能对应新的拓扑分类，启发对非厄米系统拓扑相变的研究。

en.tldr: This work studies derogatory exceptional points in non-Hermitian systems, characterized by multiple Jordan blocks for the same eigenvalue. It demonstrates that under infinitesimal perturbations, a derogatory EP can be converted into an EP of different structure without changing the total order of degeneracy, increasing the size of the largest Jordan block and enhancing eigenspectrum sensitivity to parameter variation. Hierarchies of degeneracies are established for systems without symmetry and with pseudo-Hermitian symmetry.
en.motivation: The emergence of various degeneracies is crucial for optimizing physical phenomena in non-Hermitian physics, but the conversion mechanisms of derogatory exceptional points and their impact on system sensitivity remain unclear.
en.method: Analyzes the stability of derogatory exceptional points under infinitesimal perturbations, investigates their conversion to EPs of different structures, and systematically explores degeneracy hierarchies in the absence of symmetry and with pseudo-Hermitian symmetry.
en.result: Shows that derogatory exceptional points can be converted to structurally different EPs while preserving total degeneracy order, increasing the largest Jordan block size and enhancing eigenspectrum sensitivity; establishes hierarchies of degeneracies in non-Hermitian systems.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for engineering degeneracies in non-Hermitian systems, aiding the design of degeneracy structures with specific sensitivity properties.

idea_spark.idea: Using perturbation-induced degeneracy structure conversion could enable the design of highly sensitive optical or acoustic sensors to parameter variations.
idea_spark.risk: In practical systems, perturbations may deviate from the assumed infinitesimal conditions, and conversion effects might be affected by system noise or fabrication errors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Degeneracy hierarchies may correspond to new topological classifications, inspiring research on topological phase transitions in non-Hermitian systems.

papers.title: From Seeing to Simulating: Generative High-Fidelity Simulation with Digital Cousins for Generalizable Robot Learning and Evaluation
papers.summary: Learning robust robot policies in real-world environments requires diverse data augmentation, yet scaling real-world data collection is costly due to the need for acquiring physical assets and reconfiguring environments. Therefore, augmenting real-world scenes into simulation has become a practical augmentation for efficient learning and evaluation. We present a generative framework that establishes a generative real-to-sim mapping from real-world panoramas to high-fidelity simulation scenes, and further synthesize diverse cousin scenes via semantic and geometric editing. Combined with high-quality physics engines and realistic assets, the generated scenes support interactive manipulation tasks. Additionally, we incorporate multi-room stitching to construct consistent large-scale environments for long-horizon navigation across complex layouts. Experiments demonstrate a strong sim-to-real correlation validating our platform's fidelity, and show that extensively scaling up data generation leads to significantly better generalization to unseen scene and object variations, demonstrating the effectiveness of Digital Cousins for generalizable robot learning and evaluation.

ai.tldr: 提出一个生成式框架，将真实世界全景图映射为高保真仿真场景，并通过语义和几何编辑合成多样化场景，用于可泛化的机器人学习与评估。
ai.motivation: 在真实环境中学习稳健的机器人策略需要多样化的数据增强，但扩展真实世界数据收集成本高昂，因此将真实场景增强到仿真中成为一种实用的高效学习和评估方法。
ai.method: 建立一个从真实世界全景图到高保真仿真场景的生成式真实到仿真映射，通过语义和几何编辑合成多样化的“数字表亲”场景，并结合高质量物理引擎和真实资产支持交互式操作任务，还采用多房间拼接构建一致的大规模环境。
ai.result: 实验证明了强大的仿真到真实相关性，验证了平台保真度，并表明大规模扩展数据生成能显著提升对未见场景和物体变化的泛化能力。
ai.help_to_user: 为机器人学习提供了一个高效、高保真的仿真数据生成与评估平台，可降低真实数据收集成本并提升策略泛化性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用全景图作为输入，通过生成模型直接构建可交互的物理仿真环境，而非仅静态场景。
idea_spark.risk: 生成场景的物理属性保真度可能不足，影响仿真到真实的迁移效果；编辑操作的自动化程度与可控性需平衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将“数字表亲”概念用于数据增强，通过语义和几何编辑在保持核心结构的同时引入多样性，而非完全随机生成。

idea_spark.risk: 生成场景的物理属性保真度可能不足，影响仿真到真实的迁移效果；编辑操作的自动化程度与可控性需平衡。

en.tldr: Proposes a generative framework that maps real-world panoramas to high-fidelity simulation scenes and synthesizes diverse scenes via semantic and geometric editing for generalizable robot learning and evaluation.
en.motivation: Learning robust robot policies requires diverse data augmentation, but scaling real-world data collection is costly. Augmenting real scenes into simulation offers a practical approach for efficient learning and evaluation.
en.method: Establishes a generative real-to-sim mapping from panoramas to high-fidelity simulation scenes, synthesizes diverse cousin scenes via semantic and geometric editing, integrates high-quality physics engines and realistic assets for interactive tasks, and employs multi-room stitching for large-scale environments.
en.result: Experiments show strong sim-to-real correlation validating fidelity, and scaling up data generation leads to significantly better generalization to unseen scene and object variations.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, high-fidelity simulation data generation and evaluation platform for robot learning, reducing real-world data collection costs and improving policy generalization.

idea_spark.idea: Using panoramas as input to directly construct interactive physics simulation environments via generative models, rather than just static scenes.
idea_spark.risk: Physical fidelity of generated scenes may be insufficient, affecting sim-to-real transfer; automation and controllability of editing operations need balancing.
idea_spark.inspiration: Applying the 'digital cousins' concept for data augmentation—introducing diversity via semantic/geometric editing while preserving core structure, rather than fully random generation.

papers.title: The Amazing Stability of Flow Matching
papers.summary: The success of deep generative models in generating high-quality and diverse samples is often attributed to particular architectures and large training datasets. In this paper, we investigate the impact of these factors on the quality and diversity of samples generated by \emph{flow-matching} models. Surprisingly, in our experiments on CelebA-HQ dataset, flow matching remains stable even when pruning 50\% of the dataset. That is, the quality and diversity of generated samples are preserved. Moreover, pruning impacts the latent representation only slightly, that is, samples generated by models trained on the full and pruned dataset map to visually similar outputs for a given seed. We observe similar stability when changing the architecture or training configuration, such that the latent representation is maintained under these changes as well.   Our results quantify just how strong this stability can be in practice, and help explain the reliability of flow-matching models under various perturbations.

ai.tldr: 研究发现，流匹配模型在数据集大幅裁剪、架构变更等扰动下，生成样本的质量、多样性和潜在表示均表现出惊人的稳定性。
ai.motivation: 深度生成模型的成功通常归因于特定架构和大规模训练数据。本文旨在探究这些因素对流匹配模型样本质量和多样性的实际影响。
ai.method: 在CelebA-HQ数据集上进行实验，系统性地裁剪50%的数据集，并改变模型架构与训练配置，评估生成样本的质量、多样性及潜在表示的变化。
ai.result: 即使裁剪一半数据，流匹配模型生成的样本质量和多样性仍得以保持。潜在表示仅轻微变化，相同种子在不同模型下生成视觉相似的输出。模型对架构和配置变化也表现出类似的稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 量化了流匹配模型在实际应用中对各种扰动的强健性，有助于解释其可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用流匹配的稳定性，开发数据高效或架构轻量化的生成模型，或在持续学习场景中减少灾难性遗忘。
idea_spark.risk: 稳定性可能依赖于特定数据集（CelebA-HQ）或任务，在其他领域（如文本、3D）的普适性待验证。极端裁剪（如>80%）下的稳定性边界未知。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对生成模型“内在稳定性”机制的理论研究，或探索如何主动设计具有类似稳定性的新生成范式。

zh.motivation: 深度生成模型的成功通常归因于特定架构和大规模训练数据。本文旨在探究这些因素对流匹配模型样本质量和多样性的实际影响。

idea_spark.risk: 稳定性可能依赖于特定数据集（CelebA-HQ）或任务，在其他领域（如文本、3D）的普适性待验证。极端裁剪（如>80%）下的稳定性边界未知。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对生成模型“内在稳定性”机制的理论研究，或探索如何主动设计具有类似稳定性的新生成范式。

en.tldr: Flow matching models demonstrate remarkable stability in sample quality, diversity, and latent representation under significant perturbations like dataset pruning (50%), architecture changes, and training configuration variations.
en.motivation: The success of deep generative models is often attributed to specific architectures and large training datasets. This paper investigates the actual impact of these factors on the quality and diversity of samples generated by flow-matching models.
en.method: Conducted experiments on the CelebA-HQ dataset, systematically pruning 50% of the data and altering model architectures and training configurations. Evaluated changes in generated sample quality, diversity, and latent representations.
en.result: Flow matching preserves sample quality and diversity even when half the dataset is pruned. Latent representations change only slightly, with the same seed producing visually similar outputs across models trained on full and pruned data. Similar stability is observed under architectural and configuration changes.
en.help_to_user: Quantifies the robustness of flow-matching models to various perturbations in practice, helping to explain their reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage flow matching's stability to develop data-efficient or lightweight generative models, or to reduce catastrophic forgetting in continual learning scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Stability may be dependent on the specific dataset (CelebA-HQ) or task; generalizability to other domains (e.g., text, 3D) is unverified. Stability boundaries under extreme pruning (e.g., >80%) are unknown.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires theoretical research into the mechanisms of 'intrinsic stability' in generative models, or exploration of how to actively design new generative paradigms with similar stability.

papers.title: Local qubit invariants on quantum computer
papers.summary: We present two general methods to implement quantum circuits for the direct measuring of local unitary invariants on quantum computers. We work these out for important three-qubit invariants, and also demonstrate these on the IBM Quantum Platform for important entanglement measures of three qubits.

ai.tldr: 提出了两种在量子计算机上直接测量局域幺正不变量的通用量子电路实现方法，并以三量子比特的重要不变量为例，在IBM量子平台上进行了演示验证。
ai.motivation: 量子不变量是表征量子态本质特性的关键，尤其在多体纠缠分析中至关重要。传统计算方法在量子计算机上效率有限，需要开发可直接测量的电路实现方案。
ai.method: 设计了两种通用量子电路构造方法，专门用于直接测量局域幺正不变量。方法以三量子比特的重要不变量（如纠缠度量）为具体案例进行详细实现，并在IBM量子云平台上进行实验验证。
ai.result: 成功实现了对三量子比特重要不变量的直接测量电路，并在真实量子硬件（IBM量子平台）上演示了这些电路对纠缠度量的有效测量。
ai.help_to_user: 为在量子计算机上直接测量量子不变量提供了实用的电路设计方案和实验验证，降低了相关量子信息处理任务的实现门槛。

idea_spark.idea: 将抽象的数学不变量（局域幺正不变量）转化为具体的、可在线量子硬件上执行的量子电路模块。
idea_spark.risk: 电路深度和保真度可能随量子比特数增加而显著恶化，在含噪声中等规模量子（NISQ）设备上扩展性存疑。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将更多复杂的代数或拓扑不变量通过量子电路实现直接测量，连接抽象数学与量子实验。

idea_spark.idea: 将抽象的数学不变量（局域幺正不变量）转化为具体的、可在线量子硬件上执行的量子电路模块。
idea_spark.risk: 电路深度和保真度可能随量子比特数增加而显著恶化，在含噪声中等规模量子（NISQ）设备上扩展性存疑。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将更多复杂的代数或拓扑不变量通过量子电路实现直接测量，连接抽象数学与量子实验。

en.tldr: Presents two general methods for implementing quantum circuits to directly measure local unitary invariants on quantum computers, worked out for important three-qubit invariants and demonstrated on the IBM Quantum Platform for entanglement measures.
en.motivation: Quantum invariants are crucial for characterizing essential properties of quantum states, especially in multipartite entanglement analysis. Traditional computational methods are inefficient on quantum computers, necessitating the development of circuit implementations for direct measurement.
en.method: Designed two general methods for constructing quantum circuits specifically for the direct measurement of local unitary invariants. The methods are detailed for important three-qubit invariants (e.g., entanglement measures) and experimentally validated on the IBM Quantum cloud platform.
en.result: Successfully implemented quantum circuits for the direct measurement of important three-qubit invariants and demonstrated their effectiveness for measuring entanglement measures on real quantum hardware (IBM Quantum Platform).
en.help_to_user: Provides practical circuit design schemes and experimental verification for directly measuring quantum invariants on quantum computers, lowering the barrier to implementing related quantum information processing tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Transforming abstract mathematical invariants (local unitary invariants) into concrete quantum circuit modules executable on online quantum hardware.
idea_spark.risk: Circuit depth and fidelity may degrade significantly with increasing qubit count, raising scalability concerns on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the direct measurement of more complex algebraic or topological invariants via quantum circuit implementations, bridging abstract mathematics and quantum experiments.

papers.title: Weakly-Coupled Multi-Action Restless Bandits -- Exponential Convergence in Probability
papers.summary: We study a finite time horizon Markov decision process (MDP) consisting of several groups of multi-action finite-state restless bandit processes, which are identical within each group. The bandit processes into different groups can be rather different. The bandit processes are subject to multiple weakly coupled constraints on their state and action variables. In contrast to prior studies that considered only a few specific policies/algorithms, here, we study the behaviours of the general stochastic process and, most importantly, the design of policies that guarantee its convergence to an ideal trajectory as the problem size increases. We prove that, for any policy in a rather general class, the resulting stochastic process converges in probability to a deterministic process as the system size (measured by the number of bandits) tends to infinity, at an exponential rate. Unlike the previous proofs, our exponential convergence does not rely on any non-degenerate assumptions. It follows that the chosen policy asymptotically approaches optimality (with exponentially diminishing suboptimality) in the size dimension if and only if the deterministic process coincides with optimality. We further propose a policy and prove that, in general, it converges in probability to optimality exponentially fast in the system size.

ai.tldr: 研究具有弱耦合约束的多动作不安定老虎机群，证明在系统规模增大时，一般策略下的随机过程以指数速率依概率收敛到确定性过程，并设计出指数收敛到最优的策略。
ai.motivation: 先前研究多限于特定策略，本文旨在分析一般随机过程行为，并设计保证收敛到理想轨迹的策略。
ai.method: 研究有限时域马尔可夫决策过程，包含多组同构多动作有限状态不安定老虎机，各组可不同，受多个状态与动作变量的弱耦合约束。分析一般策略类，证明系统规模（老虎机数量）趋于无穷时，随机过程以指数速率依概率收敛到确定性过程。
ai.result: 证明对相当一般的策略类，随机过程以指数速率依概率收敛到确定性过程。若该确定性过程最优，则策略渐近最优且次优性指数衰减。进一步提出一个策略，证明其一般以指数速率依概率收敛到最优。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有弱耦合约束的大规模不安定老虎机系统提供了通用的收敛性分析和策略设计框架，证明了指数收敛速率且无需非退化假设。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机过程收敛到确定性极限的思想用于简化大规模随机控制问题的分析与设计。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统规模有限时，指数收敛的常数因子可能影响实际性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在通信网络、资源分配等大规模系统中设计具有可证明收敛保证的分布式策略。

en.tldr: Studies weakly-coupled multi-action restless bandit groups, proving that under general policies the stochastic process converges in probability to a deterministic process at an exponential rate as system size increases, and designs a policy that converges exponentially to optimality.
en.motivation: Prior work focused on specific policies; this paper aims to analyze the behavior of the general stochastic process and design policies guaranteeing convergence to an ideal trajectory.
en.method: Investigates a finite-horizon MDP with several groups of identical multi-action finite-state restless bandits, differing across groups, subject to multiple weakly-coupled constraints on state and action variables. Analyzes a general class of policies, proving that as system size (number of bandits) tends to infinity, the stochastic process converges in probability to a deterministic process at an exponential rate.
en.result: Proves that for a broad class of policies, the stochastic process converges in probability to a deterministic process at an exponential rate. If that deterministic process is optimal, the policy is asymptotically optimal with exponentially diminishing suboptimality. Further proposes a policy and proves it generally converges in probability to optimality exponentially fast in system size.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general convergence analysis and policy design framework for large-scale restless bandit systems with weakly-coupled constraints, establishing exponential convergence rates without non-degenerate assumptions.

idea_spark.idea: Using the idea of stochastic process convergence to a deterministic limit to simplify the analysis and design of large-scale stochastic control problems.
idea_spark.risk: For finite practical system sizes, the constant factors in the exponential convergence may affect actual performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the design of distributed policies with provable convergence guarantees in large-scale systems like communication networks and resource allocation.

papers.title: From Articles to Canopies: Knowledge-Driven Pseudo-Labelling for Tree Species Classification using LLM Experts
papers.summary: Hyperspectral tree species classification is challenging due to limited and imbalanced class labels, spectral mixing (overlapping light signatures from multiple species), and ecological heterogeneity (variability among ecological systems). Addressing these challenges requires methods that integrate biological and structural characteristics of vegetation, such as canopy architecture and interspecific interactions, rather than relying solely on spectral signatures. This paper presents a biologically informed, semi-supervised deep learning method that integrates multi-sensor Earth observation data, specifically hyperspectral imaging (HSI) and airborne laser scanning (ALS), with expert, ecological knowledge. The approach relies on biologically inspired pseudo-labelling over a precomputed canopy graph, yielding accurate classification at low training cost. In addition, ecological priors on species cohabitation are automatically derived from reliable sources using large language models (LLMs) and encoded as a cohabitation matrix with likelihoods of species occurring together. These priors are incorporated into the pseudo-labelling strategy, effectively introducing expert knowledge into the model. Experiments on a real-world forest dataset demonstrate 5.6% improvement over the best reference method. Expert evaluation of cohabitation priors reveals high accuracy with differences no larger than 15%.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种融合生态知识的半监督深度学习方法，利用LLM从可靠来源自动提取物种共栖先验，结合高光谱与激光雷达数据，通过基于冠层图的生物启发式伪标签策略，以低成本实现高精度的树种分类。
ai.motivation: 高光谱树种分类面临标签有限、类别不平衡、光谱混合及生态异质性等挑战，仅依赖光谱特征不足，需整合植被生物与结构特性（如冠层结构、种间相互作用）。
ai.method: 方法整合多传感器地球观测数据（高光谱成像HSI与机载激光扫描ALS）与生态专家知识。基于预计算的冠层图进行生物启发式伪标签；使用大语言模型从可靠来源自动推导物种共栖先验，编码为共栖概率矩阵，并融入伪标签策略。
ai.result: 在真实森林数据集上实验表明，相比最佳基准方法提升5.6%。专家评估共栖先验显示高准确性，差异不超过15%。
ai.help_to_user: 为遥感、生态学及林业领域研究者提供了一种低成本、高精度的树种分类框架，展示了如何将生态知识通过LLM与深度学习结合，解决标签稀缺问题。

idea_spark.idea: 构建“冠层图”作为空间上下文表示，结合生物启发式伪标签与生态共栖先验，引导模型学习超越光谱特征的植被结构与种间关系。
idea_spark.risk: LLM提取的先验依赖源数据的可靠性与完整性；生态异质性可能导致先验在局部区域不适用；多传感器数据配准与融合可能引入误差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发于“从文章到冠层”的概念，将文献中的生态知识转化为可计算的模型约束，为数据稀缺的遥感分类任务注入领域智能。

en.tldr: This paper presents a biologically informed semi-supervised deep learning method that integrates multi-sensor Earth observation data (HSI and ALS) with ecological knowledge. It uses LLMs to automatically derive species cohabitation priors from reliable sources and incorporates them into a pseudo-labelling strategy over a precomputed canopy graph, achieving accurate tree species classification at low training cost.
en.motivation: Hyperspectral tree species classification is challenged by limited and imbalanced labels, spectral mixing, and ecological heterogeneity. Addressing these requires integrating biological and structural characteristics of vegetation (e.g., canopy architecture, interspecific interactions) beyond spectral signatures alone.
en.method: The approach integrates multi-sensor Earth observation data (hyperspectral imaging and airborne laser scanning) with expert ecological knowledge. It employs biologically inspired pseudo-labelling over a precomputed canopy graph. Ecological priors on species cohabitation are automatically derived from reliable sources using large language models, encoded as a cohabitation likelihood matrix, and incorporated into the pseudo-labelling strategy.
en.result: Experiments on a real-world forest dataset show a 5.6% improvement over the best reference method. Expert evaluation of the cohabitation priors reveals high accuracy with differences no larger than 15%.
en.help_to_user: Provides a low-cost, high-accuracy framework for tree species classification for researchers in remote sensing, ecology, and forestry. Demonstrates how to integrate ecological knowledge via LLMs and deep learning to address label scarcity.

idea_spark.idea: Construct a 'canopy graph' as a spatial-context representation, combining biologically inspired pseudo-labelling with ecological cohabitation priors to guide the model to learn vegetation structure and interspecies relationships beyond spectral features.
idea_spark.risk: LLM-extracted priors depend on the reliability and completeness of source data; ecological heterogeneity may make priors locally inapplicable; multi-sensor data registration and fusion may introduce errors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the 'From Articles to Canopies' concept, transforming ecological knowledge from literature into computable model constraints injects domain intelligence into label-scarce remote sensing classification tasks.

papers.title: Why Fine-Tuning Encourages Hallucinations and How to Fix It
papers.summary: Large language models are prone to hallucinating factually incorrect statements. A key source of these errors is exposure to new factual information through supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which can increase hallucinations w.r.t. knowledge acquired during pre-training. In this work, we explore whether SFT-induced hallucinations can be mitigated using established tools from the continual learning literature, since they arise as a by-product of knowledge degradation during training. We propose a self-distillation-based SFT method that facilitates effective factual learning while minimizing hallucinations w.r.t. pre-existing knowledge by regularizing output-distribution drift. We also show that, in settings where new knowledge acquisition is unnecessary, suppressing factual plasticity by freezing parameter groups, can preserve task performance while reducing hallucinations. Lastly, we investigate the mechanism behind SFT-induced hallucinations through three hypotheses: capacity limitations, behavior cloning, and localized interference. Our experiments show that a main driver is interference among overlapping semantic representations, and that self-distillation succeeds by mitigating this interference.

ai.tldr: 本文发现监督微调（SFT）会加剧大语言模型的事实幻觉，并提出基于自蒸馏的SFT方法和冻结参数组策略来缓解此问题，其机制源于语义表征的重叠干扰。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型在监督微调后容易产生事实性幻觉，这源于新知识学习导致预训练知识的退化。
ai.method: 提出基于自蒸馏的SFT方法，通过正则化输出分布漂移来减少幻觉；在无需新知识的场景中，冻结部分参数以抑制事实可塑性。
ai.result: 实验表明自蒸馏能有效减轻幻觉，主要机制是缓解了重叠语义表征之间的干扰。
ai.help_to_user: 为减少微调引发的幻觉提供了两种实用方案，并揭示了其背后的干扰机制。

idea_spark.idea: 通过自蒸馏约束输出分布变化，或冻结特定参数组，来平衡新知识学习与旧知识保留。
idea_spark.risk: 方法可能增加训练复杂度，且冻结参数可能限制模型适应新任务的能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索其他持续学习技术（如弹性权重巩固）在语言模型微调中的应用，或研究不同知识类型的干扰模式。

idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索其他持续学习技术（如弹性权重巩固）在语言模型微调中的应用，或研究不同知识类型的干扰模式。

en.tldr: This paper finds that supervised fine-tuning (SFT) exacerbates factual hallucinations in large language models, and proposes a self-distillation-based SFT method and a parameter-freezing strategy to mitigate this, with the mechanism rooted in interference among overlapping semantic representations.
en.motivation: Large language models are prone to factual hallucinations after supervised fine-tuning, due to knowledge degradation of pre-trained knowledge when learning new facts.
en.method: Proposes a self-distillation-based SFT method that regularizes output-distribution drift to reduce hallucinations; in settings where new knowledge is unnecessary, freezes parameter groups to suppress factual plasticity.
en.result: Experiments show self-distillation effectively reduces hallucinations, primarily by mitigating interference among overlapping semantic representations.
en.help_to_user: Provides two practical approaches to reduce SFT-induced hallucinations and reveals the underlying interference mechanism.

idea_spark.idea: Use self-distillation to constrain output distribution changes, or freeze specific parameter groups, to balance new knowledge acquisition with old knowledge preservation.
idea_spark.risk: Methods may increase training complexity, and freezing parameters could limit model adaptability to new tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore other continual learning techniques (e.g., elastic weight consolidation) in language model fine-tuning, or investigate interference patterns across different knowledge types.

papers.title: Prompt-Driven Code Summarization: A Systematic Literature Review
papers.summary: Software documentation is essential for program comprehension, developer onboarding, code review, and long-term maintenance. Yet producing quality documentation manually is time-consuming and frequently yields incomplete or inconsistent results. Large language models (LLMs) offer a promising solution by automatically generating natural language descriptions from source code, helping developers understand code more efficiently, facilitating maintenance, and supporting downstream activities such as defect localization and commit message generation. However, the effectiveness of LLMs in documentation tasks critically depends on how they are prompted. Properly structured instructions can substantially improve model performance, making prompt engineering-the design of input prompts to guide model behavior-a foundational technique in LLM-based software engineering. Approaches such as few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought reasoning, retrieval-augmented generation, and zero-shot learning show promise for code summarization, yet current research remains fragmented. There is limited understanding of which prompting strategies work best, for which models, and under what conditions. Moreover, evaluation practices vary widely, with most studies relying on overlap-based metrics that may not capture semantic quality. This systematic literature review consolidates existing evidence, categorizes prompting paradigms, examines their effectiveness, and identifies gaps to guide future research and practical adoption.

ai.tldr: 本文对基于提示工程的代码摘要生成研究进行了系统性文献综述，梳理了不同提示策略的有效性、评估方法及研究空白。
ai.motivation: 手动编写软件文档耗时且质量不一，大型语言模型为自动生成代码摘要提供了可能，但其效果高度依赖于提示设计，当前研究分散且缺乏统一评估。
ai.method: 通过系统性文献综述方法，对现有研究进行整合、分类，分析不同提示范式（如少样本提示、思维链、检索增强生成等）的有效性及评估实践。
ai.result: 综述了提示驱动代码摘要的研究现状，对提示策略进行了分类，指出了当前评估方法（主要依赖重叠度指标）的局限性，并明确了未来研究方向。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究者提供了该领域的全景视图，帮助理解不同提示策略的适用场景与效果，并为实践中的模型选择与提示设计提供参考。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个基于语义相似度与人工评估相结合的混合评估框架，以更全面衡量代码摘要的质量。
idea_spark.risk: 当前评估指标可能无法准确反映生成摘要的语义正确性与实用性，存在与真实需求脱节的风险。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索将检索增强生成与思维链提示结合，利用外部知识库提升代码摘要的准确性与上下文相关性。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个基于语义相似度与人工评估相结合的混合评估框架，以更全面衡量代码摘要的质量。
idea_spark.risk: 当前评估指标可能无法准确反映生成摘要的语义正确性与实用性，存在与真实需求脱节的风险。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索将检索增强生成与思维链提示结合，利用外部知识库提升代码摘要的准确性与上下文相关性。

en.tldr: This paper presents a systematic literature review on prompt-driven code summarization, consolidating evidence on the effectiveness of different prompting strategies, evaluation practices, and research gaps.
en.motivation: Manual software documentation is time-consuming and often inconsistent. While LLMs offer a promising solution, their effectiveness heavily depends on prompt design, and current research is fragmented with varied evaluation practices.
en.method: A systematic literature review was conducted to consolidate, categorize, and analyze the effectiveness of different prompting paradigms (e.g., few-shot, chain-of-thought, retrieval-augmented generation) and evaluation methodologies.
en.result: The review synthesizes the state of prompt-driven code summarization, categorizes prompting strategies, highlights limitations of current evaluation metrics (primarily overlap-based), and identifies directions for future research.
en.help_to_user: Provides researchers with a comprehensive overview of the field, insights into the effectiveness of different prompting strategies, and guidance for model selection and prompt design in practice.

idea_spark.idea: Develop a hybrid evaluation framework combining semantic similarity metrics and human assessment to more comprehensively measure code summary quality.
idea_spark.risk: Current evaluation metrics may not accurately capture semantic correctness and practical utility, risking misalignment with real-world needs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore combining retrieval-augmented generation with chain-of-thought prompting to leverage external knowledge bases for improved accuracy and context relevance in code summaries.

papers.title: Exascale Multi-Task Graph Foundation Models for Imbalanced, Multi-Fidelity Atomistic Data
papers.summary: We present an exascale workflow for materials discovery using atomistic graph foundation models built on HydraGNN. We jointly train on 16 open first-principles datasets (544+ million structures covering 85+ elements) using a multi-task architecture with per-dataset heads and a scalable ADIOS2/DDStore data pipeline. On Frontier, we execute six large-scale DeepHyper hyperparameter optimization campaigns in FP64 and promote the top-performing message-passing models to sustained 2,048-node training, yielding a PaiNN-based lead model. The resulting model enables billion-scale screening, evaluating 1.1 billion atomistic structures in 50 seconds, compressing a workload that would require years of first-principles computation, and supports data-scarce fine-tuning across diverse downstream tasks. We quantify precision-performance tradeoffs (BF16/FP32/FP64), demonstrate transfer across twelve chemically diverse downstream tasks, and establish seamless strong- and weak-scaling across Frontier, Aurora, and Perlmutter. This work allows fast and reliable exploration of vast chemical design spaces that are otherwise inaccessible to first-principles methods.

ai.tldr: 我们提出了一个基于HydraGNN原子图基础模型的百亿亿级材料发现工作流，通过多任务架构联合训练16个开放第一性原理数据集，实现了十亿级结构的快速筛选与跨任务迁移。
ai.motivation: 第一性原理计算方法计算成本极高，难以探索广阔的化学设计空间。需要开发高效、可扩展的模型来加速材料发现。
ai.method: 在HydraGNN上构建原子图基础模型，采用多任务架构（每个数据集一个头部）和可扩展的ADIOS2/DDStore数据管道。在Frontier超算上进行了六次大规模DeepHyper超参数优化（FP64），并将最佳消息传递模型推广到持续的2,048节点训练，最终得到一个基于PaiNN的领先模型。
ai.result: 所得模型能在50秒内评估11亿个原子结构，压缩了原本需要数年第一性原理计算的工作量。量化了精度-性能权衡（BF16/FP32/FP64），在12个化学多样性下游任务上展示了迁移能力，并在多个超算系统上实现了无缝的强扩展和弱扩展。
ai.help_to_user: 该工作流为研究人员提供了快速、可靠探索广阔化学设计空间的能力，这些空间原本是第一性原理方法无法触及的。

idea_spark.idea: 将大规模、多保真度、不平衡的原子数据联合训练于统一的图基础模型框架，通过高效的超算工作流实现模型开发与应用。
idea_spark.risk: 模型对训练数据分布的依赖性、不同精度计算对最终材料预测可靠性的影响、向更复杂材料体系或动态过程迁移的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 为其他计算密集型科学领域（如药物设计、气候建模）处理多源、不平衡数据提供了可借鉴的百亿亿级机器学习工作流范式。

en.tldr: We present an exascale workflow for materials discovery using atomistic graph foundation models built on HydraGNN. It jointly trains on 16 open first-principles datasets, enabling billion-scale screening and cross-task transfer.
en.motivation: First-principles computational methods are prohibitively expensive, making vast chemical design spaces inaccessible. Efficient, scalable models are needed to accelerate materials discovery.
en.method: Construct atomistic graph foundation models on HydraGNN using a multi-task architecture with per-dataset heads and a scalable ADIOS2/DDStore data pipeline. Execute six large-scale DeepHyper hyperparameter optimization campaigns in FP64 on Frontier, promote top message-passing models to sustained 2,048-node training, yielding a lead PaiNN-based model.
en.result: The resulting model evaluates 1.1 billion atomistic structures in 50 seconds, compressing years of first-principles computation. It quantifies precision-performance tradeoffs (BF16/FP32/FP64), demonstrates transfer across twelve chemically diverse downstream tasks, and establishes seamless strong- and weak-scaling across multiple supercomputers.
en.help_to_user: This workflow enables fast and reliable exploration of vast chemical design spaces otherwise inaccessible to first-principles methods.

idea_spark.idea: Jointly train large-scale, multi-fidelity, imbalanced atomistic data within a unified graph foundation model framework, enabled by an efficient exascale computational workflow.
idea_spark.risk: Model dependence on training data distribution, impact of different computational precisions on prediction reliability, generalization to more complex material systems or dynamic processes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Provides a transferable exascale machine learning workflow paradigm for handling multi-source, imbalanced data in other compute-intensive scientific domains (e.g., drug design, climate modeling).

papers.title: CLOTH-HUGS: Cloth Aware Human Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: We present Cloth-HUGS, a Gaussian Splatting based neural rendering framework for photorealistic clothed human reconstruction that explicitly disentangles body and clothing. Unlike prior methods that absorb clothing into a single body representation and struggle with loose garments and complex deformations, Cloth-HUGS represents the performer using separate Gaussian layers for body and cloth within a shared canonical space. The canonical volume jointly encodes body, cloth, and scene primitives and is deformed through SMPL-driven articulation with learned linear blend skinning weights. To improve cloth realism, we initialize cloth Gaussians from mesh topology and apply physics-inspired constraints, including simulation-consistency, ARAP regularization, and mask supervision. We further introduce a depth-aware multi-pass rendering strategy for robust body-cloth-scene compositing, enabling real-time rendering at over 60 FPS. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that Cloth-HUGS improves perceptual quality and geometric fidelity over state-of-the-art baselines, reducing LPIPS by up to 28% while producing temporally coherent cloth dynamics.

ai.tldr: Cloth-HUGS 是一个基于高斯泼溅的神经渲染框架，用于逼真的穿衣人体重建，通过分离的身体和衣物高斯层实现显式解耦。
ai.motivation: 现有方法将衣物吸收到单一身体表示中，难以处理宽松服装和复杂变形，需要一种能显式分离衣物与身体并提升真实感的方法。
ai.method: 在共享规范空间中为身体和衣物使用独立的高斯层；通过SMPL驱动的关节运动与学习的线性混合蒙皮权重进行变形；从网格拓扑初始化衣物高斯并施加物理约束（模拟一致性、ARAP正则化、掩码监督）；采用深度感知的多通道渲染策略进行合成。
ai.result: 在多个基准测试中，感知质量和几何保真度优于现有方法，LPIPS降低达28%，生成时间一致的衣物动态，实时渲染速度超过60 FPS。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要高真实感、实时渲染的穿衣数字人创建（如虚拟试衣、影视特效、VR/AR应用）提供了可分离、物理可信的解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将规范空间分离表示与物理初始化结合，可能应用于其他可变形物体（如毛发、流体）的神经渲染。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于SMPL模型和网格初始化，对非标准体型或极端衣物的泛化能力待验证；物理约束增加了优化复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将拓扑感知初始化与神经渲染结合，用于其他非刚性物体的动态重建；多通道合成思路可迁移到透明或多层材质渲染。

idea_spark.idea: 将规范空间分离表示与物理初始化结合，可能应用于其他可变形物体（如毛发、流体）的神经渲染。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于SMPL模型和网格初始化，对非标准体型或极端衣物的泛化能力待验证；物理约束增加了优化复杂度。

en.tldr: Cloth-HUGS is a Gaussian Splatting-based neural rendering framework for photorealistic clothed human reconstruction that explicitly disentangles body and clothing using separate Gaussian layers.
en.motivation: Prior methods absorb clothing into a single body representation, struggling with loose garments and complex deformations, necessitating an approach that explicitly separates cloth and body for improved realism.
en.method: Uses separate Gaussian layers for body and cloth in a shared canonical space; deforms via SMPL-driven articulation with learned linear blend skinning weights; initializes cloth Gaussians from mesh topology and applies physics-inspired constraints (simulation-consistency, ARAP regularization, mask supervision); employs a depth-aware multi-pass rendering strategy for compositing.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on multiple benchmarks in perceptual quality and geometric fidelity, reducing LPIPS by up to 28%, producing temporally coherent cloth dynamics, and enabling real-time rendering at over 60 FPS.
en.help_to_user: Provides a separable, physically plausible solution for creating high-fidelity, real-time clothed digital humans (e.g., virtual try-on, film VFX, VR/AR applications).

idea_spark.idea: Coupling canonical space disentanglement with physics-aware initialization could be applied to neural rendering of other deformable objects (e.g., hair, fluids).
idea_spark.risk: Reliance on SMPL model and mesh initialization may limit generalization to non-standard body shapes or extreme clothing; physics constraints increase optimization complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining topology-aware initialization with neural rendering for dynamic reconstruction of other non-rigid objects; multi-pass compositing approach could transfer to rendering transparent or multi-layer materials.

papers.title: A numerical approach to the co-design of PID controllers and low-pass filters for time-delay systems
papers.summary: This paper addresses the numerical optimization of proportional-integral-derivative (PID) controllers for linear time-invariant systems with delays, where the derivative action is implemented using a low-pass filter. While performance assessment is often based on the spectral abscissa of the ideal PID-controlled system, the inclusion of a derivative filter fundamentally alters the closed-loop spectral properties and cannot be treated as a post-processing step. In particular, the spectral abscissa of the filtered closed-loop system may differ significantly from that of its unfiltered counterpart, potentially affecting both stability and performance. We propose a systematic numerical design framework in which the PID gains and the filter constant are optimized simultaneously by directly minimizing the spectral abscissa of the filtered closed-loop system. Treating the filter as an integral part of the control design allows us to reconcile robustness at high frequencies, in the sense of mitigating fragility issues due to approximate identities, with performance at low frequencies, in addition to counter measurement noise amplification. At the end of the presentation, numerical examples illustrate the proposed approach and highlight the benefits of controller-filter co-design. The results apply to general linear systems with input and/or state delays and are valid for both single-input single-output (SISO) and multi-input multi-output (MIMO) configurations.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种同时优化PID控制器增益和低通滤波器常数的数值设计框架，通过直接最小化滤波后闭环系统的谱横坐标，解决时滞系统的控制器-滤波器协同设计问题。
ai.motivation: 在带有时滞的线性时不变系统中，使用低通滤波器实现微分动作会从根本上改变闭环系统的频谱特性，不能作为后处理步骤处理。传统基于理想PID控制系统谱横坐标的性能评估方法可能因滤波器引入而显著影响稳定性和性能。
ai.method: 提出系统化的数值设计框架，将PID增益和滤波器常数作为优化变量，通过直接最小化滤波后闭环系统的谱横坐标进行同步优化，将滤波器视为控制设计的组成部分。
ai.result: 数值示例表明，所提出的控制器-滤波器协同设计方法能够协调高频鲁棒性（缓解近似恒等式导致的脆弱性问题）和低频性能，同时抑制测量噪声放大。该方法适用于具有输入和/或状态时滞的一般线性系统，对SISO和MIMO配置均有效。
ai.help_to_user: 为时滞系统的PID控制器和滤波器设计提供了系统的数值优化方法，解决了传统分离设计可能导致的稳定性和性能问题。

idea_spark.idea: 通过直接优化滤波后系统的谱特性来统一处理鲁棒性和性能指标
idea_spark.risk: 数值优化过程可能陷入局部最优，且计算复杂度随系统维度增加
idea_spark.inspiration: 这种协同设计框架可扩展到其他类型的控制器和滤波器组合，或应用于非线性时滞系统

en.tldr: This paper proposes a numerical design framework that simultaneously optimizes PID controller gains and low-pass filter constants by directly minimizing the spectral abscissa of the filtered closed-loop system, addressing controller-filter co-design for time-delay systems.
en.motivation: In linear time-invariant systems with delays, implementing derivative action using a low-pass filter fundamentally alters the closed-loop spectral properties and cannot be treated as post-processing. Traditional performance assessment based on the spectral abscissa of ideal PID-controlled systems may be significantly affected by filter inclusion, impacting both stability and performance.
en.method: A systematic numerical design framework is proposed where PID gains and filter constant are optimized simultaneously by directly minimizing the spectral abscissa of the filtered closed-loop system, treating the filter as an integral part of the control design.
en.result: Numerical examples demonstrate that the proposed controller-filter co-design approach reconciles robustness at high frequencies (mitigating fragility issues due to approximate identities) with performance at low frequencies, while countering measurement noise amplification. The method applies to general linear systems with input and/or state delays and is valid for both SISO and MIMO configurations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic numerical optimization method for PID controller and filter design in time-delay systems, addressing stability and performance issues that may arise from traditional separate design approaches.

idea_spark.idea: Unifying robustness and performance metrics by directly optimizing spectral properties of the filtered system
idea_spark.risk: Numerical optimization may converge to local minima, with computational complexity increasing with system dimension
idea_spark.inspiration: This co-design framework could be extended to other controller-filter combinations or applied to nonlinear time-delay systems

papers.title: Improving Reasoning Capabilities in Small Models through Mixture-of-Layers Distillation with Stepwise Attention on Key Information
papers.summary: The significant computational demands of large language models have increased interest in distilling reasoning abilities into smaller models via Chain-of-Thought (CoT) distillation. Current CoT distillation methods mainly focus on transferring teacher-generated rationales for complex reasoning to student models. However, they do not adequately explore teachers' dynamic attention toward critical information during reasoning. We find that language models exhibit progressive attention shifts towards key information during reasoning, which implies essential clues for drawing conclusions. Building on this observation and analysis, we introduce a novel CoT distillation framework that transfers the teacher's stepwise attention on key information to the student model. This establishes structured guidance for the student's progressive concentration on key information during reasoning. More importantly, we develop a Mixture of Layers module enabling dynamic alignment that adapts to different layers between the teacher and student. Our method achieves consistent performance improvements across multiple mathematical and commonsense reasoning datasets. To our knowledge, it is the first method to leverage stepwise attention within CoT distillation to improve small model reasoning.

ai.tldr: 提出一种新颖的思维链蒸馏框架，通过转移教师模型对关键信息的逐步注意力，并引入混合层模块实现动态对齐，以提升小模型的推理能力。
ai.motivation: 现有思维链蒸馏方法主要转移教师生成的推理过程，但未充分探索教师在推理过程中对关键信息的动态注意力模式。研究发现语言模型在推理时注意力会逐步向关键信息转移，这蕴含了得出结论的重要线索。
ai.method: 引入一个思维链蒸馏框架，将教师模型对关键信息的逐步注意力转移给学生模型，为学生模型在推理过程中逐步聚焦关键信息提供结构化指导。开发混合层模块，实现适应师生不同层的动态对齐。
ai.result: 在多个数学和常识推理数据集上取得了一致的性能提升。据我们所知，这是首个在思维链蒸馏中利用逐步注意力来改进小模型推理的方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为希望将大语言模型的复杂推理能力高效蒸馏到小模型的研究者提供了一种新框架，特别关注注意力转移的动态过程。

idea_spark.idea: 将推理过程视为对关键信息的渐进式聚焦，并通过蒸馏固化这一模式。
idea_spark.risk: 注意力模式的提取与对齐可能依赖于特定任务或模型架构，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索其他动态行为（如激活模式、梯度流）的蒸馏，或将该框架应用于多模态推理任务。

zh.tldr: 提出一种新颖的思维链蒸馏框架，通过转移教师模型对关键信息的逐步注意力，并引入混合层模块实现动态对齐，以提升小模型的推理能力。
zh.motivation: 现有思维链蒸馏方法主要转移教师生成的推理过程，但未充分探索教师在推理过程中对关键信息的动态注意力模式。研究发现语言模型在推理时注意力会逐步向关键信息转移，这蕴含了得出结论的重要线索。
zh.method: 引入一个思维链蒸馏框架，将教师模型对关键信息的逐步注意力转移给学生模型，为学生模型在推理过程中逐步聚焦关键信息提供结构化指导。开发混合层模块，实现适应师生不同层的动态对齐。
zh.result: 在多个数学和常识推理数据集上取得了一致的性能提升。据我们所知，这是首个在思维链蒸馏中利用逐步注意力来改进小模型推理的方法。
zh.help_to_user: 为希望将大语言模型的复杂推理能力高效蒸馏到小模型的研究者提供了一种新框架，特别关注注意力转移的动态过程。

idea_spark.idea: 将推理过程视为对关键信息的渐进式聚焦，并通过蒸馏固化这一模式。
idea_spark.risk: 注意力模式的提取与对齐可能依赖于特定任务或模型架构，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索其他动态行为（如激活模式、梯度流）的蒸馏，或将该框架应用于多模态推理任务。

en.tldr: Proposes a novel Chain-of-Thought distillation framework that transfers the teacher's stepwise attention on key information to the student, and introduces a Mixture of Layers module for dynamic alignment, to improve reasoning in small models.
en.motivation: Current CoT distillation methods mainly transfer teacher-generated rationales but inadequately explore the teacher's dynamic attention toward critical information during reasoning. We find language models exhibit progressive attention shifts towards key information, implying essential clues for conclusions.
en.method: Introduce a CoT distillation framework that transfers the teacher's stepwise attention on key information to the student, providing structured guidance for the student's progressive concentration. Develop a Mixture of Layers module enabling dynamic alignment adaptable to different layers between teacher and student.
en.result: Achieves consistent performance improvements across multiple mathematical and commonsense reasoning datasets. To our knowledge, it is the first method to leverage stepwise attention within CoT distillation to improve small model reasoning.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new framework for researchers aiming to efficiently distill complex reasoning abilities from large to small language models, with a specific focus on the dynamic process of attention shift.

idea_spark.idea: View reasoning as a progressive focus on key information and solidify this pattern through distillation.
idea_spark.risk: Extraction and alignment of attention patterns may depend on specific tasks or architectures, requiring validation of generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore distilling other dynamic behaviors (e.g., activation patterns, gradient flow) or applying the framework to multimodal reasoning tasks.

papers.title: IA-CLAHE: Image-Adaptive Clip Limit Estimation for CLAHE
papers.summary: This paper proposes image-adaptive contrast limited adaptive histogram equalization (IA-CLAHE). Conventional CLAHE is widely used to boost the performance of various computer vision tasks and to improve visual quality for human perception in practical industrial applications. CLAHE applies contrast limited histogram equalization to each local region to enhance local contrast. However, CLAHE often leads to over-enhancement, because the contrast-limiting parameter clip limit is fixed regardless of the histogram distribution of each local region. Our IA-CLAHE addresses this limitation by adaptively estimating tile-wise clip limits from the input image. To achieve this, we train a lightweight clip limits estimator with a differentiable extension of CLAHE, enabling end-to-end optimization. Unlike prior learning-based CLAHE methods, IA-CLAHE does not require pre-searched ground-truth clip limits or task-specific datasets, because it learns to map input image histograms toward a domain-invariant uniform distribution, enabling zero-shot generalization across diverse conditions. Experimental results show that IA-CLAHE consistently improves recognition performance, while simultaneously enhancing visual quality for human perception, without requiring any task-specific training data.

ai.tldr: 本文提出IA-CLAHE，一种图像自适应的CLAHE方法，通过可微扩展训练轻量级裁剪限制估计器，实现端到端优化，无需任务特定数据即可提升视觉质量和识别性能。
ai.motivation: 传统CLAHE的裁剪限制参数固定，不考虑局部区域直方图分布，常导致过度增强。需要一种能自适应估计局部裁剪限制的方法。
ai.method: 训练一个轻量级裁剪限制估计器，通过CLAHE的可微扩展实现端到端优化，学习将输入图像直方图映射到域不变均匀分布。
ai.result: IA-CLAHE在提升识别性能的同时增强了人类感知的视觉质量，且无需任务特定训练数据，实现了跨多样条件的零样本泛化。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需预搜索真实裁剪限制或任务特定数据集的自适应对比度增强方法，适用于各种计算机视觉任务和工业应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将图像直方图映射到域不变均匀分布作为学习目标，避免对特定数据集的依赖
idea_spark.risk: 轻量级估计器可能无法充分捕捉复杂图像的局部统计特性
idea_spark.inspiration: 类似方法可应用于其他有固定参数的图像处理算法，使其自适应化

en.tldr: This paper proposes IA-CLAHE, an image-adaptive CLAHE method that trains a lightweight clip limit estimator via a differentiable extension for end-to-end optimization, improving visual quality and recognition performance without task-specific data.
en.motivation: Conventional CLAHE uses a fixed clip limit regardless of local histogram distributions, often causing over-enhancement. An adaptive method for estimating tile-wise clip limits is needed.
en.method: Train a lightweight clip limit estimator with a differentiable extension of CLAHE, enabling end-to-end optimization by learning to map input image histograms toward a domain-invariant uniform distribution.
en.result: IA-CLAHE consistently improves recognition performance while enhancing visual quality for human perception, achieving zero-shot generalization across diverse conditions without task-specific training data.
en.help_to_user: Provides an adaptive contrast enhancement method that requires no pre-searched ground-truth clip limits or task-specific datasets, applicable to various computer vision tasks and industrial applications.

idea_spark.idea: Using domain-invariant uniform distribution as learning target for histogram mapping to avoid dataset dependency
idea_spark.risk: Lightweight estimator may not fully capture local statistics of complex images
idea_spark.inspiration: Similar approach could be applied to other image processing algorithms with fixed parameters to make them adaptive

papers.title: Capillary quermassintegral inequalities in the unit ball
papers.summary: This paper is about hypersurfaces with boundary lying in the Euclidean unit ball, which meet the unit sphere at a fixed angle $θ\in(0,\fracπ{2}]$. Such hypersurfaces are called $θ$-capillary hypersurfaces and for those we introduce a new notion of convexity, which we call $θ$-horocap-convexity. For such hypersurfaces, we prove the convergence of a curvature flow of Guan/Li type with capillary boundary. Remarkably, we prove this result for a class of curvature functions which include all quotients of symmetric polynomials and, as a consequence, we obtain the full set of quermassintegral inequalities in the $θ$-horocap-convex case. In the strictly horocap-convex setting, we employ the flow to prove the geometric inequalities, while for the horocap-convex case and the characterization of the equality case, we develop new arguments which are interesting in their own right.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了单位球内边界与球面成固定角的超曲面（θ-毛细超曲面），引入θ-水平凸概念，证明了一类Guan/Li型曲率流的收敛性，并由此导出了完整的曲率测度不等式。
ai.motivation: 在毛细边界条件下，建立超曲面的几何不等式并刻画等号成立情形是几何分析中的核心问题。
ai.method: 引入θ-水平凸性新概念；对包含对称多项式商的一类曲率函数，证明毛细边界曲率流的收敛性；在严格水平凸情形用流证明不等式，在一般水平凸情形发展新论证。
ai.result: 证明了θ-水平凸超曲面的全部曲率测度不等式，并处理了等号刻画问题。
ai.help_to_user: 为毛细边界几何不等式提供了统一的框架和证明工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将水平凸性与毛细条件结合，构造适用于曲率流的几何设定。
idea_spark.risk: 非严格凸情形的等号刻画需发展非流方法，论证复杂度高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 对称多项式商的曲率函数类具有良好代数结构，可能启发更一般的曲率泛函研究。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了单位球内边界与球面成固定角的超曲面（θ-毛细超曲面），引入θ-水平凸概念，证明了一类Guan/Li型曲率流的收敛性，并由此导出了完整的曲率测度不等式。

zh.method: 引入θ-水平凸性新概念；对包含对称多项式商的一类曲率函数，证明毛细边界曲率流的收敛性；在严格水平凸情形用流证明不等式，在一般水平凸情形发展新论证。

zh.help_to_user: 为毛细边界几何不等式提供了统一的框架和证明工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将水平凸性与毛细条件结合，构造适用于曲率流的几何设定。
idea_spark.risk: 非严格凸情形的等号刻画需发展非流方法，论证复杂度高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 对称多项式商的曲率函数类具有良好代数结构，可能启发更一般的曲率泛函研究。

en.tldr: This paper studies hypersurfaces in the unit ball meeting the sphere at a fixed angle (θ-capillary), introduces θ-horocap-convexity, proves convergence of a Guan/Li-type curvature flow with capillary boundary for a class of curvature functions including quotients of symmetric polynomials, and derives the full set of quermassintegral inequalities.
en.motivation: Establishing geometric inequalities for hypersurfaces with capillary boundary conditions and characterizing equality cases are central problems in geometric analysis.
en.method: Introduces the new concept of θ-horocap-convexity; proves convergence of a capillary boundary curvature flow for a class of curvature functions containing all quotients of symmetric polynomials; uses the flow to prove inequalities in the strictly horocap-convex case and develops new arguments for the general horocap-convex case and equality characterization.
en.result: Obtains the complete set of quermassintegral inequalities for θ-horocap-convex hypersurfaces and addresses the equality case characterization.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified framework and proof tools for geometric inequalities with capillary boundary conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Combining horocap-convexity with capillary conditions to create a geometric setting amenable to curvature flows.
idea_spark.risk: Characterizing equality in the non-strictly convex case requires non-flow arguments of high complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: The class of curvature functions as quotients of symmetric polynomials has rich algebraic structure, potentially inspiring study of more general curvature functionals.

papers.title: FineSteer: A Unified Framework for Fine-Grained Inference-Time Steering in Large Language Models
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) often exhibit undesirable behaviors, such as safety violations and hallucinations. Although inference-time steering offers a cost-effective way to adjust model behavior without updating its parameters, existing methods often fail to be simultaneously effective, utility-preserving, and training-efficient due to their rigid, one-size-fits-all designs and limited adaptability. In this work, we present FineSteer, a novel steering framework that decomposes inference-time steering into two complementary stages: conditional steering and fine-grained vector synthesis, allowing fine-grained control over when and how to steer internal representations. In the first stage, we introduce a Subspace-guided Conditional Steering (SCS) mechanism that preserves model utility by avoiding unnecessary steering. In the second stage, we propose a Mixture-of-Steering-Experts (MoSE) mechanism that captures the multimodal nature of desired steering behaviors and generates query-specific steering vectors for improved effectiveness. Through tailored designs in both SCS and MoSE, FineSteer maintains robust performance on general queries while adaptively optimizing steering vectors for targeted inputs in a training-efficient manner. Extensive experiments on safety and truthfulness benchmarks show that FineSteer outperforms state-of-the-art methods in overall performance, achieving stronger steering performance with minimal utility loss. Code is available at https://github.com/YukinoAsuna/FineSteer

ai.tldr: FineSteer是一个用于大语言模型细粒度推理时引导的统一框架，通过条件引导和细粒度向量合成两阶段设计，在保持模型通用能力的同时有效纠正安全违规和幻觉问题。
ai.motivation: 现有推理时引导方法往往无法同时满足有效性、效用保持和训练效率，因为它们采用僵化的通用设计且适应性有限。
ai.method: 框架分为两个互补阶段：1) 子空间引导条件引导(SCS)，避免不必要的引导以保持模型效用；2) 混合引导专家(MoSE)，捕捉期望引导行为的多模态特性，生成查询特定的引导向量。
ai.result: 在安全和真实性基准测试中，FineSteer优于现有方法，在最小效用损失下实现更强的引导性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需更新模型参数即可精细调整LLM行为的高效方法，特别适用于需要平衡安全性和实用性的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将引导决策与引导执行解耦，前者保护通用能力，后者针对特定问题优化。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于对内部表示空间的准确理解，可能对黑盒模型适用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将混合专家架构用于生成干预信号，而非直接生成内容。

zh.tldr: FineSteer是一个用于大语言模型细粒度推理时引导的统一框架，通过条件引导和细粒度向量合成两阶段设计，在保持模型通用能力的同时有效纠正安全违规和幻觉问题。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将混合专家架构用于生成干预信号，而非直接生成内容。

en.tldr: FineSteer is a unified framework for fine-grained inference-time steering in LLMs, using a two-stage design of conditional steering and fine-grained vector synthesis to effectively correct safety violations and hallucinations while preserving general capabilities.
en.motivation: Existing inference-time steering methods often fail to be simultaneously effective, utility-preserving, and training-efficient due to rigid, one-size-fits-all designs and limited adaptability.
en.method: The framework decomposes steering into two complementary stages: 1) Subspace-guided Conditional Steering (SCS) preserves utility by avoiding unnecessary steering; 2) Mixture-of-Steering-Experts (MoSE) captures multimodal steering behaviors and generates query-specific steering vectors.
en.result: Extensive experiments on safety and truthfulness benchmarks show FineSteer outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving stronger steering with minimal utility loss.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient method to finely adjust LLM behavior without updating parameters, particularly useful for scenarios requiring balance between safety and utility.

idea_spark.idea: Decoupling steering decision from steering execution protects general capabilities while optimizing for targeted issues.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on accurate understanding of internal representation spaces, potentially limited for black-box models.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires using mixture-of-experts architecture for generating intervention signals rather than direct content generation.

papers.title: CLIMB: Controllable Longitudinal Brain Image Generation using Mamba-based Latent Diffusion Model and Gaussian-aligned Autoencoder
papers.summary: Latent diffusion models have emerged as powerful generative models in medical imaging, enabling the synthesis of high quality brain magnetic resonance imaging scans. In particular, predicting the evolution of a patients brain can aid in early intervention, prognosis, and treatment planning. In this study, we introduce CLIMB, Controllable Longitudinal brain Image generation via state space based latent diffusion model, an advanced framework for modeling temporal changes in brain structure. CLIMB is designed to model the structural evolution of the brain structure over time, utilizing a baseline MRI scan and its acquisition age as foundational inputs. Additionally, multiple conditional variables, including projected age, gender, disease status, genetic information, and brain structure volumes, are incorporated to enhance the temporal modeling of anatomical changes. Unlike existing LDM methods that rely on self attention modules, which effectively capture contextual information from input images but are computationally expensive, our approach leverages state space, a state space model architecture that substantially reduces computational overhead while preserving high-quality image synthesis. Furthermore, we introduce a Gaussian-aligned autoencoder that extracts latent representations conforming to prior distributions without the sampling noise inherent in conventional variational autoencoders. We train and evaluate our proposed model on the Alzheimers Disease Neuroimaging Initiative dataset, consisting of 6,306 MRI scans from 1,390 participants. By comparing generated images with real MRI scans, CLIMB achieves a structural similarity index of 0.9433, demonstrating notable improvements over existing methods.

ai.tldr: CLIMB是一种基于状态空间模型和潜在扩散模型的可控纵向脑图像生成框架，利用高斯对齐自编码器提取潜在表示，在ADNI数据集上实现了高质量的脑结构演化预测。
ai.motivation: 预测患者大脑结构随时间的演化有助于早期干预、预后评估和治疗规划，现有基于自注意力的潜在扩散模型计算成本高，需要更高效的生成方法。
ai.method: 提出CLIMB框架：使用状态空间模型替代自注意力模块降低计算开销；设计高斯对齐自编码器提取符合先验分布的潜在表示；以基线MRI扫描和采集年龄为基础输入，结合投影年龄、性别、疾病状态等多条件变量建模解剖结构变化。
ai.result: 在ADNI数据集（1,390名参与者的6,306次MRI扫描）上训练评估，生成图像与真实MRI的结构相似性指数达0.9433，优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究人员提供高效的纵向脑图像生成工具，支持多条件控制的大脑结构演化模拟，可用于疾病进展研究和临床决策辅助。

idea_spark.idea: 将状态空间模型与扩散模型结合用于动态医学图像生成；通过多模态条件（遗传信息、脑结构体积）增强解剖变化建模的准确性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型性能高度依赖ADNI数据集的分布，泛化至其他人群或疾病类型需验证；多条件控制的临床可解释性有待深入评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将轻量级序列建模架构（如Mamba）与生成模型结合，为计算资源受限的医疗场景提供可行方案；多条件控制框架可扩展至其他器官的纵向影像分析。

en.tldr: CLIMB is a controllable longitudinal brain image generation framework using a state space-based latent diffusion model and Gaussian-aligned autoencoder, achieving high-quality prediction of brain structure evolution on the ADNI dataset.
en.motivation: Predicting the evolution of brain structure over time aids early intervention, prognosis, and treatment planning; existing self-attention-based latent diffusion models are computationally expensive, necessitating more efficient generation methods.
en.method: Propose CLIMB framework: replace self-attention modules with state space models to reduce computational overhead; design Gaussian-aligned autoencoder to extract latent representations conforming to prior distributions; use baseline MRI scans and acquisition age as foundational inputs, incorporating multiple conditional variables (projected age, gender, disease status, etc.) to model anatomical changes.
en.result: Trained and evaluated on the ADNI dataset (6,306 MRI scans from 1,390 participants), achieving a structural similarity index of 0.9433 between generated and real MRI scans, outperforming existing methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides researchers with an efficient longitudinal brain image generation tool supporting multi-condition controlled simulation of brain structure evolution, applicable to disease progression studies and clinical decision support.

idea_spark.idea: Combine state space models with diffusion models for dynamic medical image generation; enhance anatomical change modeling accuracy through multimodal conditions (genetic information, brain structure volumes).
idea_spark.risk: Model performance heavily depends on the ADNI dataset distribution; generalization to other populations or disease types requires validation; clinical interpretability of multi-condition controls needs further assessment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires integrating lightweight sequence modeling architectures (e.g., Mamba) with generative models for computationally constrained medical scenarios; the multi-condition control framework can extend to longitudinal imaging analysis of other organs.

papers.title: Ranking XAI Methods for Head and Neck Cancer Outcome Prediction
papers.summary: For head and neck cancer (HNC) patients, prognostic outcome prediction can support personalized treatment strategy selection. Improving prediction performance of HNC outcomes has been extensively explored by using advanced artificial intelligence (AI) techniques on PET/CT data. However, the interpretability of AI remains a critical obstacle for its clinical adoption. Unlike previous HNC studies that empirically selected explainable AI (XAI) techniques, we are the first to comprehensively evaluate and rank 13 XAI methods across 24 metrics, covering faithfulness, robustness, complexity and plausibility. Experimental results on the multi-center HECKTOR challenge dataset show large variations across evaluation aspects among different XAI methods, with Integrated Gradients (IG) and DeepLIFT (DL) consistently obtained high rankings for faithfulness, complexity and plausibility. This work highlights the importance of comprehensive XAI method evaluation and can be extended to other medical imaging tasks.

ai.tldr: 本研究首次对13种可解释AI方法在头颈癌预后预测任务上进行了全面评估与排名，覆盖忠实性、鲁棒性、复杂性和合理性四个维度共24项指标。
ai.motivation: AI模型在头颈癌预后预测中性能不断提升，但其可解释性不足阻碍了临床落地。以往研究凭经验选择XAI方法，缺乏系统性评估。
ai.method: 使用多中心HECKTOR挑战赛数据集，对13种XAI方法在24项指标上进行评估，指标涵盖忠实性、鲁棒性、复杂性和合理性四大方面。
ai.result: 不同XAI方法在各评估维度表现差异显著，其中Integrated Gradients和DeepLIFT在忠实性、复杂性和合理性方面 consistently 获得高排名。
ai.help_to_user: 为医学影像任务中的XAI方法选择提供了系统性评估框架和实证参考，可支持临床决策中更可靠的可解释性工具选用。

idea_spark.idea: 开发自动化XAI评估平台，根据具体临床任务需求（如外科规划、放疗响应预测）推荐最优解释方法。
idea_spark.risk: 评估结果可能受数据集特性（如模态组合、标注一致性）影响，需在不同临床中心验证普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将多维度评估结果与临床医生认知负荷研究结合，优化解释呈现方式以提升临床决策效率。
