en.tldr: This study first comprehensively evaluates and ranks 13 XAI methods for head and neck cancer outcome prediction across 24 metrics covering faithfulness, robustness, complexity, and plausibility.
en.motivation: While AI performance in HNC prognosis has improved, lack of interpretability hinders clinical adoption. Previous studies selected XAI methods empirically without systematic evaluation.
en.method: Evaluated 13 XAI methods using the multi-center HECKTOR challenge dataset across 24 metrics spanning faithfulness, robustness, complexity, and plausibility dimensions.
en.result: Large variations observed across evaluation aspects among XAI methods, with Integrated Gradients and DeepLIFT consistently achieving high rankings for faithfulness, complexity, and plausibility.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic evaluation framework and empirical reference for XAI method selection in medical imaging tasks, supporting more reliable interpretability tools for clinical decision-making.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an automated XAI evaluation platform that recommends optimal explanation methods based on specific clinical task requirements (e.g., surgical planning, radiotherapy response prediction).
idea_spark.risk: Evaluation results may be influenced by dataset characteristics (e.g., modality combinations, annotation consistency), requiring validation across different clinical centers for generalizability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine multi-dimensional evaluation results with studies on clinician cognitive load to optimize explanation presentation for improved clinical decision efficiency.

papers.title: Rate-Distortion Theory for Deductive Sources under Closure Fidelity
papers.summary: We study lossy compression of a finite statement source generated in a fixed deductive environment. The source symbols are statements in a knowledge base endowed with a proof system, and reconstruction fidelity is measured by preservation of deductive closure rather than by symbolwise equality. This induces, once the proof system and canonical order are fixed, a decomposition of the source into an irredundant core and redundant stored consequences. Under a natural disjointness condition on zero-distortion reconstruction sets, we show that the minimum zero-distortion rate equals the source mass of the core times the entropy of the source conditioned on that core. For reconstruction alphabets contained in the deductive closure of the source knowledge base, we further prove that the full rate-distortion function depends only on the core, so redundant states are invisible to both rate and distortion. When the decoder is limited to a bounded number of inference steps, we obtain an exact fixed depth rate-delay-distortion characterization. Under an additional order-robustness assumption identifying the chosen core with the order-free essential set, this characterization interpolates between classical symbolwise compression and unconstrained deductive compression. These results formulate deductive compression as a structured source coding problem and quantify how shared inference structure changes the fundamental limits of communication.

ai.tldr: 研究在固定演绎环境下生成的有限陈述源的率失真理论，其中重建保真度由演绎闭包的保持而非符号相等性来衡量。
ai.motivation: 传统率失真理论基于符号相等性度量失真，不适用于需要保持逻辑推理关系的知识库压缩场景。
ai.method: 将源分解为不可约核心和冗余存储结果，在证明系统和规范序固定的条件下，分析零失真率的最小值，并研究解码器推理步数受限时的率-延迟-失真特性。
ai.result: 证明了最小零失真率等于核心的源质量乘以给定该核心的源熵；当重建字母表包含在源知识库的演绎闭包中时，完整的率失真函数仅依赖于核心；在推理步数受限时获得了精确的固定深度率-延迟-失真表征。
ai.help_to_user: 为基于逻辑推理的知识压缩提供了理论基础，量化了共享推理结构如何改变通信的基本极限。

idea_spark.idea: 开发针对特定领域逻辑语言（如一阶逻辑片段）的高效压缩算法，或设计支持增量推理的压缩编解码器。
idea_spark.risk: 实际知识库可能不满足论文中的不相交性或序鲁棒性假设，导致理论界限与实用性能存在差距。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考如何压缩大型语言模型中的知识，使其在有限推理步数下仍能保持输出的一致性逻辑闭包。

en.tldr: Studies rate-distortion theory for finite statement sources generated in a fixed deductive environment, where reconstruction fidelity is measured by preservation of deductive closure rather than symbolwise equality.
en.motivation: Classical rate-distortion theory measures distortion via symbolwise equality, which is inadequate for compressing knowledge bases where logical entailment relationships must be preserved.
en.method: Decomposes the source into an irredundant core and redundant stored consequences. Under fixed proof system and canonical order, analyzes the minimum zero-distortion rate and characterizes rate-delay-distortion when the decoder's inference steps are bounded.
en.result: Shows the minimum zero-distortion rate equals the source mass of the core times the entropy of the source conditioned on that core. For reconstruction alphabets within the deductive closure, the full rate-distortion function depends only on the core. Obtains an exact fixed-depth rate-delay-distortion characterization under inference step limits.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for compressing knowledge based on logical reasoning, quantifying how shared inference structure alters the fundamental limits of communication.

idea_spark.idea: Develop efficient compression algorithms for specific domain-specific logical languages (e.g., fragments of first-order logic), or design compression codecs that support incremental inference.
idea_spark.risk: Real-world knowledge bases may not satisfy the paper's disjointness or order-robustness assumptions, leading to gaps between theoretical bounds and practical performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires thinking about how to compress knowledge in large language models so that consistent logical closure of outputs can be maintained under limited inference steps.

papers.title: A fractional De Giorgi isoperimetric type inequality
papers.summary: We establish an isoperimetric type inequality for the level sets of functions in fractional Sobolev spaces. This answers a question posed by the first author in a previous paper. To obtain it, we work out a slight modification of some estimates for nonlocal interaction functionals established by Savin and Valdinoci. We also show how said isoperimetric inequality leads to the Hölder continuity of functions in (weak) fractional De Giorgi classes.

ai.tldr: 本文建立了分数阶Sobolev空间中函数水平集的等周型不等式，并由此推导出弱分数阶De Giorgi类函数的Hölder连续性。
ai.motivation: 回答第一作者先前论文中提出的关于分数阶Sobolev空间水平集等周不等式的问题。
ai.method: 对Savin和Valdinoci建立的非局部相互作用泛函估计进行轻微修改，并利用所得等周不等式进行分析。
ai.result: 证明了分数阶Sobolev空间水平集的等周型不等式，并得出弱分数阶De Giorgi类函数具有Hölder连续性。
ai.help_to_user: 为分数阶空间中的等周不等式和正则性理论提供了严格证明，推进了非局部泛函分析的理论框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将经典De Giorgi类理论推广至分数阶情形，建立水平集几何测度与函数正则性的联系。
idea_spark.risk: 证明强烈依赖于特定非局部估计，推广至更一般非线性算子可能需要新方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发研究其他分数阶函数空间（如Besov空间）的等周不等式与正则性关系。

en.tldr: This paper establishes an isoperimetric-type inequality for level sets of functions in fractional Sobolev spaces and deduces Hölder continuity for functions in weak fractional De Giorgi classes.
en.motivation: To answer a question posed by the first author in a previous paper regarding isoperimetric inequalities for level sets in fractional Sobolev spaces.
en.method: A slight modification of estimates for nonlocal interaction functionals established by Savin and Valdinoci, followed by application of the resulting isoperimetric inequality.
en.result: Proved an isoperimetric-type inequality for level sets in fractional Sobolev spaces and established Hölder continuity for functions in weak fractional De Giorgi classes.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous proofs for isoperimetric inequalities and regularity theory in fractional spaces, advancing the theoretical framework of nonlocal functional analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Extend classical De Giorgi class theory to the fractional setting, linking geometric measure of level sets with function regularity.
idea_spark.risk: Proofs heavily rely on specific nonlocal estimates; generalization to more general nonlinear operators may require new methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires investigation of isoperimetric inequalities and regularity relationships in other fractional function spaces (e.g., Besov spaces).

papers.title: Direct and Ambient Backscatter Communications with a Dual-Function Radar Transmitter
papers.summary: This work considers a system where a dual-function radar transmitter (source) performs direct communication with a reader while simultaneously enabling ambient backscatter communication from a tag. The source embeds its message into a coded pulse repeatedly transmitted over a frame, whereas the tag exploits the resulting environmental reverberation (clutter) as an ambient carrier to convey its own message. By leveraging the structure induced by the radar waveforms, we develop two signaling schemes. In the pilot-free scheme, the source and tag messages are conveyed through nonlinear vector modulation; the induced subspace structure enables both joint decoding, where all unknown quantities are simultaneously estimated, and disjoint decoding, where the tag codeword is recovered first, followed by the estimation of the source codeword and the channel vectors. In the pilot-aided scheme, pilot symbols and linearly modulated data symbols are embedded within each frame, enabling both non-iterative decoding based on pilot-derived channel estimates and iterative decoding via alternating channel estimation and data detection. We establish sufficient conditions on the source and tag codebooks that guarantee noiseless identifiability of the involved messages and channels. Finally, performance is evaluated in terms of source/tag error probabilities and channel-estimation accuracy, and the resulting system-level tradeoffs are discussed.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一种双功能雷达发射机系统，该发射机在直接与阅读器通信的同时，为标签提供环境反向散射通信的载波。
ai.motivation: 探索雷达发射机在通信与感知融合场景下的新应用，利用雷达波形结构同时支持直接通信和环境反向散射通信，提高频谱和硬件效率。
ai.method: 提出了两种信令方案：无导频方案采用非线性矢量调制，利用诱导的子空间结构实现联合解码或分离解码；导频辅助方案在每个帧中嵌入导频符号和线性调制数据符号，支持基于导频的信道估计非迭代解码，以及通过交替信道估计与数据检测的迭代解码。
ai.result: 建立了保证消息和信道可无噪识别的码本充分条件，评估了源/标签错误概率和信道估计精度，并讨论了系统级权衡。
ai.help_to_user: 为雷达通信一体化系统设计提供了具体的信令与解码框架，展示了如何利用雷达环境混响作为环境载波实现双工通信。

idea_spark.idea: 将雷达的环境混响（杂波）重新定义为环境反向散射通信的可用载波资源。
idea_spark.risk: 实际环境中信道时变与干扰可能影响解码性能，需进一步鲁棒性设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将感知系统的固有信号特征（如雷达波形结构）转化为通信系统的可用资源或先验信息。

en.tldr: This work studies a system where a dual-function radar transmitter performs direct communication with a reader while simultaneously enabling ambient backscatter communication from a tag.
en.motivation: To explore new applications of radar transmitters in integrated sensing and communication scenarios, utilizing radar waveform structures to support both direct communication and ambient backscatter communication, thereby improving spectrum and hardware efficiency.
en.method: Two signaling schemes are developed: a pilot-free scheme using nonlinear vector modulation that leverages induced subspace structure for joint or disjoint decoding, and a pilot-aided scheme embedding pilot symbols and linearly modulated data symbols per frame, enabling both non-iterative decoding based on pilot-derived channel estimates and iterative decoding via alternating channel estimation and data detection.
en.result: Sufficient conditions on codebooks for noiseless identifiability of messages and channels are established. Performance is evaluated in terms of source/tag error probabilities and channel-estimation accuracy, with system-level tradeoffs discussed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a concrete signaling and decoding framework for dual-function radar-communication systems, demonstrating how to leverage radar environmental reverberation as an ambient carrier for duplex communications.

idea_spark.idea: Reconceptualizing radar environmental reverberation (clutter) as an available carrier resource for ambient backscatter communication.
idea_spark.risk: Channel time-variation and interference in practical environments may affect decoding performance, necessitating further robustness design.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires leveraging inherent signal characteristics of sensing systems (e.g., radar waveform structure) as usable resources or prior information for communication systems.

papers.title: Sample Is Feature: Beyond Item-Level, Toward Sample-Level Tokens for Unified Large Recommender Models
papers.summary: Scaling industrial recommender models has followed two parallel paradigms: \textbf{sample information scaling} -- enriching the information content of each training sample through deeper and longer behavior sequences -- and \textbf{model capacity scaling} -- unifying sequence modeling and feature interaction within a single Transformer backbone. However, these two paradigms still face two structural limitations. Firstly, sample information scaling methods encode only a subset of each historical interaction into the sequence token, leaving the majority of the original sample context unexploited and precluding the modeling of sample-level, time-varying features. Secondly, model capacity scaling methods are inherently constrained by the structural heterogeneity between sequential and non-sequential features, preventing the model from fully realizing its representational capacity.   To address these issues, we propose \textbf{SIF} (\emph{Sample Is Feature}), which encodes each historical Raw Sample directly into the sequence token -- maximally preserving sample information while simultaneously resolving the heterogeneity between sequential and non-sequential features. SIF consists of two key components. The \textbf{Sample Tokenizer} quantizes each historical Raw Sample into a Token Sample via hierarchical group-adaptive quantization (HGAQ), enabling full sample-level context to be incorporated into the sequence efficiently. The \textbf{SIF-Mixer} then performs deep feature interaction over the homogeneous sample representations via token-level and sample-level mixing, fully unleashing the model's representational capacity. Extensive experiments on a large-scale industrial dataset validate SIF's effectiveness, and we have successfully deployed SIF on the Meituan food delivery platform.

ai.tldr: SIF（Sample Is Feature）提出将每个历史原始样本直接编码为序列令牌，通过样本分词器和SIF-Mixer，解决了推荐模型中样本信息利用不足和特征异构的问题，并在美团外卖平台成功部署。
ai.motivation: 现有工业推荐模型扩展存在两个结构性局限：样本信息扩展方法仅编码历史交互的子集，无法利用完整样本上下文和时变特征；模型容量扩展方法受序列与非序列特征异构性限制，无法充分发挥模型表征能力。
ai.method: SIF包含两个核心组件：样本分词器通过分层组自适应量化将历史原始样本量化为令牌样本；SIF-Mixer通过令牌级和样本级混合在齐次样本表征上进行深度特征交互。
ai.result: 在大规模工业数据集上的实验验证了SIF的有效性，并已在美团外卖平台成功部署。
ai.help_to_user: 为构建统一大型推荐模型提供了新的样本编码范式，能更充分利用历史样本信息并解决特征异构问题。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发重新思考序列建模中“令牌”的定义，从项目级转向样本级，为统一特征表示开辟新路径。

en.tldr: SIF (Sample Is Feature) proposes encoding each historical raw sample directly into sequence tokens via a Sample Tokenizer and SIF-Mixer, addressing underutilization of sample information and feature heterogeneity in recommender models, and has been successfully deployed on the Meituan food delivery platform.
en.motivation: Current scaling paradigms for industrial recommender models face two structural limitations: sample information scaling methods encode only a subset of historical interactions, leaving most sample context unexploited; model capacity scaling methods are constrained by heterogeneity between sequential and non-sequential features, limiting representational capacity.
en.method: SIF consists of two key components: a Sample Tokenizer that quantizes historical raw samples into token samples via hierarchical group-adaptive quantization, and a SIF-Mixer that performs deep feature interaction through token-level and sample-level mixing over homogeneous sample representations.
en.result: Extensive experiments on a large-scale industrial dataset validate SIF's effectiveness, and it has been successfully deployed on the Meituan food delivery platform.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new sample encoding paradigm for building unified large recommender models, enabling fuller utilization of historical sample information while resolving feature heterogeneity.

idea_spark.idea: Treat each complete historical interaction record (rather than summarized features) as the fundamental input unit for the model.
idea_spark.risk: Direct encoding of raw samples may introduce noise and increase computational overhead, requiring efficient quantization and mixing mechanisms.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires rethinking the definition of 'tokens' in sequence modeling, shifting from item-level to sample-level tokens, opening new pathways for unified feature representation.

papers.title: Contact-Aware Planning and Control of Continuum Robots in Highly Constrained Environments
papers.summary: Continuum robots are well suited for navigating confined and fragile environments, such as vascular or endoluminal anatomy, where contact with surrounding structures is often unavoidable. While controlled contact can assist motion, unfavorable contact can degrade controllability, induce kinematic singularities, or introduce safety risks. We present a contact-aware planning approach that evaluates contact quality, penalizing hazardous interactions, while permitting benign contact. The planner produces kinematically feasible trajectories and contact-aware Jacobians which can be used for closed-loop control in hardware experiments. We validate the approach by testing the integrated system (planning, control, and mechanical design) on anatomical models from patient scans. The planner generates effective plans for three common anatomical environments, and, in all hardware trials, the continuum robot was able to reach the target while avoiding dangerous tip contact (100% success). Mean tracking errors were 1.9 +/- 0.5 mm, 1.2 +/- 0.1 mm, and 1.7 +/- 0.2 mm across the three different environments. Ablation studies showed that penalizing end-of-continuum-segment (ECS) contact improved manipulability and prevented hardware failures. Overall, this work enables reliable, contact-aware navigation in highly constrained environments.

ai.tldr: 提出一种用于连续体机器人在高度受限环境中的接触感知规划与控制方法，通过评估接触质量、惩罚危险交互来生成可行轨迹，并在解剖模型硬件实验中验证了有效性。
ai.motivation: 连续体机器人适合在血管等受限脆弱环境中导航，接触不可避免。有益的接触可辅助运动，但不利接触会降低可控性、引发奇异性或带来安全风险，因此需要区分接触好坏并进行规划。
ai.method: 开发接触感知规划器，评估接触质量并惩罚危险交互，同时允许良性接触。规划器生成运动学可行轨迹和接触感知雅可比矩阵，用于硬件闭环控制。在患者扫描的解剖模型上进行系统集成验证。
ai.result: 规划器在三种常见解剖环境中生成有效路径；所有硬件试验中，机器人均成功到达目标并避免危险尖端接触（成功率100%）。三种环境的平均跟踪误差分别为1.9±0.5 mm、1.2±0.1 mm和1.7±0.2 mm。消融研究表明惩罚末端接触可提高可操作性并防止硬件故障。
ai.help_to_user: 为在受限环境中操作连续体机器人提供了系统的接触感知规划与控制框架，能区分接触好坏，提升导航安全性与可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将接触分为有益与危险两类，在规划中显式处理，而非完全避免接触。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖准确的接触模型与环境几何信息；在动态或未知环境中可能需在线调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可扩展至其他柔性或软体机器人；结合力传感实现更精细的接触调节；应用于非医疗领域的受限环境探索。

en.tldr: Presents a contact-aware planning and control approach for continuum robots in highly constrained environments, evaluating contact quality and penalizing hazardous interactions to generate feasible trajectories, validated in hardware experiments on anatomical models.
en.motivation: Continuum robots are suited for navigating confined, fragile environments like vasculature, where contact is unavoidable. While controlled contact can assist motion, unfavorable contact degrades controllability, induces kinematic singularities, or poses safety risks, necessitating distinction between benign and hazardous contact.
en.method: Develops a contact-aware planner that evaluates contact quality, penalizes hazardous interactions while permitting benign contact. The planner produces kinematically feasible trajectories and contact-aware Jacobians for closed-loop control in hardware. Validates the integrated system on anatomical models from patient scans.
en.result: The planner generates effective plans for three common anatomical environments. In all hardware trials, the continuum robot reached the target while avoiding dangerous tip contact (100% success). Ablation studies showed penalizing end-of-continuum-segment contact improved manipulability and prevented hardware failures.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic contact-aware planning and control framework for operating continuum robots in constrained environments, distinguishing between beneficial and hazardous contact to enhance navigation safety and reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly categorize contact as beneficial or hazardous in planning, rather than avoiding all contact.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on accurate contact models and environmental geometry; may require online adaptation in dynamic or unknown settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extendable to other flexible or soft robots; integrate force sensing for finer contact modulation; apply to non-medical constrained environment exploration.

papers.title: Universal dualities for Wilson loops in lattice Yang-Mills
papers.summary: We identify a universal finite-$N$ structure underlying Wilson loop expectations in lattice Yang-Mills, in any dimension $d\geq 2$, for gauge group $\mathrm{U}(N)$, and for arbitrary smooth central plaquette actions. The starting point is a state-sum expansion in plaquette labels by irreducible representations, in which each term factorizes into an action-dependent spectral weight and an action-independent topological coefficient. We then analyze these coefficients in three exact ways: as a gauge/string expansion over decorated spanning surfaces, as a local spin-foam/channel model on the dual incidence graph, and as a universal finite-$N$ master loop equation that closes on the coefficient side. As a consequence, several recent Wilson-action results are recovered as specializations of our broader action-agnostic framework.

ai.tldr: 本文揭示了任意维度、任意光滑中心格点作用下的U(N)晶格杨-米尔斯理论中，Wilson圈期望值具有普适的有限N结构。
ai.motivation: 为理解晶格杨-米尔斯理论中Wilson圈的普适数学结构，超越特定作用量的限制。
ai.method: 采用不可约表示的格点和展开，将每项分解为作用量依赖的谱权重与作用量无关的拓扑系数，并通过三种精确方式分析系数：装饰跨越曲面上的规范/弦展开、对偶关联图上的局域自旋泡沫/通道模型、以及系数侧闭合的普适有限N主圈方程。
ai.result: 建立了一个与作用量无关的普适框架，将近期多个基于Wilson作用量的结果纳入为特例。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一个统一框架，可将不同晶格作用量下的Wilson圈计算纳入同一普适结构进行分析。

idea_spark.idea: 该分解与多精确表示方法（规范/弦、自旋泡沫、主方程）可用于其他格点场论或拓扑场论中类似可观测量（如‘t Hooft圈）的普适性研究。
idea_spark.risk: 对更复杂的规范群（如正交群、例外群）或非中心作用量的推广可能不直接。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发思考：是否存在其他格点模型的可观测量，其期望值可类似分解为普适拓扑因子与模型依赖因子的乘积？这种分解在连续极限下如何表现？

en.tldr: This work identifies a universal finite-N structure underlying Wilson loop expectations in lattice Yang-Mills theory for U(N) gauge group, in any dimension d≥2, and for arbitrary smooth central plaquette actions.
en.motivation: To understand the universal mathematical structure of Wilson loops in lattice Yang-Mills theory, transcending limitations of specific actions.
en.method: Employ a state-sum expansion in plaquette labels by irreducible representations, factorizing each term into an action-dependent spectral weight and an action-independent topological coefficient. Analyze these coefficients in three exact ways: as a gauge/string expansion over decorated spanning surfaces, as a local spin-foam/channel model on the dual incidence graph, and as a universal finite-N master loop equation that closes on the coefficient side.
en.result: Establishes an action-agnostic universal framework that recovers several recent Wilson-action results as specializations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified framework to analyze Wilson loop calculations under different lattice actions within the same universal structure.

idea_spark.idea: This decomposition and the multiple exact representation methods (gauge/string, spin-foam, master equation) could be applied to study universality for similar observables (e.g., 't Hooft loops) in other lattice field theories or topological field theories.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization to more complex gauge groups (e.g., orthogonal, exceptional) or non-central actions may not be straightforward.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspiring thought: Do observables in other lattice models admit a similar factorization of expectation values into a product of a universal topological factor and a model-dependent factor? How does this factorization behave in the continuum limit?

papers.title: The truncation property and continuity for the long-range contact process on $\mathbb{Z}^d$
papers.summary: We consider a general class of contact processes on $\mathbb{Z}^d$ with potentially long-range interactions. By adapting well established renormalization arguments to the long-range setting we extend by now classical results for finite-range processes to this more general setting. Particularly, we provide general conditions on the decay of the interactions under which a supercritical process remains supercritical after truncation of the interaction parameter at a sufficiently large distance. Further, for the family of parameters satisfying this latter truncation property, we conclude that the probability of the process to never recover is continuous.

ai.tldr: 研究Z^d格点上具有长程相互作用的接触过程，证明了在相互作用衰减满足特定条件时，超临界过程在截断后仍保持超临界，且永不恢复的概率是连续的。
ai.motivation: 经典接触过程研究通常假设有限程相互作用，但实际物理系统常涉及长程作用。需要将有限程的经典结果推广到更一般的长程情形。
ai.method: 将成熟的重整化论证方法适配到长程设置，通过分析相互作用衰减条件，证明截断性质并推导连续性。
ai.result: 给出了相互作用衰减的普适条件，使得超临界过程在足够大距离截断后仍保持超临界；并证明了该参数族下永不恢复概率的连续性。
ai.help_to_user: 为长程相互作用的粒子系统提供了严格的数学框架，扩展了经典接触过程理论的应用范围。

idea_spark.idea: 将截断性质作为分析长程系统临界行为的桥梁
idea_spark.risk: 衰减条件的具体形式可能依赖空间维度和相互作用形式
idea_spark.inspiration: 类似方法可用于其他长程相互作用的随机过程（如 voter 模型、Ising 模型）

idea_spark.inspiration: 类似方法可用于其他长程相互作用的随机过程（如 voter 模型、Ising 模型）

en.tldr: Studies contact processes on Z^d with long-range interactions, proving that under specific decay conditions, a supercritical process remains supercritical after truncation, and the probability of never recovering is continuous.
en.motivation: Classical contact process studies typically assume finite-range interactions, but real physical systems often involve long-range effects. There is a need to extend classical finite-range results to more general long-range settings.
en.method: Adapts well-established renormalization arguments to the long-range setting, analyzing interaction decay conditions to prove truncation properties and derive continuity.
en.result: Provides general conditions on interaction decay under which a supercritical process remains supercritical after truncation at a sufficiently large distance, and establishes continuity of the extinction probability for the family of parameters satisfying this property.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for particle systems with long-range interactions, extending the applicability of classical contact process theory.

idea_spark.idea: Using the truncation property as a bridge to analyze critical behavior in long-range systems
idea_spark.risk: Specific form of decay conditions may depend on spatial dimension and interaction type
idea_spark.inspiration: Similar approaches could be applied to other long-range interacting stochastic processes (e.g., voter model, Ising model)

papers.title: LLM attribution analysis across different fine-tuning strategies and model scales for automated code compliance
papers.summary: Existing research on large language models (LLMs) for automated code compliance has primarily focused on performance, treating the models as black boxes and overlooking how training decisions affect their interpretive behavior. This paper addresses this gap by employing a perturbation-based attribution analysis to compare the interpretive behaviors of LLMs across different fine-tuning strategies such as full fine-tuning (FFT), low-rank adaptation (LoRA) and quantized LoRA fine-tuning, as well as the impact of model scales which include varying LLM parameter sizes. Our results show that FFT produces attribution patterns that are statistically different and more focused than those from parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods. Furthermore, we found that as model scale increases, LLMs develop specific interpretive strategies such as prioritizing numerical constraints and rule identifiers in the building text, albeit with performance gains in semantic similarity of the generated and reference computer-processable rules plateauing for models larger than 7B. This paper provides crucial insights into the explainability of these models, taking a step toward building more transparent LLMs for critical, regulation-based tasks in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction industry.

ai.tldr: 本研究通过扰动归因分析，比较了不同微调策略和模型规模下LLM在自动化代码合规任务中的解释行为差异。
ai.motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLM在自动化代码合规中的性能，将其视为黑箱，忽略了训练决策如何影响其解释行为。
ai.method: 采用基于扰动的归因分析方法，比较了全微调、低秩适应和量化LoRA等不同微调策略，以及不同参数规模的LLM。
ai.result: 全微调产生的归因模式与参数高效微调方法存在统计差异且更聚焦；模型规模增大会使其发展出优先处理数值约束和规则标识符等特定解释策略，但超过70亿参数后生成规则与参考规则的语义相似性性能提升趋于平缓。
ai.help_to_user: 为关键法规类任务构建更透明的LLM提供了重要见解，特别是在建筑、工程和建造行业。

idea_spark.idea: 将不同微调策略的归因模式差异作为模型选择或集成的新维度，而不仅仅是性能指标。
idea_spark.risk: 归因分析本身可能引入新的解释偏差，且结果严重依赖于扰动方法和度量标准的选择。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在模型缩放过程中，不仅监控性能，也系统追踪其内部解释策略的演变，这可能揭示模型能力瓶颈的本质。

zh.tldr: 本研究通过扰动归因分析，比较了不同微调策略和模型规模下LLM在自动化代码合规任务中的解释行为差异。
zh.motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLM在自动化代码合规中的性能，将其视为黑箱，忽略了训练决策如何影响其解释行为。
zh.method: 采用基于扰动的归因分析方法，比较了全微调、低秩适应和量化LoRA等不同微调策略，以及不同参数规模的LLM。
zh.result: 全微调产生的归因模式与参数高效微调方法存在统计差异且更聚焦；模型规模增大会使其发展出优先处理数值约束和规则标识符等特定解释策略，但超过70亿参数后生成规则与参考规则的语义相似性性能提升趋于平缓。
zh.help_to_user: 为关键法规类任务构建更透明的LLM提供了重要见解，特别是在建筑、工程和建造行业。

idea_spark.idea: 将不同微调策略的归因模式差异作为模型选择或集成的新维度，而不仅仅是性能指标。
idea_spark.risk: 归因分析本身可能引入新的解释偏差，且结果严重依赖于扰动方法和度量标准的选择。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在模型缩放过程中，不仅监控性能，也系统追踪其内部解释策略的演变，这可能揭示模型能力瓶颈的本质。

en.tldr: This study employs perturbation-based attribution analysis to compare the interpretive behaviors of LLMs under different fine-tuning strategies and model scales for automated code compliance tasks.
en.motivation: Existing research primarily focuses on the performance of LLMs for automated code compliance, treating models as black boxes and overlooking how training decisions affect their interpretive behavior.
en.method: A perturbation-based attribution analysis is used to compare different fine-tuning strategies (full fine-tuning, low-rank adaptation, quantized LoRA) and LLMs of varying parameter sizes.
en.result: Full fine-tuning produces attribution patterns that are statistically different and more focused than parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods. As model scale increases, LLMs develop specific interpretive strategies like prioritizing numerical constraints and rule identifiers, though performance gains in semantic similarity plateau for models larger than 7B parameters.
en.help_to_user: Provides crucial insights for building more transparent LLMs for critical, regulation-based tasks, particularly in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction industry.

idea_spark.idea: Use the differences in attribution patterns across fine-tuning strategies as a new dimension for model selection or ensemble, beyond just performance metrics.
idea_spark.risk: Attribution analysis itself may introduce new interpretation biases, and results are heavily dependent on the choice of perturbation method and metric.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematically tracking the evolution of internal interpretive strategies during model scaling, alongside performance, which may reveal the nature of model capability bottlenecks.

papers.title: $D$-bialgebras, dendrification and embeddings into AWB of almost Poisson algebras
papers.summary: An algebra with bracket ({\sf AWB} for short) is an associative algebra endowed with a bilinear bracket satisfying a Leibniz-type compatibility condition, as introduced in \cite{casas}. It can be viewed as a noncommutative generalization of an almost Poisson algebra; indeed, when the associative product is commutative and the bracket is skew-symmetric, one recovers the notion of an almost Poisson algebra. In this paper, we introduce the notion of {almost Poisson Drinfel'd bialgebras ($D$-bialgebras)} as an analogue of Poisson $D$-bialgebras, and we establish the equivalence between matched pairs, Manin triples, and almost Poisson $D$-bialgebras. Furthermore, we define a new algebraic structure, called {almost tridendriform Poisson algebras}, which can be regarded as the underlying algebraic structures associated with relative Rota-Baxter operators on almost Poisson algebras. Finally, we show that every almost Poisson algebra can be embedded into an algebra with bracket ({\sf AWB}) via averaging operators, and more generally via relative averaging operators associated to a given representation of the almost Poisson algebra.

ai.tldr: 本文引入几乎泊松D-双代数概念，建立其与匹配对、Manin三元组的等价性，定义几乎三叉泊松代数，并证明几乎泊松代数可通过平均算子嵌入AWB代数。
ai.motivation: AWB代数是结合代数配备满足莱布尼茨型条件的双线性括号，可视为几乎泊松代数的非交换推广。本文旨在建立其与泊松D-双代数的类比结构。
ai.method: 引入几乎泊松D-双代数概念，建立与匹配对、Manin三元组的等价关系；定义几乎三叉泊松代数作为相对Rota-Baxter算子的底层结构；构造通过平均算子的嵌入映射。
ai.result: 证明了几乎泊松D-双代数与匹配对、Manin三元组的等价性；定义了新的几乎三叉泊松代数结构；展示了几乎泊松代数可通过平均算子嵌入AWB代数。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究非交换几何与泊松结构的代数推广提供了新的理论框架与结构对应关系。

idea_spark.idea: 将平均算子作为连接经典泊松代数与非交换AWB代数的桥梁
idea_spark.risk: 新代数结构的物理或几何解释尚不明确
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索该框架在量子可积系统或非交换微分几何中的应用

en.tldr: This paper introduces almost Poisson D-bialgebras, establishes equivalence with matched pairs and Manin triples, defines almost tridendriform Poisson algebras, and proves embeddings of almost Poisson algebras into AWB via averaging operators.
en.motivation: An algebra with bracket (AWB) is an associative algebra with a bilinear bracket satisfying Leibniz-type compatibility, serving as a noncommutative generalization of almost Poisson algebras. This work aims to develop an analogue of Poisson D-bialgebra theory in this setting.
en.method: Introduce almost Poisson D-bialgebras and establish equivalence with matched pairs and Manin triples; define almost tridendriform Poisson algebras as underlying structures for relative Rota-Baxter operators; construct embedding maps via averaging operators.
en.result: Proved equivalence between almost Poisson D-bialgebras, matched pairs, and Manin triples; defined new almost tridendriform Poisson algebra structure; demonstrated embedding of almost Poisson algebras into AWB via averaging operators.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new theoretical framework and structural correspondences for studying algebraic generalizations of Poisson structures in noncommutative settings.

idea_spark.idea: Using averaging operators as bridges connecting classical Poisson algebras with noncommutative AWB algebras
idea_spark.risk: Physical or geometric interpretations of new algebraic structures remain unclear
idea_spark.inspiration: Potential applications in quantum integrable systems or noncommutative differential geometry

papers.title: Towards Rigorous Explainability by Feature Attribution
papers.summary: For around a decade, non-symbolic methods have been the option of choice when explaining complex machine learning (ML) models. Unfortunately, such methods lack rigor and can mislead human decision-makers. In high-stakes uses of ML, the lack of rigor is especially problematic. One prime example of provable lack of rigor is the adoption of Shapley values in explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), with the tool SHAP being a ubiquitous example. This paper overviews the ongoing efforts towards using rigorous symbolic methods of XAI as an alternative to non-rigorous non-symbolic approaches, concretely for assigning relative feature importance.

ai.tldr: 本文综述了使用严格的符号化可解释人工智能方法替代非严格的非符号化方法（如SHAP）进行特征归因的研究进展。
ai.motivation: 非符号化解释方法（如基于Shapley值的SHAP）缺乏严格性，可能误导高风险机器学习应用中的决策者。
ai.method: 采用严格的符号化可解释人工智能方法进行特征重要性分配，作为非严格非符号化方法的替代方案。
ai.result: 论证了符号化方法在提供严格特征归因方面的潜力，指出了当前非符号化方法的局限性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解严格可解释AI方法的重要性，特别是在高风险决策场景中。

idea_spark.idea: 开发结合形式化方法的混合解释框架，平衡严格性与计算效率。
idea_spark.risk: 符号化方法可能计算复杂度高，难以扩展到大规模模型。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从形式验证领域借鉴技术，为AI解释提供数学保证。

en.tldr: This paper surveys ongoing efforts to use rigorous symbolic XAI methods as alternatives to non-rigorous non-symbolic approaches (e.g., SHAP) for feature attribution.
en.motivation: Non-symbolic explanation methods (e.g., SHAP based on Shapley values) lack rigor and may mislead decision-makers in high-stakes ML applications.
en.method: Employ rigorous symbolic explainable AI methods for feature importance assignment as alternatives to non-rigorous non-symbolic approaches.
en.result: Demonstrates the potential of symbolic methods for providing rigorous feature attribution and highlights limitations of current non-symbolic approaches.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the importance of rigorous XAI methods, particularly in high-stakes decision-making scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Develop hybrid explanation frameworks combining formal methods to balance rigor and computational efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Symbolic methods may have high computational complexity, making scaling to large models challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrow techniques from formal verification to provide mathematical guarantees for AI explanations.

papers.title: Temporal Contrastive Decoding: A Training-Free Method for Large Audio-Language Models
papers.summary: Large audio-language models (LALMs) generalize across speech, sound, and music, but unified decoders can exhibit a \emph{temporal smoothing bias}: transient acoustic cues may be underutilized in favor of temporally smooth context that is better supported by language priors, leading to less specific audio-grounded outputs. We propose \emph{Temporal Contrastive Decoding} (TCD), a training-free decoding method for unified LALMs that mitigates this effect at inference time. TCD constructs a temporally blurred slow-path view by smoothing the input waveform and re-encoding it, then contrasts next-token logits from the original and slow-path views. The contrastive signal is applied as a token-level logit update restricted to a small candidate set. A self-normalized stability score sets the blur window and update scale, and a step-wise gate based on uncertainty and audio reliance activates the update only when needed. Experiments on MMAU and AIR-Bench show consistent improvements on strong unified LALMs. We further conduct ablations and an architectural applicability study to analyze the contributions of key components and how TCD behaves across large audio-language model designs.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的解码方法TCD，通过对比原始音频与模糊化音频的token预测差异，缓解大型音频-语言模型中存在的时序平滑偏差问题，提升音频细节的利用。
ai.motivation: 大型音频-语言模型在处理语音、声音和音乐时，统一的解码器倾向于利用时序平滑的上下文（受语言先验支持），而忽略瞬态声学线索，导致输出缺乏音频特异性。
ai.method: TCD在推理时构建一个时序模糊的慢路径视图（对输入波形进行平滑并重新编码），然后对比原始视图与慢路径视图的下一个token对数概率。对比信号被转化为token级别的logit更新，并限制在一个小的候选集内。通过自归一化稳定性分数设置模糊窗口和更新尺度，并基于不确定性和音频依赖性的步进门控仅在需要时激活更新。
ai.result: 在MMAU和AIR-Bench基准测试中，TCD在多个强大的统一音频-语言模型上带来了持续的性能提升。消融实验和架构适用性研究分析了关键组件的贡献以及TCD在不同模型设计中的行为。
ai.help_to_user: 如果你正在研究或使用大型音频-语言模型，并关注其解码质量、音频细节的利用或推理时优化，本文提供了一种无需重新训练即可提升模型音频基础输出特异性的方法。

idea_spark.idea: 在推理时，通过构造一个信息降级的对比视图（如模糊、下采样、加噪）来凸显原始输入中的重要细节信号。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于对输入进行可控降级（如音频模糊）的能力，且性能提升可能对降级参数（如模糊窗口）敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将训练中常用的对比学习思想创新性地应用于推理阶段的解码过程，为解决模型固有偏差提供了一条低成本的路径。

zh.help_to_user: 如果你正在研究或使用大型音频-语言模型，并关注其解码质量、音频细节的利用或推理时优化，本文提供了一种无需重新训练即可提升模型音频基础输出特异性的方法。

idea_spark.idea: 在推理时，通过构造一个信息降级的对比视图（如模糊、下采样、加噪）来凸显原始输入中的重要细节信号。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于对输入进行可控降级（如音频模糊）的能力，且性能提升可能对降级参数（如模糊窗口）敏感。

en.tldr: Proposes Temporal Contrastive Decoding (TCD), a training-free decoding method that mitigates temporal smoothing bias in large audio-language models by contrasting token predictions from original and temporally blurred audio views, improving utilization of acoustic details.
en.motivation: Unified decoders in large audio-language models (LALMs) exhibit a temporal smoothing bias, favoring temporally smooth context (well-supported by language priors) over transient acoustic cues, leading to less audio-specific outputs.
en.method: TCD constructs a temporally blurred slow-path view at inference by smoothing the input waveform and re-encoding it. It then contrasts next-token logits from the original and slow-path views, applying the contrastive signal as a token-level logit update restricted to a small candidate set. A self-normalized stability score sets the blur window and update scale, and a step-wise gate based on uncertainty and audio reliance activates the update only when needed.
en.result: Experiments on MMAU and AIR-Bench show consistent improvements on strong unified LALMs. Ablations and an architectural applicability study analyze the contributions of key components and how TCD behaves across different model designs.
en.help_to_user: If you are researching or using large audio-language models and are concerned with decoding quality, utilization of acoustic details, or inference-time optimization, this paper offers a method to enhance the audio-grounded specificity of model outputs without retraining.

idea_spark.idea: At inference time, construct a contrastive view with degraded information (e.g., blurring, downsampling, adding noise) to highlight important detail signals in the original input.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on the ability to controllably degrade the input (e.g., audio blurring), and performance gains may be sensitive to degradation parameters (e.g., blur window).
idea_spark.inspiration: Innovatively applies the contrastive learning concept, commonly used in training, to the decoding process at inference time, providing a low-cost path to address inherent model biases.

papers.title: Testing and estimation of the index of stability of univariate and bivariate symmetric $α-$stable distributions via modified Greenwood statistic
papers.summary: We propose a testing and estimation methodology for univariate and bivariate symmatric $α$-stable distributions using a modified version of the Greenwood statistic. Originally designed for positive-valued random variables, the Greenwood statistic, and its modified version tailored for symmetric distributions, have been predominantly applied to univariate random samples. In this paper, we extend the modified Greenwood statistic to a bivariate setting and examine its probabilistic properties within the class of $α$-stable distributions, with a focus on the sub-Gaussian case. Additionally, we introduce a novel testing approach that considers two variations of the modified Greenwood statistic as test statistics for the bivariate case. In the univariate setting, we adapt the proposed testing methodology for estimating the stability index. The simulation studies presented demonstrate that our proposed methodology outperforms classical approaches previously used in this context and serves as an effective tool for distinguishing between Gaussian and $α$-stable distributions with a stability index close to 2. The theoretical and simulation results are further illustrated with practical data examples.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进Greenwood统计量的单变量与双变量对称α稳定分布稳定性指数的检验与估计方法，在模拟中优于经典方法。
ai.motivation: 传统的Greenwood统计量及其改进版本主要用于单变量正随机变量，在对称分布尤其是双变量α稳定分布中的应用有限，需要扩展方法以进行更有效的稳定性指数推断。
ai.method: 将改进的Greenwood统计量扩展到双变量情形，研究其在α稳定分布类（特别是次高斯情形）中的概率性质；提出两种统计量变体作为双变量检验统计量；在单变量情形中，将检验方法适配用于稳定性指数估计。
ai.result: 模拟研究表明，所提方法优于该背景下以往使用的经典方法，能有效区分高斯分布与稳定性指数接近2的α稳定分布；理论结果通过实际数据示例进一步验证。
ai.help_to_user: 为分析具有厚尾特征的对称α稳定数据提供了一种新的检验与参数估计工具，特别适用于金融、物理等领域的建模。

idea_spark.idea: 利用统计量的次序性质构造对分布尾部特征敏感的检验统计量，适用于稳定性参数的假设检验与估计。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于对称性与特定分布族假设，在非对称或非稳定分布中性能可能下降；高维扩展的计算复杂度需进一步评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将基于次序的统计量系统性地应用于多元稳定分布的推断问题，或可结合其他稳健估计方法提升估计效率。

idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于对称性与特定分布族假设，在非对称或非稳定分布中性能可能下降；高维扩展的计算复杂度需进一步评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将基于次序的统计量系统性地应用于多元稳定分布的推断问题，或可结合其他稳健估计方法提升估计效率。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a testing and estimation methodology for the stability index of univariate and bivariate symmetric α-stable distributions using a modified Greenwood statistic, outperforming classical approaches in simulations.
en.motivation: The Greenwood statistic and its modified version have been primarily applied to univariate positive random variables, with limited use for symmetric distributions, especially in bivariate α-stable settings, necessitating extended methods for more effective inference on the stability index.
en.method: Extend the modified Greenwood statistic to a bivariate setting and examine its probabilistic properties within the class of α-stable distributions, focusing on the sub-Gaussian case; introduce two variations as test statistics for bivariate testing; adapt the testing methodology for estimating the stability index in the univariate case.
en.result: Simulation studies demonstrate that the proposed methodology outperforms classical approaches previously used in this context and effectively distinguishes Gaussian from α-stable distributions with a stability index close to 2; theoretical results are illustrated with practical data examples.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new tool for testing and parameter estimation of symmetric α-stable data with heavy-tailed characteristics, particularly useful for modeling in finance, physics, and related fields.

idea_spark.idea: Construct test statistics sensitive to tail behavior using order-based properties of the statistic, suitable for hypothesis testing and estimation of stability parameters.
idea_spark.risk: Performance may degrade under asymmetry or non-stable distributional assumptions; computational complexity for higher-dimensional extensions needs further evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematic application of order-based statistics to inference problems for multivariate stable distributions, potentially combined with other robust estimation methods to improve efficiency.

papers.title: Characterizing all non-Hermitian degeneracies using algebraic approaches: Defectiveness and asymptotic behavior
papers.summary: The presence of degeneracies plays a crucial role in describing the behavior of non-Hermitian (NH) systems. In these systems, there are two key types of degeneracies: $n$-bolical degeneracies, which are analogous to Hermitian degeneracies, and various forms of exceptional points, each associated with different orders that correspond to sizes of the Jordan blocks. These types of degeneracies may coalesce at the same energy level, forming multi-block degeneracies. To understand how a multi-block degenerate NH system responds to perturbations, one should address how each types of involved degeneracies disperse. In this work, we systematically characterize the asymptotic behavior of all types of multi-block degeneracies in NH systems using a rigorous mathematical formulation. Through a range of examples, we demonstrate that our algebraic approach can facilitate the analysis of NH degeneracies in various settings relevant to experiments.

ai.tldr: 本文系统刻画了非厄米系统中所有类型的多块简并点，利用代数方法分析了其缺陷性和渐近行为。
ai.motivation: 非厄米系统中的简并点（如例外点）对系统行为至关重要，但多块简并的扰动响应尚缺乏系统分析。
ai.method: 采用严格的数学公式，通过代数方法分析多块简并的渐近行为，并用多个示例验证。
ai.result: 建立了分析多块简并扰动响应的通用框架，适用于实验相关场景。
ai.help_to_user: 为非厄米系统简并点的理论分析和实验设计提供了系统的数学工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将多块简并分解为Jordan块组合，分别研究其扰动色散。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统可能存在高阶扰动或非解析行为，需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对非厄米系统中简并点分类与调控的新思路。

en.tldr: This work systematically characterizes all types of multi-block degeneracies in non-Hermitian systems using algebraic approaches to analyze defectiveness and asymptotic behavior.
en.motivation: Degeneracies (e.g., exceptional points) are crucial in non-Hermitian systems, but the perturbation response of multi-block degeneracies lacks systematic characterization.
en.method: A rigorous mathematical formulation based on algebraic approaches is used to analyze the asymptotic behavior of multi-block degeneracies, demonstrated through various examples.
en.result: A general framework for analyzing the perturbation response of multi-block degeneracies is established, applicable to experimental settings.
en.help_to_user: Provides systematic mathematical tools for theoretical analysis and experimental design of degeneracies in non-Hermitian systems.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose multi-block degeneracies into Jordan block combinations and study their perturbation dispersion separately.
idea_spark.risk: Real systems may exhibit higher-order perturbations or non-analytic behaviors requiring further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires new perspectives on classifying and controlling degeneracies in non-Hermitian systems.

papers.title: SPLIT: Self-supervised Partitioning for Learned Inversion in Nonlinear Tomography
papers.summary: Machine learning has achieved impressive performance in tomographic reconstruction, but supervised training requires paired measurements and ground-truth images that are often unavailable. This has motivated self-supervised approaches, which have primarily addressed denoising and, more recently, linear inverse problems. We address nonlinear inverse problems and introduce SPLIT (Self-supervised Partitioning for Learned Inversion in Nonlinear Tomography), a self-supervised machine-learning framework for reconstructing images from nonlinear, incomplete, and noisy projection data without any samples of ground-truth images. SPLIT enforces cross-partition consistency and measurement-domain fidelity while exploiting complementary information across multiple partitions. Our main theoretical result shows that, under mild conditions, the proposed self-supervised objective is equivalent to its supervised counterpart in expectation. We regularize training with an automatic stopping rule that halts optimization when a no-reference image-quality surrogate saturates. As a concrete application, we derive SPLIT variants for multispectral computed tomography. Experiments on sparse-view acquisitions demonstrate high reconstruction quality and robustness to noise, surpassing classical iterative reconstruction and recent self-supervised baselines.

ai.tldr: SPLIT是一种自监督学习框架，用于从非线性、不完整、有噪声的投影数据中重建图像，无需真实图像样本。
ai.motivation: 监督学习需要配对的测量数据和真实图像，这在非线性层析成像中通常难以获得。
ai.method: 通过强制跨分区一致性和测量域保真度，利用多个分区的互补信息，并采用无参考图像质量代理的自动停止规则。
ai.result: 在稀疏视图多光谱CT实验中，重建质量高，抗噪性强，优于经典迭代重建和近期自监督基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为缺乏真实图像数据的非线性层析成像重建提供了一种有效的自监督解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将自监督目标在期望下等价于监督目标的理论保证，增强了方法可信度。
idea_spark.risk: 方法性能可能依赖于特定的数据分区策略和噪声假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 无参考图像质量代理作为训练停止准则，可避免过拟合并提高泛化能力。

en.tldr: SPLIT is a self-supervised learning framework for reconstructing images from nonlinear, incomplete, and noisy projection data without ground-truth samples.
en.motivation: Supervised training requires paired measurements and ground-truth images, which are often unavailable in nonlinear tomography.
en.method: Enforces cross-partition consistency and measurement-domain fidelity while exploiting complementary information across multiple partitions, with an automatic stopping rule based on a no-reference image-quality surrogate.
en.result: Experiments on sparse-view multispectral CT demonstrate high reconstruction quality and robustness to noise, surpassing classical iterative reconstruction and recent self-supervised baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective self-supervised solution for nonlinear tomographic reconstruction when ground-truth image data is lacking.

idea_spark.idea: Theoretical guarantee that the self-supervised objective is equivalent to its supervised counterpart in expectation under mild conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Performance may depend on specific data partitioning strategies and noise assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using a no-reference image-quality surrogate as a training stopping criterion to avoid overfitting and improve generalization.

papers.title: Towards Realistic Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Segmentation: Benchmark and Baseline
papers.summary: Open-vocabulary remote sensing image segmentation (OVRSIS) remains underexplored due to fragmented datasets, limited training diversity, and the lack of evaluation benchmarks that reflect realistic geospatial application demands. Our previous \textit{OVRSISBenchV1} established an initial cross-dataset evaluation protocol, but its limited scope is insufficient for assessing realistic open-world generalization. To address this issue, we propose \textit{OVRSISBenchV2}, a large-scale and application-oriented benchmark for OVRSIS. We first construct \textbf{OVRSIS95K}, a balanced dataset of about 95K image--mask pairs covering 35 common semantic categories across diverse remote sensing scenes. Built upon OVRSIS95K and 10 downstream datasets, OVRSISBenchV2 contains 170K images and 128 categories, substantially expanding scene diversity, semantic coverage, and evaluation difficulty. Beyond standard open-vocabulary segmentation, it further includes downstream protocols for building extraction, road extraction, and flood detection, thereby better reflecting realistic geospatial application demands and complex deployment scenarios. We also propose \textbf{Pi-Seg}, a baseline for OVRSIS. Pi-Seg improves transferability through a \textbf{positive-incentive noise} mechanism, where learnable and semantically guided perturbations broaden the visual-text feature space during training. Extensive experiments on OVRSISBenchV1, OVRSISBenchV2, and downstream tasks show that Pi-Seg delivers strong and consistent results, particularly on the more challenging OVRSISBenchV2 benchmark. Our results highlight both the importance of realistic benchmark design and the effectiveness of perturbation-based transfer for OVRSIS. The code and datasets are available at \href{https://github.com/LiBingyu01/RSKT-Seg/tree/Pi-Seg}{LiBingyu01/RSKT-Seg/tree/Pi-Seg}.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了OVRSISBenchV2基准和Pi-Seg基线方法，用于解决开放词汇遥感图像分割中数据集碎片化、训练多样性不足和缺乏真实应用评估基准的问题。
ai.motivation: 现有开放词汇遥感图像分割研究缺乏反映真实地理空间应用需求的评估基准，且先前基准OVRSISBenchV1范围有限，不足以评估开放世界的泛化能力。
ai.method: 构建了包含约95K图像-掩码对的平衡数据集OVRSIS95K，并在此基础上建立了大规模、面向应用的基准OVRSISBenchV2。提出了Pi-Seg基线方法，通过可学习的、语义引导的正向激励噪声机制，在训练期间拓宽视觉-文本特征空间。
ai.result: 在OVRSISBenchV1、OVRSISBenchV2及下游任务上的大量实验表明，Pi-Seg取得了强劲且一致的结果，尤其在更具挑战性的OVRSISBenchV2基准上表现突出。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一个更全面、更贴近实际应用的评估基准（OVRSISBenchV2）和一个有效的基线模型（Pi-Seg），为开放词汇遥感图像分割的研究和实际部署提供了工具和性能参照。

idea_spark.idea: 在特征空间施加可控的、与语义相关的扰动，而非随机噪声，以模拟真实世界的多样性并鼓励模型学习更鲁棒的特征表示。
idea_spark.risk: 噪声的设计和强度需要仔细调整，不当的扰动可能损害原始语义信息或导致训练不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将基准构建的重点从纯粹的数据规模扩展转向包含多样下游协议（如建筑物提取、道路提取、洪水检测），以更好地反映复杂部署场景，这对其他领域的基准设计有启发意义。

en.tldr: This paper proposes OVRSISBenchV2, a benchmark for realistic open-vocabulary remote sensing image segmentation, and Pi-Seg, a baseline method that improves transferability via a positive-incentive noise mechanism.
en.motivation: Open-vocabulary remote sensing image segmentation lacks evaluation benchmarks that reflect realistic geospatial application demands, and the previous OVRSISBenchV1 has limited scope insufficient for assessing open-world generalization.
en.method: Constructs a balanced dataset OVRSIS95K (~95K image-mask pairs) and establishes the large-scale, application-oriented benchmark OVRSISBenchV2. Proposes the Pi-Seg baseline, which employs a learnable, semantically guided positive-incentive noise mechanism to broaden the visual-text feature space during training.
en.result: Extensive experiments on OVRSISBenchV1, OVRSISBenchV2, and downstream tasks show that Pi-Seg delivers strong and consistent results, particularly on the more challenging OVRSISBenchV2 benchmark.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more comprehensive and realistic evaluation benchmark (OVRSISBenchV2) and an effective baseline model (Pi-Seg), offering tools and performance references for research and practical deployment in open-vocabulary remote sensing image segmentation.

idea_spark.idea: Apply controllable, semantically relevant perturbations to the feature space instead of random noise to simulate real-world diversity and encourage learning more robust feature representations.
idea_spark.risk: The design and strength of the noise require careful tuning; inappropriate perturbations may harm original semantic information or cause training instability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Shifting benchmark construction focus from pure data scale expansion to including diverse downstream protocols (e.g., building extraction, road extraction, flood detection) to better reflect complex deployment scenarios is inspirational for benchmark design in other fields.

papers.title: An exact algorithm for vehicle routing problems with temporal dependency constraints
papers.summary: Temporal dependencies between customer visits, such as synchronization constraints, pose a fundamental challenge in vehicle routing. These dependencies, which arise in applications such as home healthcare routing, aircraft scheduling, and technician routing, introduce inter-route constraints that make the resulting problems significantly harder to solve. We present an exact solution method for vehicle routing problems with temporal dependencies capable of handling all types of temporal dependencies studied in the literature, unlike most existing approaches that target specific subclasses. Our approach is based on a fragment-based formulation in which routes are represented as sequences of a new type of fragment, designed to handle temporal dependency constraints. This formulation is solved via a price-cut-and-enumerate algorithm that computes a lower bound using alternating column-and-row generation, obtains an initial upper bound, and iteratively refines both bounds through fragment enumeration and branch-and-cut, supported by several new classes of valid inequalities. Computational experiments show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art benchmark methods and is able to solve previously intractable instances while covering a wider range of temporal dependencies.

ai.tldr: 提出一种处理车辆路径问题中时间依赖约束的精确算法，基于片段化建模与价格-切割-枚举方法，显著优于现有方法并解决之前难解实例。
ai.motivation: 客户访问之间的时间依赖（如同步约束）在家庭医疗、飞机调度等应用中普遍存在，引入跨路径约束使问题求解难度显著增加，现有方法多针对特定子类，缺乏通用解法。
ai.method: 采用基于片段的新表述，将路径表示为可处理时间依赖约束的片段序列；通过价格-切割-枚举算法求解：交替列生成与行生成计算下界，获取初始上界，再通过片段枚举和分支切割结合新有效不等式类迭代优化上下界。
ai.result: 计算实验表明，该方法显著优于当前最先进基准方法，能够求解之前难解的实例，且覆盖更广泛的时间依赖类型。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理复杂时间依赖约束的车辆路径问题提供了通用精确求解框架，可应用于医疗配送、航班调度等需同步协调的实际场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将时间依赖约束编码到路径片段定义中，使传统列生成能处理跨路径交互。
idea_spark.risk: 问题规模极大时片段枚举可能组合爆炸，需依赖有效不等式剪枝。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发于将复杂全局约束分解为局部可处理片段，再通过协调机制重建可行解。

en.tldr: Proposes an exact algorithm for vehicle routing problems with temporal dependency constraints, based on fragment-based modeling and a price-cut-and-enumerate approach, significantly outperforming existing methods and solving previously intractable instances.
en.motivation: Temporal dependencies between customer visits, such as synchronization constraints, are common in applications like home healthcare and aircraft scheduling, introducing inter-route constraints that make problems much harder; most existing approaches target specific subclasses, lacking a general solution.
en.method: Uses a novel fragment-based formulation where routes are sequences of fragments designed to handle temporal dependencies; solved via a price-cut-and-enumerate algorithm: computes a lower bound via alternating column-and-row generation, obtains an initial upper bound, then iteratively refines both bounds through fragment enumeration and branch-and-cut supported by new classes of valid inequalities.
en.result: Computational experiments show the method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks, solves previously intractable instances, and covers a wider range of temporal dependencies.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general exact solution framework for vehicle routing problems with complex temporal dependency constraints, applicable to real-world scenarios requiring synchronized coordination like medical delivery and flight scheduling.

idea_spark.idea: Encode temporal dependency constraints into the definition of route fragments, enabling traditional column generation to handle inter-route interactions.
idea_spark.risk: Fragment enumeration may face combinatorial explosion for very large instances, relying on valid inequalities for pruning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by decomposing complex global constraints into locally manageable fragments, then reconstructing feasible solutions through coordination mechanisms.

papers.title: Diffusion Autoencoder for Unsupervised Artifact Restoration in Handheld Fundus Images
papers.summary: The advent of handheld fundus imaging devices has made ophthalmologic diagnosis and disease screening more accessible, efficient, and cost-effective. However, images captured from these setups often suffer from artifacts such as flash reflections, exposure variations, and motion-induced blur, which degrade image quality and hinder downstream analysis. While generative models have been effective in image restoration, most depend on paired supervision or predefined artifact structures, making them less adaptable to unstructured degradations commonly observed in handheld fundus images. To address this, we propose an unsupervised diffusion autoencoder that integrates a context encoder with the denoising process to learn semantically meaningful representations for artifact restoration. The model is trained only on high-quality table-top fundus images and infers to restore artifact-affected handheld acquisitions. We validate the restorations through quantitative and qualitative evaluations, and have shown that diagnostic accuracy increases to 81.17% on an unseen dataset and multiple artifact conditions

ai.tldr: 提出一种无监督扩散自编码器，仅使用高质量眼底图像训练，即可恢复手持设备拍摄的含伪影图像，提升诊断准确率。
ai.motivation: 手持眼底成像设备普及，但其图像常存在闪光反射、曝光不均、运动模糊等伪影，降低图像质量并影响下游分析。现有生成修复方法多依赖配对监督或预定义伪影结构，难以适应手持图像的非结构化退化。
ai.method: 集成上下文编码器与去噪过程的扩散自编码器，学习语义化表示进行伪影修复。模型仅用高质量台式眼底图像训练，可推理修复含伪影的手持图像。
ai.result: 定量与定性评估验证了修复效果。在未见数据集及多种伪影条件下，诊断准确率提升至81.17%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需配对数据、能处理非结构化伪影的手持医学图像修复方法。

idea_spark.idea: 在扩散过程中注入上下文语义信息，引导生成过程修复特定退化模式。
idea_spark.risk: 对训练数据质量依赖较高，若高质量图像不足或分布有偏，可能影响泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用高质量数据学习通用表示，再应用于低质量数据修复，避免了收集配对数据的困难。

en.tldr: Proposes an unsupervised diffusion autoencoder trained only on high-quality fundus images to restore artifact-affected handheld acquisitions, improving diagnostic accuracy.
en.motivation: Handheld fundus imaging devices are widely used but often produce images with artifacts like flash reflections, exposure variations, and motion blur, degrading quality and hindering analysis. Existing generative restoration methods rely on paired supervision or predefined artifact structures, limiting adaptability to unstructured degradations in handheld images.
en.method: A diffusion autoencoder integrating a context encoder with the denoising process to learn semantically meaningful representations for artifact restoration. The model is trained solely on high-quality table-top fundus images and infers to restore artifact-affected handheld images.
en.result: Validated through quantitative and qualitative evaluations. Diagnostic accuracy increased to 81.17% on an unseen dataset under multiple artifact conditions.
en.help_to_user: Provides an unsupervised method for restoring handheld medical images without paired data, capable of handling unstructured artifacts.

idea_spark.idea: Inject contextual semantic information into the diffusion process to guide generation toward repairing specific degradation patterns.
idea_spark.risk: Relies heavily on the quality of training data; insufficient or biased high-quality images may affect generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging high-quality data to learn general representations, then applying them to restore low-quality data, circumvents the difficulty of collecting paired datasets.

papers.title: Characterising LLM-Generated Competency Questions: a Cross-Domain Empirical Study using Open and Closed Models
papers.summary: Competency Questions (CQs) are a cornerstone of requirement elicitation in ontology engineering. CQs represent requirements as a set of natural language questions that an ontology should satisfy; they are traditionally modelled by ontology engineers together with domain experts as part of a human-centred, manual elicitation process. The use of Generative AI automates CQ creation at scale, therefore democratising the process of generation, widening stakeholder engagement, and ultimately broadening access to ontology engineering. However, given the large and heterogeneous landscape of LLMs, varying in dimensions such as parameter scale, task and domain specialisation, and accessibility, it is crucial to characterise and understand the intrinsic, observable properties of the CQs they produce (e.g., readability, structural complexity) through a systematic, cross-domain analysis. This paper introduces a set of quantitative measures for the systematic comparison of CQs across multiple dimensions. Using CQs generated from well defined use cases and scenarios, we identify their salient properties, including readability, relevance with respect to the input text and structural complexity of the generated questions. We conduct our experiments over a set of use cases and requirements using a range of LLMs, including both open (KimiK2-1T, LLama3.1-8B, LLama3.2-3B) and closed models (Gemini 2.5 Pro, GPT 4.1). Our analysis demonstrates that LLM performance reflects distinct generation profiles shaped by the use case.

ai.tldr: 本研究通过跨领域实证分析，量化评估了开放与封闭大语言模型生成能力问题（CQs）的可读性、相关性和结构复杂性等内在属性。
ai.motivation: 能力问题是本体工程需求获取的核心，传统上依赖人工协作。生成式AI可规模化自动创建CQs，但不同LLM生成的CQ特性尚不明确，需系统分析其内在属性。
ai.method: 定义多维度量化指标，在多个用例场景下，使用开放模型（KimiK2-1T、LLama3.1-8B、LLama3.2-3B）和封闭模型（Gemini 2.5 Pro、GPT 4.1）生成CQs，系统比较其可读性、输入文本相关性和结构复杂性。
ai.result: 实验表明，不同LLM在CQ生成上表现出由用例塑造的独特生成特征，模型性能反映了差异化的生成模式。
ai.help_to_user: 为选择适合本体工程CQ生成的LLM提供实证依据，帮助理解不同模型在需求自动化获取中的特性差异。

idea_spark.idea: 将CQ生成质量评估扩展到更多细粒度维度（如逻辑一致性、领域适配度）；探索混合模型策略以融合不同LLM的生成优势。
idea_spark.risk: 量化指标可能无法完全捕捉CQ的语义质量和实用性；实验结果受限于所选用例和模型版本，泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将类似方法论应用于其他需求工程场景的自动化评估；促进本体工程与LLM研究的交叉融合。

en.tldr: This study quantitatively evaluates intrinsic properties (e.g., readability, relevance, structural complexity) of LLM-generated Competency Questions through a cross-domain empirical analysis comparing open and closed models.
en.motivation: Competency Questions are central to requirement elicitation in ontology engineering, traditionally manual. Generative AI enables automated CQ creation at scale, but the characteristics of CQs produced by diverse LLMs require systematic analysis to understand their inherent properties.
en.method: Define a set of quantitative measures for systematic comparison across multiple dimensions. Generate CQs from well-defined use cases using open models (KimiK2-1T, LLama3.1-8B, LLama3.2-3B) and closed models (Gemini 2.5 Pro, GPT 4.1), analyzing readability, relevance to input text, and structural complexity.
en.result: The analysis demonstrates that LLM performance reflects distinct generation profiles shaped by the use case, with different models exhibiting unique characteristics in CQ production.
en.help_to_user: Provides empirical evidence for selecting LLMs suitable for CQ generation in ontology engineering, aiding understanding of model-specific traits in automated requirement elicitation.

idea_spark.idea: Extend CQ generation quality assessment to more fine-grained dimensions (e.g., logical consistency, domain adaptability); explore hybrid model strategies to combine strengths of different LLMs.
idea_spark.risk: Quantitative metrics may not fully capture semantic quality and practicality of CQs; findings are limited to selected use cases and model versions, requiring further validation for generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires applying similar methodologies to automated evaluation in other requirement engineering scenarios; fosters cross-fertilization between ontology engineering and LLM research.

papers.title: Brain Score Tracks Shared Properties of Languages: Evidence from Many Natural Languages and Structured Sequences
papers.summary: Recent breakthroughs in language models (LMs) using neural networks have raised the question: how similar are these models' processing to human language processing? Results using a framework called Brain Score (BS) -- predicting fMRI activations during reading from LM activations -- have been used to argue for a high degree of similarity. To understand this similarity, we conduct experiments by training LMs on various types of input data and evaluate them on BS. We find that models trained on various natural languages from many different language families have very similar BS performance. LMs trained on other structured data -- the human genome, Python, and pure hierarchical structure (nested parentheses) -- also perform reasonably well and close to natural languages in some cases. These findings suggest that BS can highlight language models' ability to extract common structure across natural languages, but that the metric may not be sensitive enough to allow us to infer human-like processing from a high BS score alone.

ai.tldr: 研究发现，在不同自然语言及结构化序列上训练的语言模型，其Brain Score表现相似，表明该指标主要反映模型提取跨语言通用结构的能力，而非人类特有的语言处理方式。
ai.motivation: 近期神经网络语言模型的突破引发了一个问题：这些模型的处理方式与人类语言处理有多相似？Brain Score框架通过预测fMRI激活来评估这种相似性，但其具体含义尚不明确。
ai.method: 在多种自然语言（来自不同语系）和结构化数据（人类基因组、Python代码、嵌套括号层次结构）上训练语言模型，并评估它们在Brain Score上的表现。
ai.result: 在不同自然语言上训练的模型Brain Score表现非常相似；在结构化数据上训练的模型表现也相当好，在某些情况下接近自然语言。这表明Brain Score主要捕捉模型提取跨语言通用结构的能力。
ai.help_to_user: 本文帮助你理解Brain Score指标的本质：它衡量的是语言模型提取跨数据源的通用结构的能力，而非特异性的人类语言处理模式。

idea_spark.idea: 开发能更好区分人类特异性处理与通用结构学习的神经对齐指标。
idea_spark.risk: 仅依赖Brain Score可能导致过高估计语言模型与人类神经处理的相似性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索其他神经影像模态（如EEG）或设计更精细的认知任务来补充Brain Score的不足。

en.tldr: The study finds that language models trained on various natural languages and structured sequences achieve similar Brain Score performance, suggesting the metric primarily reflects models' ability to extract common structure across languages, not human-specific language processing.
en.motivation: Recent breakthroughs in neural language models raise the question: how similar is their processing to human language processing? The Brain Score framework predicts fMRI activations from model activations, but its interpretation requires clarification.
en.method: Train language models on diverse natural languages (from different families) and structured data (human genome, Python code, nested parentheses hierarchical structure), then evaluate their Brain Score performance.
en.result: Models trained on different natural languages show very similar Brain Score performance; models trained on structured data also perform reasonably well, sometimes close to natural languages. This indicates Brain Score primarily captures models' ability to extract common structure across data sources.
en.help_to_user: This paper helps you understand the nature of Brain Score: it measures language models' ability to extract common structure across data sources, not specifically human-like language processing patterns.

idea_spark.idea: Develop neural alignment metrics that better distinguish human-specific processing from general structure learning.
idea_spark.risk: Relying solely on Brain Score may overestimate the similarity between language models and human neural processing.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore other neuroimaging modalities (e.g., EEG) or design more fine-grained cognitive tasks to complement Brain Score limitations.

papers.title: Online Trading as a Secretary Problem Variant
papers.summary: This paper studies an online trading variant of the classical secretary problem, called secretary problem variant trading (SPVT), from the perspective of an intermediary who facilitates trade between a seller and $n$ buyers (collectively referred to as agents). The seller has an item, and each buyer demands the item. These agents arrive sequentially in a uniformly random order to meet the intermediary, each revealing their valuation of the item upon arrival. After each arrival, the intermediary must make an immediate and irrevocable decision before the next agent appears. The intermediary's objective is to maximize the price of the agent who ultimately holds the item at the end of the process. We evaluate the performance of online algorithms for SPVT using two notions of competitive ratio: strong and weak.   The strong notion benchmarks the online algorithm against a powerful offline optimum: the highest price among the $n+1$ agents. We propose an online algorithm for SPVT achieving a strong competitive ratio of $\frac{4e^2}{e^2+1} \approx 3.523$, which is the best possible even when the seller's price may be zero. This tight ratio closes the gap between the previous best upper bound of $4.189$ and lower bound of $3.258$.   In contrast, the weak notion restricts the offline optimal algorithm to the given arrival order. The offline algorithm can no longer alter the predetermined arrival order to always place the item in the hands of the agent offering the highest price. Against this weaker benchmark, we design a simple online algorithm for SPVT, achieving a weak competitive ratio of $2$. We further investigate the special case in which the seller's price is zero. For this special SPVT, we develop a double-threshold algorithm achieving a weak competitive ratio of at most $1.83683$ and establish a lower bound of $1.76239$.

ai.tldr: 本文研究秘书问题的一个在线交易变体（SPVT），中介在买卖双方随机到达时需即时决策，以最大化最终持有物品者的出价。提出了强竞争比约3.523（最优）和弱竞争比2的在线算法。
ai.motivation: 经典秘书问题在在线交易场景下的扩展，中介需在买卖双方随机顺序到达时做出即时不可撤销的决策，目标是最大化交易价格。
ai.method: 针对SPVT问题，设计了在线算法。对于强竞争比，提出了达到约3.523竞争比的算法（当卖方价格可能为零时最优）。对于弱竞争比，设计了一个简单算法达到竞争比2。针对卖方价格为零的特殊情况，提出了双阈值算法。
ai.result: 强竞争比算法达到约3.523，填补了此前上界4.189与下界3.258之间的空白，且当卖方价格可能为零时是最优的。弱竞争比算法达到2。对于卖方价格为零的特殊情况，双阈值算法弱竞争比上界为1.83683，并建立了1.76239的下界。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了秘书问题在在线交易中介场景下的理论框架和算法设计，特别是关于强/弱两种竞争比概念的分析与最优算法构造。

idea_spark.idea: 将秘书问题的‘选择最佳候选者’框架应用于在线交易中介场景，并区分两种不同能力的离线最优作为基准来评估在线算法。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设代理人估值在到达时完全揭示且顺序均匀随机，实际交易中可能存在信息不完全、顺序非随机或估值关联性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索其他在线决策问题（如资源分配、动态定价）中引入类似强弱竞争比的概念，或考虑代理人具有私有类型、策略性行为等更复杂的博弈情形。

en.tldr: This paper studies an online trading variant of the secretary problem (SPVT), where an intermediary must make immediate decisions as buyers and a seller arrive in random order to maximize the final price. An online algorithm achieves a strong competitive ratio of ~3.523 (optimal) and a simple algorithm achieves a weak competitive ratio of 2.
en.motivation: Extension of the classical secretary problem to an online trading scenario, where an intermediary must make irrevocable decisions upon the random sequential arrival of buyers and a seller, aiming to maximize the transaction price.
en.method: Designed online algorithms for SPVT. For the strong competitive ratio, proposed an algorithm achieving ~3.523 (optimal when the seller's price may be zero). For the weak competitive ratio, designed a simple algorithm achieving a ratio of 2. For the special case of zero seller price, a double-threshold algorithm was developed.
en.result: The strong competitive ratio algorithm achieves ~3.523, closing the gap between the previous best upper bound of 4.189 and lower bound of 3.258, and is optimal when the seller's price may be zero. The weak competitive ratio algorithm achieves 2. For the zero seller price special case, the double-threshold algorithm has a weak competitive ratio upper bound of 1.83683 and a lower bound of 1.76239 is established.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and algorithm design for the secretary problem in an online trading intermediary setting, particularly the analysis and construction of optimal algorithms under strong/weak competitive ratio notions.

idea_spark.idea: Applying the 'select the best candidate' framework of the secretary problem to an online trading intermediary scenario, and distinguishing between two types of offline optima with different powers as benchmarks for evaluating online algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions include full revelation of agent valuations upon arrival and uniformly random order; real-world trading may involve incomplete information, non-random order, or correlated valuations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore introducing similar strong/weak competitive ratio concepts in other online decision problems (e.g., resource allocation, dynamic pricing), or consider more complex game-theoretic settings with private types and strategic behavior of agents.

papers.title: Beyond One-Size-Fits-All: Adaptive Test-Time Augmentation for Sequential Recommendation
papers.summary: Test-time augmentation (TTA) has become a promising approach for mitigating data sparsity in sequential recommendation by improving inference accuracy without requiring costly model retraining. However, existing TTA methods typically rely on uniform, user-agnostic augmentation strategies. We show that this "one-size-fits-all" design is inherently suboptimal, as it neglects substantial behavioral heterogeneity across users, and empirically demonstrate that the optimal augmentation operators vary significantly across user sequences with different characteristics for the first time. To address this limitation, we propose AdaTTA, a plug-and-play reinforcement learning-based adaptive inference framework that learns to select sequence-specific augmentation operators on a per-sequence basis. We formulate augmentation selection as a Markov Decision Process and introduce an Actor-Critic policy network with hybrid state representations and a joint macro-rank reward design to dynamically determine the optimal operator for each input user sequence. Extensive experiments on four real-world datasets and two recommendation backbones demonstrate that AdaTTA consistently outperforms the best fixed-strategy baselines, achieving up to 26.31% relative improvement on the Home dataset while incurring only moderate computational overhead

ai.motivation: 现有测试时增强方法采用统一的用户无关策略，忽略了用户行为异质性，导致次优性能。

ai.result: 在四个真实数据集和两个推荐骨干上，AdaTTA始终优于最佳固定策略基线，在Home数据集上相对提升达26.31%，计算开销适中。
ai.help_to_user: 为推荐系统开发者提供无需重新训练即可提升推理精度的即插即用自适应增强框架。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考如何将静态数据处理流程转化为动态决策过程，以更好地适应个体差异。

en.tldr: Proposes AdaTTA, a reinforcement learning-based adaptive test-time augmentation framework that dynamically selects optimal augmentation operators for each user sequence, addressing limitations of uniform augmentation strategies.
en.motivation: Existing test-time augmentation methods employ uniform, user-agnostic strategies, neglecting behavioral heterogeneity across users, leading to suboptimal performance.
